-lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' harness/main.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Harness entry point and scheduler loop.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\n\\\\nimport argparse\\\\nimport asyncio\\\\nimport json\\\\nimport sys\\\\nimport uuid\\\\nfrom dataclasses import asdict\\\\nfrom dataclasses import replace\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\nfrom typing import Optional\\\\n\\\\nfrom config import settings\\\\nfrom harness.checkpoint import CheckpointStore\\\\nfrom harness.db import HarnessDB\\\\nfrom harness.handoff import HandoffProtocol\\\\nfrom harness.intake import IntakeAgent\\\\nfrom harness.models import (\\\\n    IntakeResult,\\\\n    PermissionRequestRecord,\\\\n    QuotaEventRecord,\\\\n    RiskLevel,\\\\n    StageCheckpoint,\\\\n    StageRecord,\\\\n    TaskRecord,\\\\n    TaskStatus,\\\\n)\\\\nfrom harness.permission_gate import PermissionGate\\\\nfrom harness.quota_router import AllQuotaExhaustedError, QuotaRouter\\\\nfrom harness.stage_executor import PermissionBlockedError, QuotaExhaustedError, StageExecutionError, StageExecutor\\\\nfrom harness.task_queue import TaskQueue, utcnow_iso\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass Harness:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Main scheduler that turns queued tasks into stage executions.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        db_path: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_DB_PATH,\\\\n        artifact_root: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_ARTIFACT_DIR,\\\\n        intake_agent: Optional[IntakeAgent] = None,\\\\n        quota_router: Optional[QuotaRouter] = None,\\\\n        stage_executor: Optional[StageExecutor] = None,\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\n        self.db = HarnessDB(db_path)\\\\n        self.task_queue = TaskQueue(self.db)\\\\n        self.handoff = HandoffProtocol(artifact_root)\\\\n        self.checkpoints = CheckpointStore(artifact_root)\\\\n        self.intake = intake_agent or IntakeAgent()\\\\n        self.router = quota_router or QuotaRouter()\\\\n        self.executor = stage_executor or StageExecutor()\\\\n\\\\n    def submit_task(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        description: str,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        title: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n        goal: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n        verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n        priority: int = 50,\\\\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\\\\n        intake = self.intake.plan_task(description, goal=goal, verify_cmd=verify_cmd)\\\\n        if title:\\\\n            intake = replace(intake, title=title)\\\\n        return self.submit_intake(intake, priority=priority, working_dir=working_dir)\\\\n\\\\n    def submit_intake(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        intake: IntakeResult,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        priority: int = 50,\\\\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n        status: TaskStatus = TaskStatus.EXECUTING,\\\\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.create_task(\\\\n            title=intake.title,\\\\n            description=intake.description,\\\\n            goal=intake.goal,\\\\n            verify_cmd=intake.verify_cmd,\\\\n            complexity=intake.complexity,\\\\n            priority=priority,\\\\n            status=status,\\\\n            working_dir=working_dir,\\\\n        )\\\\n        self.task_queue.save_stages(task.task_id, intake.stages)\\\\n        return task\\\\n\\\\n    async def run_once(self) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\\\\n        await self._recover_paused_quota_tasks()\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.pick_next_runnable_task()\\\\n        if task is None:\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n        if self.task_queue.count_stages(task.task_id) == 0:\\\\n            await self._plan_missing_stages(task)\\\\n            task = self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id) or task\\\\n\\\\n        stage = self.task_queue.next_pending_stage(task.task_id)\\\\n        if stage is None:\\\\n            await self._finish_task(task)\\\\n            return self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\\\\n\\\\n        await self._run_stage(task, stage)\\\\n        return self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\\\\n\\\\n    async def run_forever(self, poll_interval_sec: int = settings.HARNESS_POLL_INTERVAL_SEC) -> None:\\\\n        while True:\\\\n            task = await self.run_once()\\\\n            if task is None:\\\\n                await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval_sec)\\\\n\\\\n    def status_report(self) -> list[dict[str, object]]:\\\\n        report: list[dict[str, object]] = []\\\\n        for task in self.task_queue.list_tasks():\\\\n            report.append(\\\\n                {\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\": task.task_id,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\": task.title,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\": task.status.value,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"priority\\\\\\\": task.priority,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"complexity\\\\\\\": task.complexity,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"working_dir\\\\\\\": task.working_dir,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"stages\\\\\\\": [\\\\n                        {\\\\n                            \\\\\\\"stage_type\\\\\\\": stage.stage_type,\\\\n                            \\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\": stage.status.value,\\\\n                            \\\\\\\"assigned_model\\\\\\\": stage.assigned_model,\\\\n                            \\\\\\\"retry_count\\\\\\\": stage.retry_count,\\\\n                        }\\\\n                        for stage in self.task_queue.list_stages(task.task_id)\\\\n                    ],\\\\n                }\\\\n            )\\\\n        return report\\\\n\\\\n    def inspect_task(self, task_id: str) -> dict[str, object]:\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.get_task(task_id)\\\\n        if task is None:\\\\n            raise KeyError(f\\\\\\\"Task not found: {task_id}\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n        stages = self.task_queue.list_stages(task_id)\\\\n        return {\\\\n            \\\\\\\"task\\\\\\\": {\\\\n                \\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\": task.task_id,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\": task.title,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\": task.description,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"goal\\\\\\\": task.goal,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"verify_cmd\\\\\\\": task.verify_cmd,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\": task.status.value,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"priority\\\\\\\": task.priority,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"complexity\\\\\\\": task.complexity,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"working_dir\\\\\\\": task.working_dir,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"created_at\\\\\\\": task.created_at,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"updated_at\\\\\\\": task.updated_at,\\\\n            },\\\\n            \\\\\\\"stages\\\\\\\": [\\\\n                {\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\": stage.stage_id,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"stage_type\\\\\\\": stage.stage_type,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"model_role\\\\\\\": stage.model_role,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\": stage.status.value,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"assigned_model\\\\\\\": stage.assigned_model,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"assigned_provider\\\\\\\": stage.assigned_provider,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"handoff_doc_path\\\\\\\": stage.handoff_doc_path,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"result_summary\\\\\\\": stage.result_summary,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"retry_count\\\\\\\": stage.retry_count,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"verify_cmd\\\\\\\": stage.verify_cmd,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"metadata\\\\\\\": stage.metadata,\\\\n                }\\\\n                for stage in stages\\\\n            ],\\\\n            \\\\\\\"permission_requests\\\\\\\": [\\\\n                {\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"request_id\\\\\\\": item.request_id,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\": item.stage_id,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"action\\\\\\\": item.action,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"risk_level\\\\\\\": item.risk_level.value,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"decision\\\\\\\": item.decision,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"voters\\\\\\\": item.voters,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"decided_at\\\\\\\": item.decided_at,\\\\n                }\\\\n                for stage in stages\\\\n                for item in self.task_queue.list_permission_requests(stage.stage_id)\\\\n            ],\\\\n            \\\\\\\"checkpoints\\\\\\\": [\\\\n                asdict(checkpoint) for checkpoint in self.checkpoints.list_for_task(task_id)\\\\n            ],\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n    def pause_task(self, task_id: str) -> None:\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task_id, TaskStatus.PAUSED_PERMISSION)\\\\n\\\\n    def resume_task(self, task_id: str) -> None:\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.get_task(task_id)\\\\n        if task is None:\\\\n            raise KeyError(f\\\\\\\"Task not found: {task_id}\\\\\\\")\\\\n        if task.status in {TaskStatus.DONE, TaskStatus.FAILED}:\\\\n            raise ValueError(f\\\\\\\"Cannot resume task in terminal status {task.status.value}\\\\\\\")\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\n\\\\n    def quota_report(self) -> list[dict[str, object]]:\\\\n        snapshots = self.router.quota_manager.fetch_all_quotas()\\\\n        return [\\\\n            {\\\\n                \\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\": snapshot.provider.value,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\": snapshot.email,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"remaining_percent\\\\\\\": snapshot.remaining_percent,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"reset_at\\\\\\\": snapshot.reset_at_readable,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"time_until_reset_hours\\\\\\\": round(snapshot.time_until_reset_hours, 1),\\\\n            }\\\\n            for snapshot in snapshots\\\\n        ]\\\\n\\\\n    async def _plan_missing_stages(self, task: TaskRecord) -> None:\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.PLANNING)\\\\n        intake = self.intake.plan_task(task.description, goal=task.goal, verify_cmd=task.verify_cmd)\\\\n        self.task_queue.save_stages(task.task_id, intake.stages)\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\n\\\\n    async def _recover_paused_quota_tasks(self) -> None:\\\\n        for task in self.task_queue.list_tasks(TaskStatus.PAUSED_QUOTA):\\\\n            stage = self.task_queue.next_pending_stage(task.task_id)\\\\n            if stage is None:\\\\n                continue\\\\n            if self.router.can_run_stage(task, stage):\\\\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\n                self.task_queue.log_quota_event(\\\\n                    QuotaEventRecord(\\\\n                        event_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\n                        provider=stage.assigned_provider or \\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\",\\\\n                        account_email=None,\\\\n                        event_type=\\\\\\\"recovered\\\\\\\",\\\\n                        details={\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\": task.task_id, \\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\": stage.stage_id},\\\\n                        created_at=utcnow_iso(),\\\\n                    )\\\\n                )\\\\n\\\\n    async def _run_stage(self, task: TaskRecord, stage: StageRecord) -> None:\\\\n        try:\\\\n            if not stage.assigned_model or not stage.assigned_provider:\\\\n                choice = self.router.select_model(task, stage)\\\\n                self.task_queue.assign_stage_model(stage.stage_id, choice.model, choice.provider)\\\\n                stage = self.task_queue.get_stage(stage.stage_id) or stage\\\\n\\\\n            previous = self.task_queue.list_completed_stages(task.task_id)\\\\n            handoff_path = self.handoff.write_handoff(task, stage, previous)\\\\n            self.task_queue.mark_stage_running(stage.stage_id, str(handoff_path))\\\\n            stage = self.task_queue.get_stage(stage.stage_id) or stage\\\\n\\\\n            result = await self.executor.execute(stage, str(handoff_path), task.working_dir)\\\\n            if stage.verify_cmd and task.working_dir:\\\\n                verification = await self.executor.run_verify_cmd(stage.verify_cmd, task.working_dir)\\\\n                if verification.returncode != 0:\\\\n                    raise StageExecutionError(verification.stderr.strip() or verification.stdout.strip() or stage.verify_cmd)\\\\n\\\\n            self.handoff.save_stage_output(task, stage, result)\\\\n            self.task_queue.complete_stage(\\\\n\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":0,\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.started\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_5\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/quota_router.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":null,\\\"status\\\":\\\"in_progress\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.completed\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_5\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/quota_router.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Quota-aware model routing.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\n\\\\nimport json\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\\\\n\\\\nimport yaml\\\\n\\\\nfrom config import settings\\\\nfrom harness.chat2api_client import Chat2APIClient\\\\nfrom harness.models import ModelChoice, StageRecord, TaskRecord\\\\nfrom models.quota_manager import QuotaManager, QuotaSnapshot\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass AllQuotaExhaustedError(RuntimeError):\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Raised when no configured candidate model is currently usable.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass QuotaRouter:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Select a model using role preferences, availability, and quota heuristics.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        catalog_path: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_ROLE_MODELS_PATH,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        quota_manager: Optional[QuotaManager] = None,\\\\n        chat_client: Optional[Chat2APIClient] = None,\\\\n        min_remaining_pct: int = settings.HARNESS_MIN_QUOTA_PCT,\\\\n        enable_llm_selector: bool = True,\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\n        self.catalog_path = Path(catalog_path)\\\\n        self.quota_manager = quota_manager or QuotaManager()\\\\n        self.chat_client = chat_client or Chat2APIClient()\\\\n        self.min_remaining_pct = min_remaining_pct\\\\n        self.enable_llm_selector = enable_llm_selector\\\\n        self.catalog = self._load_catalog()\\\\n\\\\n    def _load_catalog(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\n        with open(self.catalog_path, \\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\") as handle:\\\\n            return yaml.safe_load(handle) or {}\\\\n\\\\n    def models_for_role(self, role: str) -> list[str]:\\\\n        roles = self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"roles\\\\\\\", {})\\\\n        configured = roles.get(role)\\\\n        if configured:\\\\n            return list(configured)\\\\n        return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\n\\\\n    def get_model_info(self, model: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\n        return dict(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {}).get(model, {}))\\\\n\\\\n    def chat2api_id(self, model: str) -> str:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Return the chat2api model ID for a catalog model name.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        info = self.get_model_info(model)\\\\n        return info.get(\\\\\\\"chat2api_id\\\\\\\", model)\\\\n\\\\n    def list_available_models(self) -> list[str]:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Return catalog model names whose chat2api_id is live.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        try:\\\\n            live_ids = set(self.chat_client.list_models())\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\n            return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\n        if not live_ids:\\\\n            return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\n        return [\\\\n            name\\\\n            for name in self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {})\\\\n            if self.chat2api_id(name) in live_ids\\\\n        ]\\\\n\\\\n    def can_run_stage(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\\\\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\\\\n    ) -> bool:\\\\n        try:\\\\n            self.select_model(task, stage, quota_snapshot=quota_snapshot, available_models=available_models)\\\\n        except AllQuotaExhaustedError:\\\\n            return False\\\\n        return True\\\\n\\\\n    def select_model(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\\\\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\\\\n        quotas = quota_snapshot if quota_snapshot is not None else self.quota_manager.fetch_all_quotas()\\\\n        available = set(available_models or self.list_available_models())\\\\n        eligible = self._eligible_candidates(self.models_for_role(stage.model_role), quotas, available)\\\\n\\\\n        if not eligible:\\\\n            raise AllQuotaExhaustedError(\\\\n                f\\\\\\\"No eligible model for role={stage.model_role} with min_remaining={self.min_remaining_pct}%\\\\\\\"\\\\n            )\\\\n\\\\n        if self.enable_llm_selector:\\\\n            llm_choice = self._select_with_llm(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\\\\n            if llm_choice is not None:\\\\n                return llm_choice\\\\n\\\\n        return self._fallback_select(task, stage, eligible)\\\\n\\\\n    def _eligible_candidates(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        candidates: list[str],\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\n        available: set[str],\\\\n    ) -> list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]]:\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]] = []\\\\n        for model in candidates:\\\\n            if model not in available:\\\\n                continue\\\\n            provider = self.get_model_info(model).get(\\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\")\\\\n            if not provider:\\\\n                continue\\\\n\\\\n            provider_snapshots = [\\\\n                snapshot\\\\n                for snapshot in quotas\\\\n                if snapshot.provider.value == provider and snapshot.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\\\\n            ]\\\\n            if provider_snapshots:\\\\n                eligible.append((model, provider, max(provider_snapshots, key=self._score_snapshot)))\\\\n            elif provider == \\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\":\\\\n                eligible.append((model, provider, None))\\\\n        return eligible\\\\n\\\\n    def _select_with_llm(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice | None:\\\\n        selector_model = self._pick_selector_model()\\\\n        if selector_model is None:\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n        prompt = self._build_selection_prompt(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\\\\n        try:\\\\n            raw = self.chat_client.chat(\\\\n                model=selector_model,\\\\n                prompt=prompt,\\\\n                system=(\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"You are code-orchestra's model router. \\\\\\\"\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"Return compact JSON with fields model, provider, account, reason.\\\\\\\"\\\\n                ),\\\\n            )\\\\n            parsed = json.loads(raw)\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n        chosen_model = parsed.get(\\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\")\\\\n        if not isinstance(chosen_model, str):\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n        eligible_models = {model: (provider, snapshot) for model, provider, snapshot in eligible}\\\\n        selected = eligible_models.get(chosen_model)\\\\n        if selected is None:\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n        provider, snapshot = selected\\\\n        if snapshot is not None:\\\\n            requested_account = parsed.get(\\\\\\\"account\\\\\\\")\\\\n            if isinstance(requested_account, str) and requested_account and requested_account != snapshot.email:\\\\n                alternative = next(\\\\n                    (\\\\n                        quota\\\\n                        for quota in quotas\\\\n                        if quota.provider.value == provider\\\\n                        and quota.email == requested_account\\\\n                        and quota.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\\\\n                    ),\\\\n                    None,\\\\n                )\\\\n                if alternative is not None:\\\\n                    snapshot = alternative\\\\n\\\\n        return ModelChoice(\\\\n            model=chosen_model,\\\\n            provider=provider,\\\\n            account_email=snapshot.email if snapshot is not None else None,\\\\n            reason=str(parsed.get(\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\"llm_selector\\\\\\\"),\\\\n        )\\\\n\\\\n    def _fallback_select(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\\\\n        best_choice: ModelChoice | None = None\\\\n        best_score: float | None = None\\\\n\\\\n        for role_index, (model, provider, snapshot) in enumerate(eligible):\\\\n            role_bonus = max(0, 40 - role_index * 10)\\\\n            if snapshot is not None:\\\\n                total_score = role_bonus + self._score_snapshot(snapshot)\\\\n                choice = ModelChoice(\\\\n                    model=model,\\\\n                    provider=provider,\\\\n                    account_email=snapshot.email,\\\\n                    reason=(\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\"fallback: role={stage.model_role}, complexity={task.complexity}, \\\\\\\"\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}%, \\\\\\\"\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\"reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\"\\\\n                    ),\\\\n                )\\\\n            else:\\\\n                total_score = role_bonus + self._score_provider_without_snapshot(provider)\\\\n                choice = ModelChoice(\\\\n                    model=model,\\\\n                    provider=provider,\\\\n                    account_email=None,\\\\n                    reason=f\\\\\\\"fallback: role={stage.model_role}, complexity={task.complexity}, provider={provider}\\\\\\\",\\\\n                )\\\\n\\\\n            if best_score is None or total_score > best_score:\\\\n                best_score = total_score\\\\n                best_choice = choice\\\\n\\\\n        if best_choice is None:\\\\n            raise AllQuotaExhaustedError(\\\\n                f\\\\\\\"No eligible model for role={stage.model_role} with min_remaining={self.min_remaining_pct}%\\\\\\\"\\\\n            )\\\\n        return best_choice\\\\n\\\\n    def _pick_selector_model(self) -> str | None:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Pick the cheapest available model to use as the LLM selector.\\\\n\\\\n        Returns the *chat2api_id* since the selector call goes directly to chat2api.\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        preferred = (\\\\\\\"gpt-4o\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"claude-haiku-4-5\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"gemini-3.1-pro\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"gpt-5.4-codex\\\\\\\")\\\\n        available = set(self.list_available_models())\\\\n        for model in preferred:\\\\n            if model in available:\\\\n                return self.chat2api_id(model)\\\\n        return None\\\\n\\\\n    def _build_selection_prompt(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\n    ) -> str:\\\\n        lines = [\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"Task: {task.title}\\\\\\\",\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"Description: {task.description}\\\\\\\",\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"Complexity: {task.complexity}\\\\\\\",\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"Stage: {stage.stage_type} ({stage.model_role})\\\\\\\",\\\\n            \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n            \\\\\\\"Eligible models:\\\\\\\",\\\\n        ]\\\\n        for model, provider, snapshot in eligible:\\\\n            if snapshot is None:\\\\n                lines.append(f\\\\\\\"- {model} | provider={provider} | account=n/a | remaining=n/a | reset_in=n/a\\\\\\\")\\\\n            else:\\\\n                lines.append(\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\"- {model} | provider={provider} | account={snapshot.email} | \\\\\\\"\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}% | reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\"\\\\n                )\\\\n        if quotas:\\\\n            lines.extend([\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"Quota snapshot:\\\\\\\"])\\\\n            for snapshot in quotas:\\\\n                lines.append(\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\"- {snapshot.provider.value}:{snapshot.email} \\\\\\\"\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}% reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\"\\\\n                )\\\\n        lines.extend(\\\\n            [\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n                \\\\\\\"Prefer use-it-or-lose-it quota, but keep role fit.\\\\\\\",\\\\n                'Respond as JSON: {\\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"account\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\"}',\\\\n            ]\\\\n        )\\\\n        return \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\".join(lines)\\\\n\\\\n    def _score_snapshot(self, snapshot: QuotaSnapshot) -> float:\\\\n        waste_bonus = 0.0\\\\n        if snapshot.time_until_reset_hours <= 6:\\\\n            waste_bonus = snapshot.remaining_percent * (6 - max(snapshot.time_until_reset_hours, 0)) / 6\\\\n        safety_bonus = 15.0 if snapshot.remaining_percent >= 40 else 0.0\\\\n        return snapshot.remaining_percent + waste_bonus + safety_bonus\\\\n\\\\n    def _score_provider_without_snapshot(self, provider: str) -> float:\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\":\\\\n            return 85.0\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\"claude\\\\\\\":\\\\n            return 70.0\\\\n        return return cls(accounts=list(accounts), active_account=active)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _ensure_accounts_dir() -> None:\\\\n    ACCOUNTS_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _account_path(email: str) -> Path:\\\\n    return ACCOUNTS_DIR / f\\\\\\\"{email}.json\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _read_json(path: Path) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\\\n    with path.open(\\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\", self.checkpoints.save(checkpoint)\\\\n            self.task_queue.log_quota_event(\\\\n                QuotaEventRecord(\\\\n                    event_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\n                    provider=exc.provider,\\\\n                    account_email=None,\\\\n                    event_type=\\\\\\\"exhausted\\\\\\\",\\\\n                    details={\\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\": stage.stage_id, \\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\": task.task_id},\\\\n                    created_at=utcnow_iso(),\\\\n                )\\\\n            )\\\\n        except PermissionBlockedError as exc:\\\\n            self.task_queue.reset_stage_to_pending(stage.stage_id, retry_count=stage.retry_count)\\\\n            self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.PAUSED_PERMISSION)\\\\n            self.task_queue.log_permission_request(\\\\n                PermissionRequestRecord(\\\\n                    request_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\n                    stage_id=stage.stage_id,\\\\n                    action=exc.command,\\\\n                    context=f\\\\\\\"task={task.task_id} stage={stage.stage_type}\\\\\\\",\\\\n                    risk_level=exc.decision.risk_level,\\\\n                    decision=exc.decision.decision,\\\\n                    voters=[\\\\n                        {\\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\": vote.model, \\\\\\\"vote\\\\\\\": vote.vote, \\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\": vote.reason}\\\\n                        for vote in exc.decision.votes\\\\n                    ],\\\\n                    decided_at=utcnow_iso(),\\\\n                )\\\\n            )\\\\n        except StageExecutionError as exc:\\\\n            retry_count = stage.retry_count + 1\\\\n            if retry_count > settings.MAX_RETRIES:\\\\n                self.task_queue.fail_stage(stage.stage_id, result_summary=str(exc), retry_count=retry_count)\\\\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.FAILED)\\\\n            else:\\\\n                self.task_queue.reset_stage_to_pending(stage.stage_id, retry_count=retry_count)\\\\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\n\\\\n    async def _finish_task(self, task: TaskRecord) -> None:\\\\n        if task.verify_cmd and task.working_dir:\\\\n            verification = await self.executor.run_verify_cmd(task.verify_cmd, task.working_dir)\\\\n            if verification.returncode != 0:\\\\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.FAILED)\\\\n                return\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.DONE)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:\\\\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\\\\\\\"Autonomous multi-LLM harness\\\\\\\")\\\\n    subparsers = parser.add_subparsers(dest=\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\", required=True)\\\\n\\\\n    submit = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\"submit\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Submit a task into the harness queue\\\\\\\")\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Task description\\\\\\\")\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--title\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Override generated title\\\\\\\")\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--goal\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Acceptance goal\\\\\\\")\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--verify-cmd\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Verification command\\\\\\\")\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--priority\\\\\\\", type=int, default=50)\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--working-dir\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Task working directory\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    chat = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\"chat\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Interactive requirement clarification\\\\\\\")\\\\n    chat.add_argument(\\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\", nargs=\\\\\\\"?\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Initial task description\\\\\\\")\\\\n    chat.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--priority\\\\\\\", type=int, default=50)\\\\n    chat.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--working-dir\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Task working directory\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    inspect = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\"inspect\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Show a task in detail\\\\\\\")\\\\n    inspect.add_argument(\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    pause = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\"pause\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Pause a task\\\\\\\")\\\\n    pause.add_argument(\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    resume = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\"resume\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Resume a task\\\\\\\")\\\\n    resume.add_argument(\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\"quota\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Show quota snapshot\\\\\\\")\\\\n    subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\"run-once\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Run one scheduling iteration\\\\\\\")\\\\n    subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Show queued tasks\\\\\\\")\\\\n    return parser\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nasync def _prompt_user_approval(command: str, context: str) -> bool | None:\\\\n    if not sys.stdin.isatty():\\\\n        return None\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\"Permission request for command: {command}\\\\\\\")\\\\n    if context:\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\"Context: {context}\\\\\\\")\\\\n    answer = await asyncio.to_thread(input, \\\\\\\"Allow? [y/N]: \\\\\\\")\\\\n    lowered = answer.strip().lower()\\\\n    if lowered in {\\\\\\\"y\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"yes\\\\\\\"}:\\\\n        return True\\\\n    if lowered in {\\\\\\\"n\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"no\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"}:\\\\n        return False\\\\n    return None\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef build_cli_harness() -> Harness:\\\\n    chat_client = None\\\\n    permission_gate = PermissionGate(user_approver=_prompt_user_approval)\\\\n    stage_executor = StageExecutor(chat_client=chat_client, permission_gate=permission_gate)\\\\n    quota_router = QuotaRouter(chat_client=stage_executor.chat_client)\\\\n    return Harness(quota_router=quota_router, stage_executor=stage_executor)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _read_multiline_description() -> str:\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\"Describe the task. Press Enter twice to finish:\\\\\\\")\\\\n    lines: list[str] = []\\\\n    while True:\\\\n        line = input()\\\\n        if not line and (not lines or not lines[-1]):\\\\n            break\\\\n        lines.append(line)\\\\n    return \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\".join(lines).strip()\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _run_chat_submission(harness: Harness, description: str | None, priority: int, working_dir: str | None) -> TaskRecord:\\\\n    initial_description = description or _read_multiline_description()\\\\n    if not initial_description:\\\\n        raise ValueError(\\\\\\\"Task description cannot be empty.\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    base = harness.intake.plan_task(initial_description)\\\\n    questions = harness.intake.generate_questions(initial_description, base.complexity)\\\\n    answers: dict[str, str] = {}\\\\n    for question in questions:\\\\n        suffix = f\\\\\\\" [{question.default}]\\\\\\\" if question.default else \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        response = input(f\\\\\\\"{question.prompt}{suffix}: \\\\\\\").strip()\\\\n        answers[question.key] = response or (question.default or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    intake = harness.intake.apply_answers(initial_description, answers)\\\\n    return harness.submit_intake(intake, priority=priority, working_dir=working_dir)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nasync def _main_async(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\n    harness = build_cli_harness()\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\"submit\\\\\\\":\\\\n        task = harness.submit_task(\\\\n            args.description,\\\\n            title=args.title,\\\\n            goal=args.goal,\\\\n            verify_cmd=args.verify_cmd,\\\\n            priority=args.priority,\\\\n            working_dir=args.working_dir,\\\\n        )\\\\n        print(task.task_id)\\\\n        return 0\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\"chat\\\\\\\":\\\\n        task = _run_chat_submission(harness, args.description, args.priority, args.working_dir)\\\\n        print(json.dumps({\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\": task.task_id, \\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\": task.title}, ensure_ascii=False))\\\\n        return 0\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\"run-once\\\\\\\":\\\\n        task = await harness.run_once()\\\\n        print(task.task_id if task else \\\\\\\"idle\\\\\\\")\\\\n        return 0\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\":\\\\n        for item in harness.status_report():\\\\n            print(json.dumps(item, ensure_ascii=False))\\\\n        return 0\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\"inspect\\\\\\\":\\\\n        print(json.dumps(harness.inspect_task(args.task_id), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\\\\n        return 0\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\"pause\\\\\\\":\\\\n        harness.pause_task(args.task_id)\\\\n        print(args.task_id)\\\\n        return 0\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\"resume\\\\\\\":\\\\n        harness.resume_task(args.task_id)\\\\n        print(args.task_id)\\\\n        return 0\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\"quota\\\\\\\":\\\\n        for item in harness.quota_report():\\\\n            print(json.dumps(item, ensure_ascii=False))\\\\n        return 0\\\\n    return 1\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef main() -> None:\\\\n    parser = build_parser()\\\\n    args = parser.parse_args()\\\\n    raise SystemExit(asyncio.run(_main_async(args)))\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nif __name__ == \\\\\\\"__main__\\\\\\\":\\\\n    main()\\\\n\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":0,\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.started\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_9\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,320p' models/quota_manager.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":null,\\\"status\\\":\\\"in_progress\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.completed\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_9\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,320p' models/quota_manager.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\nUnified Quota Manager for Google (Antigravity) and Codex accounts.\\\\n\\\\nSmart switching algorithm \\u2014 optimizes for:\\\\n1. WASTE PREVENTION: Use quota before it expires (don't let resets waste unused quota)\\\\n2. TASK SAFETY: Ensure >40% remaining when starting new tasks\\\\n3. CONTINUITY: Avoid unnecessary switching (anti-thrash)\\\\n\\\\nUnified scoring formula per account:\\\\n  score = remaining + waste_urgency + safety_bonus + inertia\\\\n\\\\nWhere:\\\\n  - remaining: current remaining % (0-100)\\\\n  - waste_urgency: remaining \\u00d7 (WASTE_WINDOW - hours_to_reset) / WASTE_WINDOW\\\\n    \\u2192 Boosts accounts with quota about to be lost on reset\\\\n  - safety_bonus: +15 if remaining > 40% (enough for a full task)\\\\n  - inertia: +5 for current account (avoid switching for marginal gains)\\\\n\\\\nSwitch when best candidate's score exceeds current by > 10 points.\\\\n\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\n\\\\nimport json\\\\nimport time\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\\\\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta\\\\nfrom enum import Enum\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\\\\n\\\\nfrom models.codex.account import load_account as load_codex_account\\\\nfrom models.codex.account import list_accounts as list_codex_accounts\\\\nfrom models.codex.account import set_active_account as set_active_codex_account\\\\nfrom models.codex.account import get_active_email as get_active_codex_email\\\\nfrom models.codex.quota import fetch_quota as fetch_codex_quota\\\\nfrom models.google.account import load_account as load_google_account\\\\nfrom models.google.account import list_accounts as list_google_accounts_fn\\\\nfrom models.google.account import set_active_account as set_active_google_account\\\\nfrom models.google.account import get_active_email as get_active_google_email\\\\nfrom models.google.account import save_account as save_google_account\\\\nfrom models.google.oauth import ensure_fresh_token as ensure_fresh_google_token\\\\nfrom models.google.quota import fetch_account_quota as fetch_google_quota\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass Provider(str, Enum):\\\\n    CODEX = \\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\"\\\\n    GOOGLE = \\\\\\\"google\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\n@dataclass\\\\nclass QuotaSnapshot:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Point-in-time quota snapshot for an account.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    provider: Provider\\\\n    email: str\\\\n    account_id: str\\\\n    plan_type: str\\\\n    used_percent: int\\\\n    reset_at: int                    # Unix timestamp\\\\n    reset_at_readable: str           # Human-readable\\\\n    time_until_reset_hours: float\\\\n\\\\n    @property\\\\n    def remaining_percent(self) -> int:\\\\n        return max(0, 100 - self.used_percent)\\\\n\\\\n    @property\\\\n    def is_exhausted(self) -> bool:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"True if quota is essentially depleted (>= 95%).\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        return self.used_percent >= 95\\\\n\\\\n    @property\\\\n    def is_fresh(self) -> bool:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"True if just reset or will reset very soon.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        return self.remaining_percent >= 90 or self.time_until_reset_hours < 0.5\\\\n\\\\n    def __str__(self) -> str:\\\\n        return (\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"{self.email:<40} {self.plan_type:<6} \\\\\\\"\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"[{self.used_percent:>3}%] \\\\\\\"\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"{self.time_until_reset_hours:>5.1f}h\\\\\\\"\\\\n        )\\\\n\\\\n\\\\n@dataclass\\\\nclass SwitchDecision:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Result of quota analysis and switching decision.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    should_switch: bool\\\\n    reason: str\\\\n    target_email: Optional[str]\\\\n    target_remaining: Optional[int]\\\\n    current_email: Optional[str]\\\\n    current_remaining: Optional[int]\\\\n\\\\n    def __str__(self) -> str:\\\\n        if not self.should_switch:\\\\n            return f\\\\\\\"STAY on {self.current_email} ({self.current_remaining}% remaining) - {self.reason}\\\\\\\"\\\\n        return (\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"SWITCH {self.current_email} \\u2192 {self.target_email} \\\\\\\"\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"({self.current_remaining}% \\u2192 {self.target_remaining}%) - {self.reason}\\\\\\\"\\\\n        )\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass QuotaManager:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    Intelligent quota manager for multi-provider, multi-account systems.\\\\n\\\\n    Optimizes for three goals (in priority order):\\\\n    1. WASTE PREVENTION \\u2014 Use quota before it resets (don't lose unused quota)\\\\n    2. TASK SAFETY \\u2014 Prefer accounts with >40% for new tasks\\\\n    3. CONTINUITY \\u2014 Avoid unnecessary mid-session switching\\\\n\\\\n    Uses a unified scoring formula:\\\\n      score = remaining + waste_urgency + safety_bonus + inertia\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    TASK_SAFETY_THRESHOLD = 40              # Prefer accounts > 40% for new tasks\\\\n    FRESH_QUOTA_THRESHOLD = 90              # Consider \\\\\\\"fresh\\\\\\\" if >= 90%\\\\n    WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS = 6                  # Boost accounts resetting within 6h\\\\n    SAFETY_BONUS = 15                       # Score bonus for accounts > 40%\\\\n    INERTIA_BONUS = 5                       # Score bonus for staying on current\\\\n    HEALTHY_INERTIA = 20                    # Extra inertia when current is healthy (>40%)\\\\n    SWITCH_THRESHOLD = 10                   # Minimum score improvement to switch\\\\n\\\\n    def __init__(self, check_interval_minutes: int = 60):\\\\n        self.check_interval_minutes = check_interval_minutes\\\\n        self.last_check_time = 0\\\\n        self.account_reset_times: dict[str, int] = {}  # email -> reset_at timestamp\\\\n        self.last_switch_time = 0\\\\n        self.state_file = Path.home() / \\\\\\\".codex\\\\\\\" / \\\\\\\"quota_manager_state.json\\\\\\\"\\\\n        self._load_state()\\\\n\\\\n    def _load_state(self) -> None:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Load persistent state (reset times).\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        if self.state_file.exists():\\\\n            try:\\\\n                with open(self.state_file) as f:\\\\n                    data = json.load(f)\\\\n                self.account_reset_times = {k: int(v) for k, v in data.get(\\\\\\\"reset_times\\\\\\\", {}).items()}\\\\n            except Exception:\\\\n                self.account_reset_times = {}\\\\n\\\\n    def _save_state(self) -> None:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Save persistent state.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        self.state_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\n        with open(self.state_file, \\\\\\\"w\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\n            json.dump(\\\\n                {\\\\\\\"reset_times\\\\\\\": self.account_reset_times},\\\\n                f,\\\\n                indent=2,\\\\n            )\\\\n\\\\n    def fetch_all_quotas(self) -> list[QuotaSnapshot]:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Fetch quota for all accounts (both providers).\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        snapshots: list[QuotaSnapshot] = []\\\\n        now = int(time.time())\\\\n\\\\n        # Codex accounts\\\\n        try:\\\\n            for email in list_codex_accounts():\\\\n                try:\\\\n                    account = load_codex_account(email)\\\\n                    quota = fetch_codex_quota(account.access_token, account.account_id)\\\\n                    reset_at = quota.weekly_reset_at\\\\n                    time_until_reset = (reset_at - now) / 3600.0  # hours\\\\n\\\\n                    snapshot = QuotaSnapshot(\\\\n                        provider=Provider.CODEX,\\\\n                        email=account.email,\\\\n                        account_id=account.account_id,\\\\n                        plan_type=quota.plan_type or \\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\",\\\\n                        used_percent=quota.weekly_used_percent,\\\\n                        reset_at=reset_at,\\\\n                        reset_at_readable=datetime.fromtimestamp(reset_at).strftime(\\\\\\\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\\\\\\\"),\\\\n                        time_until_reset_hours=time_until_reset,\\\\n                    )\\\\n                    snapshots.append(snapshot)\\\\n                    self.account_reset_times[account.email] = reset_at\\\\n                except Exception as e:\\\\n                    print(f\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to fetch Codex quota for {email}: {e}\\\\\\\")\\\\n        except Exception as e:\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to load Codex accounts: {e}\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n        # Google accounts\\\\n        try:\\\\n            accounts = list_google_accounts_fn()\\\\n            # Google's list_accounts returns Account objects directly\\\\n            for account in accounts:\\\\n                try:\\\\n                    # Refresh token if expired\\\\n                    account.token = ensure_fresh_google_token(account.token)\\\\n                    save_google_account(account)\\\\n                    quota, _ = fetch_google_quota(account.token.access_token, account.project_id)\\\\n                    # Google quotas are per-model, find the max usage\\\\n                    max_used_percent = 0\\\\n                    max_reset_at = 0\\\\n                    for model_quota in quota.models:\\\\n                        used = 100 - (model_quota.percentage or 0)\\\\n                        if used > max_used_percent:\\\\n                            max_used_percent = used\\\\n                        if model_quota.reset_time:\\\\n                            try:\\\\n                                reset_ts = int(datetime.fromisoformat(\\\\n                                    model_quota.reset_time.replace(\\\\\\\"Z\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"+00:00\\\\\\\")\\\\n                                ).timestamp())\\\\n                                if reset_ts > max_reset_at:\\\\n                                    max_reset_at = reset_ts\\\\n                            except Exception:\\\\n                                pass\\\\n\\\\n                    if max_reset_at == 0:\\\\n                        max_reset_at = now + 86400  # Default 24h if unknown\\\\n\\\\n                    time_until_reset = (max_reset_at - now) / 3600.0\\\\n\\\\n                    snapshot = QuotaSnapshot(\\\\n                        provider=Provider.GOOGLE,\\\\n                        email=account.email,\\\\n                        account_id=account.project_id or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n                        plan_type=quota.subscription_tier or \\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\",\\\\n                        used_percent=max_used_percent,\\\\n                        reset_at=max_reset_at,\\\\n                        reset_at_readable=datetime.fromtimestamp(max_reset_at).strftime(\\\\\\\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\\\\\\\"),\\\\n                        time_until_reset_hours=time_until_reset,\\\\n                    )\\\\n                    snapshots.append(snapshot)\\\\n                    self.account_reset_times[account.email] = max_reset_at\\\\n                except Exception as e:\\\\n                    print(f\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to fetch Google quota for {account.email}: {e}\\\\\\\")\\\\n        except Exception as e:\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to load Google accounts: {e}\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n        self._save_state()\\\\n        return sorted(snapshots, key=lambda s: (-s.remaining_percent, s.time_until_reset_hours))\\\\n\\\\n    def _score_account(self, snapshot: QuotaSnapshot, is_current: bool = False) -> float:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        Unified scoring formula for an account.\\\\n\\\\n        score = remaining + waste_urgency + safety_bonus + inertia\\\\n\\\\n        Components:\\\\n        - remaining: base value (0-100)\\\\n        - waste_urgency: boosts accounts with quota about to expire\\\\n          = remaining \\u00d7 (WASTE_WINDOW - hours_to_reset) / WASTE_WINDOW\\\\n          Only applies when hours_to_reset < WASTE_WINDOW\\\\n        - safety_bonus: +15 for accounts with >40% (can sustain a full task)\\\\n        - inertia: +5 for current account (anti-thrash)\\\\n\\\\n        Examples:\\\\n        - Account A: 50% remaining, 2h until reset, current\\\\n          \\u2192 50 + 50*(6-2)/6 + 15 + 5 = 50 + 33.3 + 15 + 5 = 103.3\\\\n        - Account B: 80% remaining, 120h until reset, not current\\\\n          \\u2192 80 + 0 + 15 + 0 = 95\\\\n        - Account C: 20% remaining, 1h until reset, not current\\\\n          \\u2192 20 + 20*(6-1)/6 + 0 + 0 = 20 + 16.7 + 0 = 36.7\\\\n        \\u2192 Switch to A (use its 50% before reset), even though B has more remaining\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        remaining = snapshot.remaining_percent\\\\n\\\\n        # Waste urgency: boost accounts with quota about to be lost on reset\\\\n        waste_urgency = 0.0\\\\n        hours = snapshot.time_until_reset_hours\\\\n        if 0 < hours <= self.WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS and remaining > 0:\\\\n            waste_urgency = remaining * (self.WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS - hours) / self.WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS\\\\n\\\\n        # Safety bonus: prefer accounts that can sustain a full task\\\\n        safety = self.SAFETY_BONUS if remaining > self.TASK_SAFETY_THRESHOLD else 0\\\\n\\\\n        # Inertia: preference for staying on current account\\\\n        # Extra inertia when healthy \\u2014 don't switch between two good accounts\\\\n        inertia = 0\\\\n        if is_current:\\\\n            inertia = self.INERTIA_BONUS\\\\n            if remaining > self.TASK_SAFETY_THRESHOLD:\\\\n                inertia += self.HEALTHY_INERTIA\\\\n\\\\n        return remaining + waste_urgency + safety + inertia\\\\n\\\\n    def _is_fresh_reset(self, snapshot: QuotaSnapshot) -> bool:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Check if account just reset or is in immediate post-reset window.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        return snapshot.remaining_percent >= self.FRESH_QUOTA_THRESHOLD\\\\n\\\\n    def analyze_and_decide(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        current_email: str,\\\\n        current_snapshot: Optional[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\n        all_snapshots: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\n    ) -> SwitchDecision:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        Analyze quota situation and decide whether to switch accounts.\\\\n\\\\n        Uses unified scoring that balances:\\\\n        1. Waste prevention (use expiring quota before it's lost)\\\\n        2. Task safety (prefer >40% for new tasks)\\\\n        3. Continuity (inertia for current account)\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        if not current_snapshot:\\\\n            # No current account info \\u2014 pick the best available\\\\n            if all_snapshots:\\\\n                scored = [(s, self._score_account(s)) for s in all_snapshots]\\\\n                best, best_score = max(scored, key=lambda x: x[1])\\\\n                return SwitchDecision(\\\\n                    should_switch=True,\\\\n                    reason=f\\\\\\\"No current account \\u2014 selecting best (score {best_score:.0f})\\\\\\\",\\\\n                    target_email=best.email,\\\\n                    target_remaining=best.remaining_percent,\\\\n                    current_email=current_email,\\\\n                    current_remaining=None,\\\\n                )\\\\n            return SwitchDecision(\\\\n                should_switch=False,\\\\n                reason=\\\\\\\"No account quota available\\\\\\\",\\\\n                target_email=None,\\\\n                target_remaining=None,\\\\n                current_email=current_email,\\\\n                current_remaining=None,\\\\n            )\\\\n\\\\n        # Score current account\\\\n\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":0,\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.started\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_10\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,280p' models/codex/quota.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":null,\\\"status\\\":\\\"in_progress\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.completed\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_10\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,280p' models/codex/quota.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"from __future__ import annotations\\\\n\\\\nimport json\\\\nimport urllib.error\\\\nimport urllib.request\\\\nfrom concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\\\\nfrom typing import Any, List\\\\n\\\\nfrom .account import CodexAccount\\\\n\\\\nUSAGE_URL = \\\\\\\"https://chatgpt.com/backend-api/wham/usage\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass QuotaError(RuntimeError):\\\\n    def __init__(self, message: str, status_code: int | None = None) -> None:\\\\n        super().__init__(message)\\\\n        self.status_code = status_code\\\\n\\\\n\\\\n@dataclass\\\\nclass CodexQuota:\\\\n    email: str\\\\n    plan_type: str\\\\n    weekly_used_percent: int\\\\n    weekly_reset_at: int\\\\n    weekly_limit_reached: bool\\\\n    burst_used_percent: int\\\\n    burst_reset_at: int\\\\n    code_review_used_percent: int\\\\n    code_review_reset_at: int\\\\n    raw: dict | None = None\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _get_int(value: Any, default: int = 0) -> int:\\\\n    try:\\\\n        return int(value)\\\\n    except (TypeError, ValueError):\\\\n        return default\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef fetch_quota(access_token: str, account_id: str) -> CodexQuota:\\\\n    req = urllib.request.Request(USAGE_URL, method=\\\\\\\"GET\\\\\\\")\\\\n    req.add_header(\\\\\\\"Authorization\\\\\\\", f\\\\\\\"Bearer {access_token}\\\\\\\")\\\\n    if account_id:\\\\n        req.add_header(\\\\\\\"ChatGPT-Account-Id\\\\\\\", account_id)\\\\n    req.add_header(\\\\\\\"User-Agent\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"CodexBar\\\\\\\")\\\\n    req.add_header(\\\\\\\"Accept\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"application/json\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    try:\\\\n        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=20) as resp:\\\\n            payload = resp.read().decode(\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\")\\\\n    except urllib.error.HTTPError as exc:\\\\n        body = exc.read().decode(\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\", errors=\\\\\\\"ignore\\\\\\\")\\\\n        raise QuotaError(f\\\\\\\"Quota fetch failed: HTTP {exc.code} {body}\\\\\\\", status_code=exc.code) from exc\\\\n    except urllib.error.URLError as exc:\\\\n        raise QuotaError(f\\\\\\\"Quota fetch failed: {exc.reason}\\\\\\\") from exc\\\\n\\\\n    try:\\\\n        data = json.loads(payload)\\\\n    except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:\\\\n        raise QuotaError(\\\\\\\"Quota response was not valid JSON\\\\\\\") from exc\\\\n\\\\n    rate_limit = data.get(\\\\\\\"rate_limit\\\\\\\") or {}\\\\n    primary = rate_limit.get(\\\\\\\"primary_window\\\\\\\") or {}\\\\n    secondary = rate_limit.get(\\\\\\\"secondary_window\\\\\\\") or {}\\\\n\\\\n    code_review = data.get(\\\\\\\"code_review_rate_limit\\\\\\\") or {}\\\\n    code_primary = code_review.get(\\\\\\\"primary_window\\\\\\\") or {}\\\\n\\\\n    return CodexQuota(\\\\n        email=data.get(\\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n        plan_type=data.get(\\\\\\\"plan_type\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\",\\\\n        weekly_used_percent=_get_int(primary.get(\\\\\\\"used_percent\\\\\\\")),\\\\n        weekly_reset_at=_get_int(primary.get(\\\\\\\"reset_at\\\\\\\")),\\\\n        weekly_limit_reached=bool(rate_limit.get(\\\\\\\"limit_reached\\\\\\\", False)),\\\\n        burst_used_percent=_get_int(secondary.get(\\\\\\\"used_percent\\\\\\\")),\\\\n        burst_reset_at=_get_int(secondary.get(\\\\\\\"reset_at\\\\\\\")),\\\\n        code_review_used_percent=_get_int(code_primary.get(\\\\\\\"used_percent\\\\\\\")),\\\\n        code_review_reset_at=_get_int(code_primary.get(\\\\\\\"reset_at\\\\\\\")),\\\\n        raw=data,\\\\n    )\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef fetch_all_quotas(accounts: List[CodexAccount]) -> List[CodexQuota]:\\\\n    if not accounts:\\\\n        return []\\\\n\\\\n    results: List[CodexQuota] = []\\\\n    errors = []\\\\n\\\\n    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=min(8, len(accounts))) as executor:\\\\n        futures = {\\\\n            executor.submit(fetch_quota, account.access_token, account.account_id): account\\\\n            for account in accounts\\\\n        }\\\\n        for future in as_completed(futures):\\\\n            account = futures[future]\\\\n            try:\\\\n                results.append(future.result())\\\\n            except Exception as exc:  # pragma: no cover - pass-through\\\\n                errors.append((account.email, exc))\\\\n\\\\n    if errors:\\\\n        details = \\\\\\\"; \\\\\\\".join(f\\\\\\\"{email}: {exc}\\\\\\\" for email, exc in errors)\\\\n        raise QuotaError(f\\\\\\\"Failed to fetch quota for some accounts: {details}\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    return -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,340p' harness/stage_executor.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"CLI-backed stage execution.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\n\\\\nimport asyncio\\\\nimport json\\\\nimport subprocess\\\\nimport time\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\nfrom typing import Awaitable, Callable, Optional\\\\n\\\\nfrom config import settings\\\\nfrom harness.chat2api_client import Chat2APIClient\\\\nfrom harness.models import PermissionDecision, StageExecutionResult, StageRecord, StageStatus\\\\nfrom harness.permission_gate import PermissionGate\\\\n\\\\n\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\nclass CommandExecution:\\\\n    returncode: int\\\\n    stdout: str\\\\n    stderr: str\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nRunner = Callable[[list[str], str], Awaitable[CommandExecution]]\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass StageExecutionError(RuntimeError):\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Base stage execution error.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass QuotaExhaustedError(StageExecutionError):\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Raised when the underlying provider reports quota exhaustion.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def __init__(self, provider: str, message: str, partial_output: str = \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\") -> None:\\\\n        super().__init__(message)\\\\n        self.provider = provider\\\\n        self.partial_output = partial_output\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass PermissionBlockedError(StageExecutionError):\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Raised when an action is blocked by the permission gate.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def __init__(self, command: str, decision: PermissionDecision) -> None:\\\\n        super().__init__(decision.reason)\\\\n        self.command = command\\\\n        self.decision = decision\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass StageExecutor:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Execute planned stages via CLI backends or lightweight API calls.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    APPROVED_DECISIONS = {\\\\\\\"auto_approved\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"model_approved\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"user_approved\\\\\\\"}\\\\n\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        chat_client: Optional[Chat2APIClient] = None,\\\\n        permission_gate: Optional[PermissionGate] = None,\\\\n        runner: Optional[Runner] = None,\\\\n        codex_tier: str = settings.CODEX_TIER,\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\n        self.chat_client = chat_client or Chat2APIClient()\\\\n        self.permission_gate = permission_gate or PermissionGate()\\\\n        self.runner = runner or self._run_command\\\\n        self.codex_tier = codex_tier\\\\n\\\\n    async def execute(self, stage: StageRecord, handoff_doc_path: str, working_dir: str | None) -> StageExecutionResult:\\\\n        started_at = time.time()\\\\n        prompt = Path(handoff_doc_path).read_text(encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\")\\\\n        provider = stage.assigned_provider or self._infer_provider(stage.assigned_model or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\")\\\\n        cwd = working_dir or \\\\\\\".\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\"chat2api\\\\\\\":\\\\n            raw_output = await asyncio.to_thread(\\\\n                self.chat_client.chat,\\\\n                model=stage.assigned_model or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n                prompt=prompt,\\\\n            )\\\\n            duration = time.time() - started_at\\\\n            return StageExecutionResult(\\\\n                stage_id=stage.stage_id,\\\\n                status=StageStatus.DONE,\\\\n                raw_output=raw_output,\\\\n                summary=self._summarize(raw_output),\\\\n                duration_sec=duration,\\\\n            )\\\\n\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\":\\\\n            return await self._run_github_ops(stage, prompt, cwd, started_at)\\\\n\\\\n        command = self.build_command(stage, prompt, cwd)\\\\n        completed = await self._run_checked_command(\\\\n            command,\\\\n            cwd,\\\\n            context=f\\\\\\\"stage={stage.stage_type} role={stage.model_role}\\\\\\\",\\\\n        )\\\\n        combined_output = completed.stdout.strip() or completed.stderr.strip()\\\\n\\\\n        if self._looks_like_quota_exhaustion(completed.stdout, completed.stderr):\\\\n            raise QuotaExhaustedError(provider or \\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\", combined_output, partial_output=completed.stdout)\\\\n        if completed.returncode != 0:\\\\n            raise StageExecutionError(combined_output or f\\\\\\\"Stage failed with exit code {completed.returncode}\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n        duration = time.time() - started_at\\\\n        files_changed = self._list_changed_files(cwd)\\\\n        raw_output = self._normalize_output(completed.stdout, stage.assigned_provider)\\\\n        return StageExecutionResult(\\\\n            stage_id=stage.stage_id,\\\\n            status=StageStatus.DONE,\\\\n            raw_output=raw_output,\\\\n            summary=self._summarize(raw_output),\\\\n            files_changed=files_changed,\\\\n            duration_sec=duration,\\\\n        )\\\\n\\\\n    def build_command(self, stage: StageRecord, prompt: str, working_dir: str) -> list[str]:\\\\n        provider = stage.assigned_provider or self._infer_provider(stage.assigned_model or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\")\\\\n        model = stage.assigned_model or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\"claude\\\\\\\":\\\\n            return [\\\\n                \\\\\\\"claude\\\\\\\",\\\\n                \\\\\\\"-p\\\\\\\",\\\\n                \\\\\\\"--output-format\\\\\\\",\\\\n                \\\\\\\"stream-json\\\\\\\",\\\\n                \\\\\\\"--model\\\\\\\",\\\\n                model,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"--allowedTools\\\\\\\",\\\\n                \\\\\\\"Edit,Read,Bash,Grep,Glob,Write\\\\\\\",\\\\n                prompt,\\\\n            ]\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\":\\\\n            cmd = [\\\\n                \\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\",\\\\n                \\\\\\\"exec\\\\\\\",\\\\n                \\\\\\\"--json\\\\\\\",\\\\n                \\\\\\\"-C\\\\\\\",\\\\n                working_dir,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"--full-auto\\\\\\\",\\\\n                prompt,\\\\n            ]\\\\n            return cmd\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\"google\\\\\\\":\\\\n            return [\\\\n                \\\\\\\"gemini\\\\\\\",\\\\n                \\\\\\\"--model\\\\\\\",\\\\n                model,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"-p\\\\\\\",\\\\n                prompt,\\\\n            ]\\\\n        raise StageExecutionError(f\\\\\\\"Unsupported provider for CLI execution: {provider}\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    async def run_verify_cmd(self, verify_cmd: str, working_dir: str | None) -> CommandExecution:\\\\n        return await self._run_checked_command(\\\\n            [\\\\\\\"bash\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"-lc\\\\\\\", verify_cmd],\\\\n            working_dir or \\\\\\\".\\\\\\\",\\\\n            context=\\\\\\\"verification command\\\\\\\",\\\\n            display_command=verify_cmd,\\\\n        )\\\\n\\\\n    async def _run_github_ops(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        prompt: str,\\\\n        working_dir: str,\\\\n        started_at: float,\\\\n    ) -> StageExecutionResult:\\\\n        commands = [str(item) for item in stage.metadata.get(\\\\\\\"commands\\\\\\\", [])]\\\\n        if not commands:\\\\n            summary = \\\\\\\"GitHub stage had no commands configured.\\\\\\\"\\\\n            return StageExecutionResult(\\\\n                stage_id=stage.stage_id,\\\\n                status=StageStatus.DONE,\\\\n                raw_output=summary,\\\\n                summary=summary,\\\\n                duration_sec=time.time() - started_at,\\\\n            )\\\\n\\\\n        outputs: list[str] = []\\\\n        for raw_command in commands:\\\\n            rendered = raw_command.format(\\\\n                summary=stage.result_summary or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n                stage_type=stage.stage_type,\\\\n                working_dir=working_dir,\\\\n                prompt=prompt,\\\\n            )\\\\n            completed = await self._run_checked_command(\\\\n                [\\\\\\\"bash\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"-lc\\\\\\\", rendered],\\\\n                working_dir,\\\\n                context=f\\\\\\\"github_ops stage={stage.stage_type}\\\\\\\",\\\\n                display_command=rendered,\\\\n            )\\\\n            if completed.returncode != 0:\\\\n                raise StageExecutionError(completed.stderr.strip() or completed.stdout.strip() or rendered)\\\\n            output = completed.stdout.strip() or completed.stderr.strip() or f\\\\\\\"Executed: {rendered}\\\\\\\"\\\\n            outputs.append(output)\\\\n\\\\n        raw_output = \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\".join(outputs).strip()\\\\n        return StageExecutionResult(\\\\n            stage_id=stage.stage_id,\\\\n            status=StageStatus.DONE,\\\\n            raw_output=raw_output,\\\\n            summary=self._summarize(raw_output),\\\\n            files_changed=self._list_changed_files(working_dir),\\\\n            duration_sec=time.time() - started_at,\\\\n        )\\\\n\\\\n    async def _run_checked_command(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        command: list[str],\\\\n        cwd: str,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        context: str,\\\\n        display_command: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n    ) -> CommandExecution:\\\\n        command_text = display_command or self._display_command(command)\\\\n        decision = await self.permission_gate.decide(\\\\n            command_text,\\\\n            context=context,\\\\n            available_models=self._safe_list_available_models(),\\\\n        )\\\\n        if decision.decision not in self.APPROVED_DECISIONS:\\\\n            raise PermissionBlockedError(command_text, decision)\\\\n        return await self.runner(command, cwd)\\\\n\\\\n    async def _run_command(self, command: list[str], cwd: str) -> CommandExecution:\\\\n        process = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(\\\\n            *command,\\\\n            cwd=cwd,\\\\n            stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,\\\\n            stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,\\\\n        )\\\\n        stdout, stderr = await process.communicate()\\\\n        return CommandExecution(\\\\n            returncode=process.returncode,\\\\n            stdout=stdout.decode(\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\", errors=\\\\\\\"replace\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            stderr=stderr.decode(\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\", errors=\\\\\\\"replace\\\\\\\"),\\\\n        )\\\\n\\\\n    def _normalize_output(self, stdout: str, provider: Optional[str]) -> str:\\\\n        text = stdout.strip()\\\\n        if provider != \\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\" or not text:\\\\n            return text\\\\n        try:\\\\n            parsed = json.loads(text)\\\\n        except json.JSONDecodeError:\\\\n            return text\\\\n        if isinstance(parsed, dict):\\\\n            if \\\\\\\"output_text\\\\\\\" in parsed and isinstance(parsed[\\\\\\\"output_text\\\\\\\"], str):\\\\n                return parsed[\\\\\\\"output_text\\\\\\\"]\\\\n            if \\\\\\\"message\\\\\\\" in parsed and isinstance(parsed[\\\\\\\"message\\\\\\\"], str):\\\\n                return parsed[\\\\\\\"message\\\\\\\"]\\\\n        return text\\\\n\\\\n    def _summarize(self, text: str) -> str:\\\\n        cleaned = \\\\\\\" \\\\\\\".join(text.split())\\\\n        if len(cleaned) <= 280:\\\\n            return cleaned\\\\n        return cleaned[:277] + \\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def _infer_provider(self, model: str) -> str:\\\\n        if model.startswith(\\\\\\\"claude-\\\\\\\"):\\\\n            return \\\\\\\"claude\\\\\\\"\\\\n        if \\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\" in model:\\\\n            return \\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\"\\\\n        if model.startswith(\\\\\\\"gemini-\\\\\\\"):\\\\n            return \\\\\\\"google\\\\\\\"\\\\n        if model.startswith(\\\\\\\"gpt-4o\\\\\\\") or model.startswith(\\\\\\\"gpt-4.1\\\\\\\"):\\\\n            return \\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\"\\\\n        return \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def _looks_like_quota_exhaustion(self, stdout: str, stderr: str) -> bool:\\\\n        text = f\\\\\\\"{stdout}\\\\\\\\n{stderr}\\\\\\\".lower()\\\\n        return any(token in text for token in (\\\\\\\"rate limit\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"quota\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"limit reached\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"exhausted\\\\\\\"))\\\\n\\\\n    def _list_changed_files(self, working_dir: str) -> list[str]:\\\\n        try:\\\\n            completed = subprocess.run(\\\\n                [\\\\\\\"git\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"diff\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"--name-only\\\\\\\"],\\\\n                cwd=working_dir,\\\\n                capture_output=True,\\\\n                text=True,\\\\n                check=False,\\\\n            )\\\\n        except OSError:\\\\n            return []\\\\n        if completed.returncode != 0:\\\\n            return []\\\\n        return [line for line in completed.stdout.splitlines() if line.strip()]\\\\n\\\\n    def _safe_list_available_models(self) -> list[str] | None:\\\\n        try:\\\\n            return self.chat_client.list_models()\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n    def _display_command(self, command: list[str]) -> str:\\\\n        return subprocess.list2cmdline(command)\\\\n\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":0,\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.started\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_15\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash PENDING = \\\\\\\"pending\\\\\\\"\\\\n    PLANNING = \\\\\\\"planning\\\\\\\"\\\\n    EXECUTING = \\\\\\\"executing\\\\\\\"\\\\n    PAUSED_QUOTA = \\\\\\\"paused_quota\\\\\\\"\\\\n    PAUSED_PERMISSION = \\\\\\\"paused_permission\\\\\\\"\\\\n    DONE = \\\\\\\"done\\\\\\\"\\\\n    FAILED = \\\\\\\"failed\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass StageStatus(str, Enum):\\\\n    PENDING = \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\nclass PermissionDecision:\\\\n    risk_level: RiskLevel\\\\n    decision: str\\\\n    reason: str\\\\n    requires_voting: bool = False\\\\n -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/db.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"SQLite schema and connection helpers for the harness.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\n\\\\nimport sqlite3\\\\nfrom contextlib import contextmanager\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\nfrom typing import Iterator\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nSCHEMA = \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\nPRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;\\\\n\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks (\\\\n    task_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\n    title TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\n    description TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\n    goal TEXT,\\\\n    verify_cmd TEXT,\\\\n    complexity TEXT DEFAULT 'medium',\\\\n    priority INTEGER DEFAULT 50,\\\\n    status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending',\\\\n    working_dir TEXT,\\\\n    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\n    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL\\\\n);\\\\n\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stages (\\\\n    stage_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\n    task_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tasks(task_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\n    stage_type TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\n    stage_order INTEGER NOT NULL,\\\\n    model_role TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\n    assigned_model TEXT,\\\\n    assigned_provider TEXT,\\\\n    status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending',\\\\n    handoff_doc_path TEXT,\\\\n    result_summary TEXT,\\\\n    token_used INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\\\\n    duration_sec REAL DEFAULT 0,\\\\n    started_at TEXT,\\\\n    finished_at TEXT,\\\\n    retry_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\\\\n    verify_cmd TEXT,\\\\n    metadata TEXT DEFAULT '{}'\\\\n);\\\\n\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS permission_requests (\\\\n    request_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\n    stage_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stages(stage_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\n    action TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\n    context TEXT,\\\\n    risk_level TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\n    decision TEXT,\\\\n    voters TEXT DEFAULT '[]',\\\\n    decided_at TEXT\\\\n);\\\\n\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quota_events (\\\\n    event_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\n    provider TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\n    account_email TEXT,\\\\n    event_type TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\n    details TEXT DEFAULT '{}',\\\\n    created_at TEXT NOT NULL\\\\n);\\\\n\\\\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_status_priority\\\\n    ON tasks(status, priority DESC, created_at ASC);\\\\n\\\\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_stages_task_order\\\\n    ON stages(task_id, stage_order ASC);\\\\n\\\\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_stages_task_status\\\\n    ON stages(task_id, status, stage_order ASC);\\\\n\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass HarnessDB:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Small wrapper around a SQLite database file.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def __init__(self, db_path: str | Path) -> None:\\\\n        self.db_path = Path(db_path)\\\\n        self.db_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\n        self.initialize()\\\\n\\\\n    def initialize(self) -> None:\\\\n        with self.connect() as conn:\\\\n            conn.executescript(SCHEMA)\\\\n\\\\n    @contextmanager\\\\n    def connect(self) -> Iterator[sqlite3.Connection]:\\\\n        conn = sqlite3.connect(self.db_path)\\\\n        conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row\\\\n        conn.execute(\\\\\\\"PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON\\\\\\\")\\\\n        try:\\\\n            yield conn\\\\n            conn.commit()\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\n            conn.rollback()\\\\n            raise\\\\n        finally:\\\\n            conn.close()\\\\n\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":0,\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.started\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_17\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash
