-lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/task_queue.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"SQLite-backed task and stage queue.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\n\\\\nimport json\\\\nimport uuid\\\\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\\\\nfrom typing import Iterable, Optional\\\\n\\\\nfrom harness.db import HarnessDB\\\\nfrom harness.models import (\\\\n    PermissionRequestRecord,\\\\n    PlannedStage,\\\\n    QuotaEventRecord,\\\\n    RiskLevel,\\\\n    StageRecord,\\\\n    StageStatus,\\\\n    TaskRecord,\\\\n    TaskStatus,\\\\n)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef utcnow_iso() -> str:\\\\n    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat()\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass TaskQueue:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"CRUD layer for tasks, stages, and audit tables.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def __init__(self, db: HarnessDB) -> None:\\\\n        self.db = db\\\\n\\\\n    def create_task(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        title: str,\\\\n        description: str,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        goal: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n        verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n        complexity: str = \\\\\\\"medium\\\\\\\",\\\\n        priority: int = 50,\\\\n        status: TaskStatus = TaskStatus.PENDING,\\\\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n        task_id: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\\\\n        now = utcnow_iso()\\\\n        record = TaskRecord(\\\\n            task_id=task_id or uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\n            title=title,\\\\n            description=description,\\\\n            goal=goal,\\\\n            verify_cmd=verify_cmd,\\\\n            complexity=complexity,\\\\n            priority=priority,\\\\n            status=status,\\\\n            working_dir=working_dir,\\\\n            created_at=now,\\\\n            updated_at=now,\\\\n        )\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n                INSERT INTO tasks (\\\\n                    task_id, title, description, goal, verify_cmd, complexity,\\\\n                    priority, status, working_dir, created_at, updated_at\\\\n                ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n                (\\\\n                    record.task_id,\\\\n                    record.title,\\\\n                    record.description,\\\\n                    record.goal,\\\\n                    record.verify_cmd,\\\\n                    record.complexity,\\\\n                    record.priority,\\\\n                    record.status.value,\\\\n                    record.working_dir,\\\\n                    record.created_at,\\\\n                    record.updated_at,\\\\n                ),\\\\n            )\\\\n        return record\\\\n\\\\n    def get_task(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\n            row = conn.execute(\\\\\\\"SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\", (task_id,)).fetchone()\\\\n        return self._row_to_task(row) if row else None\\\\n\\\\n    def list_tasks(self, status: Optional[TaskStatus] = None) -> list[TaskRecord]:\\\\n        query = \\\\\\\"SELECT * FROM tasks\\\\\\\"\\\\n        params: tuple[object, ...] = ()\\\\n        if status is not None:\\\\n            query += \\\\\\\" WHERE status = ?\\\\\\\"\\\\n            params = (status.value,)\\\\n        query += \\\\\\\" ORDER BY priority DESC, created_at ASC\\\\\\\"\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\n            rows = conn.execute(query, params).fetchall()\\\\n        return [self._row_to_task(row) for row in rows]\\\\n\\\\n    def pick_next_runnable_task(self) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\n            row = conn.execute(\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n                SELECT * FROM tasks\\\\n                WHERE status IN (?, ?, ?)\\\\n                ORDER BY\\\\n                    CASE status\\\\n                        WHEN ? THEN 0\\\\n                        WHEN ? THEN 1\\\\n                        ELSE 2\\\\n                    END,\\\\n                    priority DESC,\\\\n                    created_at ASC\\\\n                LIMIT 1\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n                (\\\\n                    TaskStatus.EXECUTING.value,\\\\n                    TaskStatus.PENDING.value,\\\\n                    TaskStatus.PLANNING.value,\\\\n                    TaskStatus.EXECUTING.value,\\\\n                    TaskStatus.PENDING.value,\\\\n                ),\\\\n            ).fetchone()\\\\n        return self._row_to_task(row) if row else None\\\\n\\\\n    def update_task_status(self, task_id: str, status: TaskStatus) -> None:\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\n                \\\\\\\"UPDATE tasks SET status = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\",\\\\n                (status.value, utcnow_iso(), task_id),\\\\n            )\\\\n\\\\n    def update_task_working_dir(self, task_id: str, working_dir: str) -> None:\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\n                \\\\\\\"UPDATE tasks SET working_dir = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\",\\\\n                (working_dir, utcnow_iso(), task_id),\\\\n            )\\\\n\\\\n    def save_stages(self, task_id: str, stages: Iterable[PlannedStage]) -> list[StageRecord]:\\\\n        now = utcnow_iso()\\\\n        records: list[StageRecord] = []\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\n            for planned in stages:\\\\n                record = StageRecord(\\\\n                    stage_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\n                    task_id=task_id,\\\\n                    stage_type=planned.stage_type,\\\\n                    stage_order=planned.stage_order,\\\\n                    model_role=planned.model_role,\\\\n                    assigned_model=None,\\\\n                    assigned_provider=None,\\\\n                    status=StageStatus.PENDING,\\\\n                    handoff_doc_path=None,\\\\n                    result_summary=None,\\\\n                    token_used=0,\\\\n                    duration_sec=0.0,\\\\n                    started_at=None,\\\\n                    finished_at=None,\\\\n                    retry_count=0,\\\\n                    verify_cmd=planned.verify_cmd,\\\\n                    metadata=dict(planned.metadata),\\\\n                )\\\\n                conn.execute(\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n                    INSERT INTO stages (\\\\n                        stage_id, task_id, stage_type, stage_order, model_role,\\\\n                        assigned_model, assigned_provider, status, handoff_doc_path,\\\\n                        result_summary, token_used, duration_sec, started_at,\\\\n                        finished_at, retry_count, verify_cmd, metadata\\\\n                    ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n                    (\\\\n                        record.stage_id,\\\\n                        record.task_id,\\\\n                        record.stage_type,\\\\n                        record.stage_order,\\\\n                        record.model_role,\\\\n                        record.assigned_model,\\\\n                        record.assigned_provider,\\\\n                        record.status.value,\\\\n                        record.handoff_doc_path,\\\\n                        record.result_summary,\\\\n                        record.token_used,\\\\n                        record.duration_sec,\\\\n                        record.started_at,\\\\n                        record.finished_at,\\\\n                        record.retry_count,\\\\n                        record.verify_cmd,\\\\n                        json.dumps(record.metadata),\\\\n                    ),\\\\n                )\\\\n                records.append(record)\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\n                \\\\\\\"UPDATE tasks SET updated_at = ? WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\",\\\\n                (now, task_id),\\\\n            )\\\\n        return records\\\\n\\\\n    def count_stages(self, task_id: str) -> int:\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\n            row = conn.execute(\\\\\\\"SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM stages WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\", (task_id,)).fetchone()\\\\n        return int(row[\\\\\\\"count\\\\\\\"])\\\\n\\\\n    def get_stage(self, stage_id: str) -> Optional[StageRecord]:\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\n            row = conn.execute(\\\\\\\"SELECT * FROM stages WHERE stage_id = ?\\\\\\\", (stage_id,)).fetchone()\\\\n        return self._row_to_stage(row) if row else None\\\\n\\\\n    def list_stages(self, task_id: str) -> list[StageRecord]:\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\n            rows = conn.execute(\\\\n                \\\\\\\"SELECT * FROM stages WHERE task_id = ? ORDER BY stage_order ASC\\\\\\\",\\\\n                (task_id,),\\\\n            ).fetchall()\\\\n        return [self._row_to_stage(row) for row in rows]\\\\n\\\\n    def list_completed_stages(self, task_id: str) -> list[StageRecord]:\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\n            rows = conn.execute(\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n                SELECT * FROM stages\\\\n                WHERE task_id = ? AND status IN (?, ?)\\\\n                ORDER BY stage_order ASC\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n                (task_id, StageStatus.DONE.value, StageStatus.SKIPPED.value),\\\\n            ).fetchall()\\\\n        return [self._row_to_stage(row) for row in rows]\\\\n\\\\n    def next_pending_stage(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[StageRecord]:\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\n            row = conn.execute(\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n                SELECT * FROM stages\\\\n                WHERE task_id = ? AND status = ?\\\\n                ORDER BY stage_order ASC\\\\n                LIMIT 1\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n                (task_id, StageStatus.PENDING.value),\\\\n            ).fetchone()\\\\n        return self._row_to_stage(row) if row else None\\\\n\\\\n    def assign_stage_model(self, stage_id: str, model: str, provider: str) -> None:\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n                UPDATE stages\\\\n                SET assigned_model = ?, assigned_provider = ?\\\\n                WHERE stage_id = ?\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n                (model, provider, stage_id),\\\\n            )\\\\n\\\\n    def mark_stage_running(self, stage_id: str, handoff_doc_path: str) -> None:\\\\n        now = utcnow_iso()\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n                UPDATE stages\\\\n                SET status = ?, handoff_doc_path = ?, started_at = ?\\\\n                WHERE stage_id = ?\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n                (StageStatus.RUNNING.value, handoff_doc_path, now, stage_id),\\\\n            )\\\\n\\\\n    def complete_stage(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        stage_id: str,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        result_summary: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n        token_used: int = 0,\\\\n        duration_sec: float = 0.0,\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n                UPDATE stages\\\\n                SET status = ?, result_summary = ?, token_used = ?, duration_sec stage_id,\\\\n                ),\\\\n            )\\\\n\\\\n    def skip_stage(self, stage_id: str, *, result_summary: Optional[str] = None) -> None:\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n                UPDATE stages\\\\n                SET status = ?, result_summary = ?, finished_at = ?\\\\n                WHERE stage_id = ?\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n                (StageStatus.SKIPPED.value, result_summary, utcnow_iso(), stage_id),\\\\n            )\\\\n\\\\n    def reset_stage_to_pending(self, stage_id: str, *, retry_count: Optional[int] = None) -> None:\\\\n        query = \\\\\\\"UPDATE stages SET status = ?, started_at = NULL\\\\\\\"\\\\n        params: list[object] = [StageStatus.PENDING.value]\\\\n        if retry_count is not None:\\\\n            query += \\\\\\\", retry_count = ?\\\\\\\"\\\\n            params.append(retry_count)\\\\n        query += \\\\\\\" WHERE stage_id = ?\\\\\\\"\\\\n        params.append(stage_id)\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\n            conn.execute(query, tuple(params))\\\\n\\\\n    def DummyPermissionGate:\\\\n    def __init__(self, decision):\\\\n        self.decision = decision\\\\n\\\\n    async def decide(self, command, **kwargs):\\\\n        return self.decision\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass DummyVoting:\\\\n    def __init__(self, decision):\\\\n        self.decision = decision\\\\n\\\\n    async def vote(self, **kwargs):\\\\n        return self.decision\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nasync def _runner(command, cwd):\\\\n    return CommandExecution(returncode=0, stdout=\\\\\\\"ok\\\\\\\", stderr=\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef make_stage(provider: str, metadata=None) -> StageRecord:\\\\n    return StageRecord(\\\\n        stage_id=\\\\\\\"stage\\\\\\\",\\\\n        task_id=\\\\\\\"task\\\\\\\",\\\\n        stage_type=\\\\\\\"github_ops\\\\\\\" if provider == \\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\" else \\\\\\\"code\\\\\\\",\\\\n        stage_order=1,\\\\n        model_role=\\\\\\\"github_ops\\\\\\\" if provider == \\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\" else \\\\\\\"coder\\\\\\\",\\\\n        assigned_model=\\\\\\\"gpt-4o\\\\\\\" if provider == \\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\" else \\\\\\\"gpt-5.4-codex\\\\\\\",\\\\n        assigned_provider=provider,\\\\n finished_at=None,\\\\n        metadata=metadata or {},\\\\n    )\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef test_stage_executor_runs_github_commands(tmp_path) -> None:\\\\n    handoff = tmp_path / \\\\\\\"handoff.md\\\\\\\"\\\\n    handoff.write_text(\\\\\\\"hello\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\")\\\\n    executor = StageExecutor(\\\\n        permission_gate=DummyPermissionGate(\\\\n asyncio.run(\\\\n        executor.execute(\\\\n            make_stage(\\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\", {\\\\\\\"commands\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\"echo pushed\\\\\\\"]}),\\\\n            str(handoff),\\\\n            str(tmp_path),\\\\n        )\\\\n    )\\\\n\\\\n    assert result.status == StageStatus.DONE\\\\n    assert result.summary == \\\\\\\"ok\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef test_stage_executor_blocks_unapproved_command(tmp_path) -> None:\\\\n    handoff = tmp_path / \\\\\\\"handoff.md\\\\\\\"\\\\n    handoff.write_text(\\\\\\\"hello\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\")\\\\n    executor = StageExecutor(\\\\n        permission_gate=DummyPermissionGate(\\\\n            PermissionDecision(\\\\n                risk_level=RiskLevel.DANGEROUS,\\\\n                decision=\\\\\\\"needs_user_approval\\\\\\\",\\\\n                reason=\\\\\\\"blocked\\\\\\\",\\\\n            )\\\\n        ),\\\\n        runner=_runner,\\\\n    )\\\\n\\\\n    try:\\\\n        asyncio.run(executor.run_verify_cmd(\\\\\\\"git push origin main\\\\\\\", str(tmp_path)))\\\\n    except PermissionBlockedError as exc:\\\\n PermissionBlockedError\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef test_stage_executor_checks_raw_verify_command(tmp_path) -> None:\\\\n    from harness.models import ModelVote, VoteResult\\\\n\\\\n    async def user_approver(command: str, context: str):\\\\n        return False\\\\n\\\\n    executor = StageExecutor(\\\\n        permission_gate=PermissionGate(\\\\n            voting=DummyVoting(\\\\n reason=\\\\\\\"blocked\\\\\\\")],\\\\n                    unanimous=True,\\\\n                    needs_escalation=True,\\\\n                )\\\\n            ),\\\\n -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,240p' config/settings.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"import os\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _get_env(name: str, default: str) -> str:\\\\n    return os.environ.get(name, default)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _get_env_int(name: str, default: int) -> int:\\\\n    value = os.environ.get(name)\\\\n    if value is None:\\\\n        return default\\\\n    try:\\\\n        return int(value)\\\\n    except ValueError:\\\\n        return default\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _get_env_float(name: str, default: float) -> float:\\\\n    value = os.environ.get(name)\\\\n    if value is None:\\\\n        return default\\\\n    try:\\\\n        return float(value)\\\\n    except ValueError:\\\\n        return default\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _get_env_bool(name: str, default: bool) -> bool:\\\\n    value = os.environ.get(name)\\\\n    if value is None:\\\\n        return default\\\\n    return value.strip().lower() in {\\\\\\\"1\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"true\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"yes\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"on\\\\\\\"}\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nCLAUDE_PORT = _get_env_int(\\\\\\\"CLAUDE_PORT\\\\\\\", 8001)\\\\nCODEX_PORT = _get_env_int(\\\\\\\"CODEX_PORT\\\\\\\", 8002)\\\\nGEMINI_PORT = -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,320p' scripts/orchestra_cli.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"#!/usr/bin/env python3\\\\n\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Interactive CLI for running multi-agent orchestrator workflows.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\n\\\\nimport argparse\\\\nimport asyncio\\\\nimport json\\\\nimport logging\\\\nimport re\\\\nimport sys\\\\nimport time\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\n\\\\nimport uuid\\\\nimport yaml\\\\n\\\\n# Fix path to allow importing from the project root if run from anywhere\\\\nsys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).parent.parent.absolute()))\\\\n\\\\nfrom common.acp_client import ACPClient\\\\nfrom common.models import Message, MessagePart, RunStatus\\\\nfrom scripts.check_server_status import check_all_servers, StatusReport\\\\nfrom orchestrator.pipeline import PipelineDefinition, PipelineExecutor, PipelineError\\\\nfrom orchestrator.stage import StageDefinition, StageResult\\\\n\\\\n# Setup minimal logging, only warning+ so it doesn't clutter CLI\\\\nlogging.basicConfig(level=logging.WARNING, format=\\\\\\\"%(message)s\\\\\\\")\\\\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef hide_code_blocks(text: str) -> str:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Replaces markdown code blocks and diffs with a hidden placeholder.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    if not text:\\\\n        return \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    # Regex to match ```language \\\\\\\\n code... \\\\\\\\n ```\\\\n    pattern = re.compile(r\\\\\\\"```[a-zA-Z0-9_-]*\\\\\\\\n[\\\\\\\\s\\\\\\\\S]*?\\\\\\\\n```\\\\\\\", re.MULTILINE)\\\\n    return pattern.sub(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n```\\\\\\\\n[CODE DIFF/BLOCK HIDDEN]\\\\\\\\n```\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\", text)\\\\n    \\\\n\\\\nclass CLIExecutor(PipelineExecutor):\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Custom executor that streams updates to the CLI interface and routes to ACP services.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    \\\\n    def __init__(self, pipeline_def: PipelineDefinition, config_path: str):\\\\n        super().__init__(pipeline_def)\\\\n        self.session_id = uuid.uuid4().hex[:12]\\\\n        self.clients: dict[str, ACPClient] = {}\\\\n        \\\\n        with open(config_path, \\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\") as handle:\\\\n            data = yaml.safe_load(handle) or {}\\\\n            for name, info in data.get(\\\\\\\"agents\\\\\\\", {}).items():\\\\n                self.clients[name] = ACPClient(info[\\\\\\\"base_url\\\\\\\"])\\\\n                \\\\n    async def cleanup(self):\\\\n        import asyncio\\\\n        await asyncio.gather(*(client.close() for client in self.clients.values()), return_exceptions=True)\\\\n\\\\n    async def _invoke_model(self, stage_def: StageDefinition, prompt: str) -> str:\\\\n        agent_name = stage_def.metadata.get(\\\\\\\"agent\\\\\\\")\\\\n        if not agent_name:\\\\n            return await super()._invoke_model(stage_def, prompt)\\\\n            \\\\n        client = self.clients.get(agent_name)\\\\n        if not client:\\\\n            raise ValueError(f\\\\\\\"Unknown agent '{agent_name}' configured in metadata for stage {stage_def.stage_id}\\\\\\\")\\\\n            \\\\n        message = Message(\\\\n            role=\\\\\\\"user\\\\\\\",\\\\n            parts=[MessagePart(content=prompt)]\\\\n        )\\\\n        \\\\n        run = await client.create_run(agent_name, [message], session_id=self.session_id)\\\\n        if run.status != RunStatus.COMPLETED:\\\\n            raise RuntimeError(f\\\\\\\"Agent {agent_name} failed: {run.error}\\\\\\\")\\\\n            \\\\n        if not run.output_messages:\\\\n            return \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        return run.output_messages[0].text\\\\n    \\\\n    async def _execute_stage(self, stage_def: StageDefinition) -> StageResult:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Override to provide CLI feedback before and after the stage.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n========================================================\\\\\\\")\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\"\\ud83d\\udd04 CURRENT STEP: {stage_def.name} ({stage_def.stage_id})\\\\\\\")\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\"\\ud83e\\udd16 Agent Model:  {stage_def.model}\\\\\\\")\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\"========================================================\\\\\\\")\\\\n        \\\\n        # Prepare prompt to show user what is being asked\\\\n        prompt = self._prepare_prompt(stage_def)\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n[Input] -> Sending to Agent:\\\\\\\")\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\n        # We don't hide code blocks in prompt for context, but we can limit size\\\\n        short_prompt = prompt if len(prompt) < 1000 else prompt[:500] + \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n...[TRUNCATED FOR DISPLAY]...\\\\\\\" + prompt[-500:]\\\\n        print(short_prompt)\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\u23f3 Waiting for agent response...\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\")\\\\n        \\\\n        start_time = time.time()\\\\n        try:\\\\n            output = await self._invoke_model(stage_def, prompt)\\\\n            execution_time = time.time() - start_time\\\\n            \\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"\\u2705 Agent responded in {execution_time:.1f}s\\\\\\\")\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n[Output] <- Received from Agent:\\\\\\\")\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\n            \\\\n            # Hide code blocks for clean UI\\\\n            clean_output = hide_code_blocks(output)\\\\n            print(clean_output)\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\n            \\\\n            return StageResult(\\\\n                stage_id=stage_def.stage_id,\\\\n                status=\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\",\\\\n                output=output,\\\\n                raw_output=output,\\\\n                execution_time=execution_time,\\\\n                model_used=stage_def.model,\\\\n            )\\\\n            \\\\n        except Exception as exc:\\\\n            execution_time = time.time() - start_time\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"\\u274c Stage failed after {execution_time:.1f}s: {exc}\\\\\\\")\\\\n            raise  # Let the base class intercept it and handle fail_fast\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nasync def ensure_servers_running(config_path: str, timeout: float = 3.0) -> bool:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Check if required servers are healthy. Return True if all ok.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\"\\ud83d\\udd0d Checking ACP Server Status...\\\\\\\")\\\\n    report = await check_all_servers(config_path, timeout)\\\\n    if report.unhealthy_count == 0:\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\"\\u2705 All {report.total_servers} servers are healthy!\\\\\\\")\\\\n        return True\\\\n    \\\\n    print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\u274c SOME SERVERS ARE UNREACHABLE!\\\\\\\")\\\\n    for server in report.servers:\\\\n        if not server.healthy:\\\\n            err = f\\\\\\\" ({server.error})\\\\\\\" if server.error else \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"  - {server.base_url} is DOWN{err}\\\\\\\")\\\\n    \\\\n    print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nPlease start the required servers (e.g. using scripts/run_*_server.py).\\\\\\\")\\\\n    return False\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef get_available_workflows() -> list[Path]:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Return a list of workflow YAML files.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    workflows_dir = Path(__file__).parent.parent / \\\\\\\"workflows\\\\\\\"\\\\n    if not workflows_dir.exists():\\\\n        return []\\\\n    return sorted(workflows_dir.glob(\\\\\\\"*.yaml\\\\\\\"))\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nasync def main_async(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:\\\\n    # 1. Check Servers\\\\n    servers_ok = await ensure_servers_running(args.config, args.timeout)\\\\n    if not servers_ok:\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\n        \\\\n    print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\" + \\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\"*60)\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\"               ORCHESTRA MULTI-AGENT CLI\\\\\\\")\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\"*60 + \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\")\\\\n    \\\\n    # 2. Select Workflow\\\\n    workflows = get_available_workflows()\\\\n    if not workflows:\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"\\u274c No workflows found in the 'workflows/' directory.\\\\\\\")\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\n        \\\\n    workflow_path = None\\\\n    if args.workflow:\\\\n        workflow_path = Path(args.workflow)\\\\n        if not workflow_path.exists():\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"\\u274c Workflow {workflow_path} not found.\\\\\\\")\\\\n            sys.exit(1)\\\\n    else:\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"Available Workflows:\\\\\\\")\\\\n        for idx, wf in enumerate(workflows):\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"  [{idx + 1}] {wf.name}\\\\\\\")\\\\n            \\\\n        while True:\\\\n            try:\\\\n                choice = input(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nSelect a workflow (1-%d): \\\\\\\" % len(workflows))\\\\n                idx = int(choice.strip()) - 1\\\\n                if 0 <= idx < len(workflows):\\\\n                    workflow_path = workflows[idx]\\\\n                    break\\\\n                else:\\\\n                    print(\\\\\\\"Invalid choice.\\\\\\\")\\\\n            except ValueError:\\\\n                print(\\\\\\\"Please enter a number.\\\\\\\")\\\\n            except KeyboardInterrupt:\\\\n                print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nCanceled by user.\\\\\\\")\\\\n                sys.exit(0)\\\\n                \\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\u2705 Selected workflow: {workflow_path.name}\\\\\\\")\\\\n    \\\\n    # Load pipeline\\\\n    try:\\\\n        pipeline_def = PipelineDefinition(workflow_path)\\\\n    except PipelineError as e:\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\"\\u274c Failed to load pipeline: {e}\\\\\\\")\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\n        \\\\n    # 3. Get Task\\\\n    task_description = args.task\\\\n    if not task_description:\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nEnter task description (press Enter twice to finish):\\\\\\\")\\\\n        lines = []\\\\n        while True:\\\\n            try:\\\\n                line = input()\\\\n                if not line and (not lines or not lines[-1]):\\\\n                    break\\\\n                lines.append(line)\\\\n            except KeyboardInterrupt:\\\\n                print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nCanceled by user.\\\\\\\")\\\\n                sys.exit(0)\\\\n        task_description = \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\".join(lines).strip()\\\\n        \\\\n    if not task_description:\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"\\u274c Task description cannot be empty.\\\\\\\")\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\n\\\\n    # 4. Execute Pipeline\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\ud83d\\ude80 Starting Pipeline Execution...\\\\\\\")\\\\n    executor = CLIExecutor(pipeline_def, args.config)\\\\n    \\\\n    try:\\\\n        # Also map user_task so it's available for workflows explicitly requesting it\\\\n        initial_state = {\\\\\\\"user_task\\\\\\\": task_description}\\\\n        results = await executor.execute(task_description, initial_state=initial_state)\\\\n        \\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\" + \\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\"*60)\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"\\ud83c\\udf89 PIPELINE EXECUTION COMPLETED\\\\\\\")\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\"*60)\\\\n        for stage_id, result in results.items():\\\\n            icon = \\\\\\\"\\u2705\\\\\\\" if result.status == \\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\" else \\\\\\\"\\u274c\\\\\\\"\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"{icon} Stage '{stage_id}': {result.status.upper()} ({result.execution_time:.1f}s)\\\\\\\")\\\\n            \\\\n        # Check for absolute failure\\\\n        if any(r.status == \\\\\\\"failed\\\\\\\" for r in results.values()):\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\u274c Pipeline completed with ERRORS.\\\\\\\")\\\\n            sys.exit(1)\\\\n            \\\\n    except Exception as e:\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\u274c Pipeline execution failed due to an error: {e}\\\\\\\")\\\\n        import traceback\\\\n        traceback.print_exc()\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\n    finally:\\\\n        await executor.cleanup()\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef main() -> None:\\\\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\\\\\\\"Interactive Multi-Agent Orchestrator CLI\\\\\\\")\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--config\\\\\\\", default=\\\\\\\"config/agents.yaml\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Path to agents.yaml\\\\\\\")\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--timeout\\\\\\\", type=float, default=3.0, help=\\\\\\\"Per-server health check timeout in seconds\\\\\\\")\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--workflow\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Path to a specific workflow YAML, bypasses selection\\\\\\\")\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--task\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Initial task description, bypasses input dialog\\\\\\\")\\\\n    \\\\n    args = parser.parse_args()\\\\n    \\\\n    try:\\\\n        asyncio.run(main_async(args))\\\\n    except KeyboardInterrupt:\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nExiting CLI...\\\\\\\")\\\\n        sys.exit(0)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nif __name__ == \\\\\\\"__main__\\\\\\\":\\\\n    main()\\\\n\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":0,\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.started\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_24\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,220p' harness/handoff.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Handoff document generation and artifact storage.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\n\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\nfrom typing import Iterable\\\\n\\\\nfrom harness.models import StageExecutionResult, StageRecord, TaskRecord\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass HandoffProtocol:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Persist stage inputs and outputs as markdown artifacts.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def __init__(self, artifact_root: str | Path = \\\\\\\"artifacts\\\\\\\") -> None:\\\\n        self.artifact_root = Path(artifact_root)\\\\n        self.artifact_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\n\\\\n    def task_dir(self, task_id: str) -> Path:\\\\n        path = self.artifact_root / task_id\\\\n        path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\n        return path\\\\n\\\\n    def handoff_path(self, task: TaskRecord, stage: StageRecord) -> Path:\\\\n        return self.task_dir(task.task_id) / f\\\\\\\"{stage.stage_order:02d}_{stage.stage_type}_handoff.md\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def output_path(self, task: TaskRecord, stage: StageRecord) -> Path:\\\\n        return self.task_dir(task.task_id) / f\\\\\\\"{stage.stage_order:02d}_{stage.stage_type}_output.md\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def generate(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        previous_stages: Iterable[StageRecord],\\\\n    ) -> str:\\\\n        previous = list(previous_stages)\\\\n        previous_stage_name = previous[-1].stage_type if previous else \\\\\\\"bootstrap\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n        lines = [\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"# Handoff: {previous_stage_name} -> {stage.stage_type}\\\\\\\",\\\\n            \\\\\\\"## Task\\\\\\\",\\\\n            task.title,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n            \\\\\\\"## Description\\\\\\\",\\\\n            task.description,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n        ]\\\\n\\\\n        if task.goal:\\\\n            lines.extend([\\\\\\\"## Goal\\\\\\\", task.goal, \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"])\\\\n\\\\n        lines.extend(\\\\n            [\\\\n                \\\\\\\"## Context\\\\\\\",\\\\n                f\\\\\\\"- Complexity: {task.complexity}\\\\\\\",\\\\n                f\\\\\\\"- Current Stage: {stage.stage_type} ({stage.model_role})\\\\\\\",\\\\n                f\\\\\\\"- Working Directory: {task.working_dir or '.'}\\\\\\\",\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n            ]\\\\n        )\\\\n\\\\n        if previous:\\\\n            lines.append(\\\\\\\"## Previous Stage Output\\\\\\\")\\\\n            for previous_stage in previous:\\\\n                summary = previous_stage.result_summary or \\\\\\\"No summary recorded.\\\\\\\"\\\\n                lines.extend(\\\\n                    [\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\"### {previous_stage.stage_type}\\\\\\\",\\\\n                        summary.strip(),\\\\n                        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n                    ]\\\\n                )\\\\n\\\\n        lines.append(\\\\\\\"## Current Stage Instructions\\\\\\\")\\\\n        instruction = stage.metadata.get(\\\\\\\"instructions\\\\\\\") if stage.metadata else None\\\\n        if instruction:\\\\n            lines.append(str(instruction).strip())\\\\n        else:\\\\n            lines.append(\\\\n                f\\\\\\\"Complete the `{stage.stage_type}` stage for this task in `{task.working_dir or '.'}`.\\\\\\\"\\\\n            )\\\\n        lines.append(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n        verify_cmd = stage.verify_cmd or task.verify_cmd\\\\n        if verify_cmd:\\\\n            lines.extend([\\\\\\\"## Verification\\\\\\\", f\\\\\\\"Run: `{verify_cmd}`\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"])\\\\n\\\\n        return \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\".join(lines).rstrip() + \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def write_handoff(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        previous_stages: Iterable[StageRecord],\\\\n    ) -> Path:\\\\n        content = self.generate(task, stage, previous_stages)\\\\n        path = self.handoff_path(task, stage)\\\\n        path.write_text(content, encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\")\\\\n        return path\\\\n\\\\n    def save_stage_output(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        result: StageExecutionResult,\\\\n    ) -> Path:\\\\n        path = self.output_path(task, stage)\\\\n        lines = [\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"# Output: {stage.stage_type}\\\\\\\",\\\\n            \\\\\\\"## Summary\\\\\\\",\\\\n            result.summary or \\\\\\\"No summary generated.\\\\\\\",\\\\n            \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n        ]\\\\n        if result.files_changed:\\\\n            lines.append(\\\\\\\"## Files Changed\\\\\\\")\\\\n            lines.extend(f\\\\\\\"- {path_item}\\\\\\\" for path_item in result.files_changed)\\\\n            lines.append(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\")\\\\n        if result.raw_output:\\\\n            lines.extend([\\\\\\\"## Raw Output\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"```text\\\\\\\", result.raw_output.rstrip(), \\\\\\\"```\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"])\\\\n        path.write_text(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\".join(lines).rstrip() + \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\")\\\\n        return \\u5065\\u58ee\\u6027 for code-orchestra harness\\\\n\\\\n## Description\\\\nPhase 4: \\u5065\\u58ee\\u6027 for code-orchestra harness\\\\n\\\\n\\u5b9e\\u73b0\\u4ee5\\u4e0b\\u529f\\u80fd:\\\\n\\\\n1. Codex \\u591a\\u8d26\\u53f7\\u8f6e\\u6362\\u96c6\\u6210 \\u2014 QuotaRouter \\u5728\\u9009\\u62e9 codex \\u6a21\\u578b\\u65f6\\uff0c\\u81ea\\u52a8\\u8f6e\\u6362 5 \\u4e2a OAuth models/codex/account.py\\u3002\\\\n\\\\n2. orchestra daemon \\u540e\\u53f0\\u6a21\\u5f0f \\u2014 \\u65b0\\u589e daemon start/stop/status \\u5b50\\u547d\\u4ee4\\uff0c\\\\n   \\u4f7f\\u7528 systemd time\\\\nfrom concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed\\\\n\\\\nfrom . import account\\\\nfrom . import quota\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _format_bar(remaining_percent: int, width: int = 10) -> str:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Progress bar showing remaining quota (filled = remaining).\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    remaining_percent = max(0, min(100, int(remaining_percent)))\\\\n    filled = int(round(remaining_percent / 100 * width))\\\\n    filled = max(0, min(width, filled))\\\\n    return \\\\\\\"[\\\\\\\" + (\\\\\\\"\\u2588\\\\\\\" * filled) + (\\\\\\\"\\u2591\\\\\\\" * (width - filled)) + \\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _format_reset(reset_at: int) -> str:\\\\n    if not reset_at:\\\\n        return \\\\\\\"n/a\\\\\\\"\\\\n    diff = max(0, int(reset_at) - int(time.time()))\\\\n    days = diff // 86400\\\\n    hours = (diff % 86400) // 3600\\\\n    return f\\\\\\\"{days}d {hours}h\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _fetch_quota_for_account(acc: account.CodexAccount) -> quota.CodexQuota:\\\\n    acc = account.refresh_account_tokens(acc)\\\\n    try:\\\\n        return quota.fetch_quota(acc.access_token, acc.account_id)\\\\n    except quota.QuotaError as exc:\\\\n        if exc.status_code == 403:\\\\n            acc = account.refresh_account_tokens(acc, force=True)\\\\n            return quota.fetch_quota(acc.access_token, acc.account_id)\\\\n        raise\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _fetch_quotas_parallel(\\\\n    accounts: list[account.CodexAccount],\\\\n) -> tuple[list[tuple[account.CodexAccount, quota.CodexQuota]], list[tuple[account.CodexAccount, Exception]]]:\\\\n    results: list[tuple[account.CodexAccount, quota.CodexQuota]] = []\\\\n    errors: list[tuple[account.CodexAccount, Exception]] = []\\\\n\\\\n    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=min(8, len(accounts))) as executor:\\\\n        futures = {executor.submit(_fetch_quota_for_account, acc): acc for acc in accounts}\\\\n        for future in as_completed(futures):\\\\n            acc = futures[future]\\\\n            try:\\\\n                results.append((acc, future.result()))\\\\n            except Exception as exc:\\\\n                errors.append((acc, exc))\\\\n\\\\n    return results, errors\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _load_accounts_in_order() -> list[account.CodexAccount]:\\\\n    emails = account.list_accounts()\\\\n    accounts = []\\\\n    for email in emails:\\\\n        try:\\\\n            accounts.append(account.load_account(email))\\\\n        except FileNotFoundError:\\\\n            continue\\\\n    return accounts\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef cmd_status(_: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\n    accounts = _load_accounts_in_order()\\\\n    if not accounts:\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"No accounts found. Use `python -m models.codex.cli import` after logging in.\\\\\\\")\\\\n        return 1\\\\n\\\\n    active_email = account.get_active_email()\\\\n    results, errors = _fetch_quotas_parallel(accounts)\\\\n\\\\n    quota_by_email: dict[str, quota.CodexQuota] = {}\\\\n    for acc, quo in results:\\\\n        quota_by_email[acc.email] = quo\\\\n        if quo.plan_type:\\\\n            acc.plan_type = quo.plan_type\\\\n        if quo.raw:\\\\n            acc.quota_snapshot = quo.raw\\\\n        account.save_account(acc)\\\\n\\\\n    errors_by_email = {acc.email: exc for acc, exc in errors}\\\\n\\\\n    max_email = max(len(acc.email) for acc in accounts)\\\\n    header = \\\\\\\"Codex Account Status\\\\\\\"\\\\n    print(header)\\\\n    print()\\\\n    print(\\\\n        f\\\\\\\"{'Account'.ljust(max_email)}  Plan   Remaining           Resets\\\\\\\"\\\\n    )\\\\n    print(\\\\n        f\\\\\\\"{'-' * max_email}  ----   -----------------  ------\\\\\\\"\\\\n    )\\\\n\\\\n    for acc in accounts:\\\\n        marker = \\\\\\\">\\\\\\\" if acc.email == active_email else \\\\\\\" \\\\\\\"\\\\n        if acc.email in {acc.email}\\\\\\\")\\\\n    return 0\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef cmd_switch(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\n    target = account.set_active_account(args.email)\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\"Active account set {acc.email}\\\\\\\")\\\\n    return 0\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef cmd_login(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\n    cmd = [\\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"login\\\\\\\"]\\\\n    if args.device_auth:\\\\n {args.email}\\\\\\\")\\\\n    return 0\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef cmd_rotate(_: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\n    accounts = _load_accounts_in_order()\\\\n    if not accounts:\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"No accounts found.\\\\\\\")\\\\n        return 1\\\\n\\\\n    results, errors = _fetch_quotas_parallel(accounts)\\\\n    if errors:\\\\n        for acc, err in errors:\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to fetch quota for {acc.email}: {err}\\\\\\\", file=sys.stderr)\\\\n\\\\n    candidates = [\\\\n        (acc, quo)\\\\n        for acc, quo in results\\\\n        if not quo.weekly_limit_reached and not acc.disabled\\\\n    ]\\\\n    if not candidates:\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"All accounts are exhausted or disabled.\\\\\\\")\\\\n        return 1\\\\n\\\\n    best_acc, best_quota = min(candidates, key=lambda item: item[1].weekly_used_percent)\\\\n    active_email = account.get_active_email()\\\\n\\\\n    best_remaining = 100 - best_quota.weekly_used_percent\\\\n    if best_acc.email == active_email:\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\"Already on best account {best_acc.email} ({best_remaining}% remaining).\\\\\\\")\\\\n        return annotations\\\\n\\\\nimport json\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\\\\nfrom urllib import request\\\\n\\\\nimport yaml\\\\n\\\\nfrom config import settings\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass Chat2APIClient:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Simple stdlib HTTP client for the local chat2api gateway.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        base_url: str = settings.CHAT2API_BASE_URL,\\\\n        timeout: float = settings.CHAT2API_TIMEOUT,\\\\n        catalog_path: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_ROLE_MODELS_PATH,\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\n        self.base_url = base_url.rstrip(\\\\\\\"/\\\\\\\")\\\\n        self.timeout = timeout\\\\n        self._model_map = self._load_model_map(catalog_path)\\\\n\\\\n    @staticmethod\\\\n    def _load_model_map(catalog_path: str | Path) -> dict[str, str]:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Build semantic-name \\u2192 chat2api_id mapping from role_models.yaml.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        try:\\\\n            with open(catalog_path, \\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\") as fh:\\\\n                catalog = yaml.safe_load(fh) or {}\\\\n        except (OSError, yaml.YAMLError):\\\\n            return {}\\\\n        return {\\\\n            name: info[\\\\\\\"chat2api_id\\\\\\\"]\\\\n            for name, info in catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {}).items()\\\\n            if \\\\\\\"chat2api_id\\\\\\\" in info\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n    def resolve_model(self, model: str) -> str:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Map a semantic model name to its chat2api ID, passthrough if unknown.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        return self._model_map.get(model, model)\\\\n\\\\n    def list_models(self) -> list[str]:\\\\n        payload = self._get_json(\\\\\\\"/v1/models\\\\\\\")\\\\n        return [item[\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\"] for item in payload.get(\\\\\\\"data\\\\\\\", []) if \\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\" in item]\\\\n\\\\n    def chat(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        model: str,\\\\n        prompt: str,\\\\n        system: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n    ) -> str:\\\\n        messages: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\\\\n        if system:\\\\n            messages.append({\\\\\\\"role\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"system\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\": system})\\\\n        messages.append({\\\\\\\"role\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"user\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\": prompt})\\\\n        payload = self._post_json(\\\\n            \\\\\\\"/v1/chat/completions\\\\\\\",\\\\n            {\\\\n                \\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\": self.resolve_model(model),\\\\n                \\\\\\\"messages\\\\\\\": messages,\\\\n            },\\\\n        )\\\\n        return payload[\\\\\\\"choices\\\\\\\"][0][\\\\\\\"message\\\\\\\"][\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\"]\\\\n\\\\n    def _get_json(self, path: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\n        req = request.Request(f\\\\\\\"{self.base_url}{path}\\\\\\\", method=\\\\\\\"GET\\\\\\\")\\\\n        with request.urlopen(req, timeout=self.timeout) as response:\\\\n            return json.loads(response.read().decode(\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\"))\\\\n\\\\n    def _post_json(self, path: str, body: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\n        data = json.dumps(body).encode(\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\")\\\\n        req = request.Request(\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"{self.base_url}{path}\\\\\\\",\\\\n            data=data,\\\\n            headers={\\\\\\\"Content-Type\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"application/json\\\\\\\"},\\\\n            method=\\\\\\\"POST\\\\\\\",\\\\n        )\\\\n        with request.urlopen(req, timeout=self.timeout) as response:\\\\n            return tests/harness/ -q` => `21 passed`.\\\\n\\\\n## Current Stage Instructions\\\\nImplement all three features end-to-end. Keep the Codex account switch separate from pure model selection, prefer a portable nohup-style daemon path for tests, and add focused tests as each slice lands so the final `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -v` run is stable.\\\\n\\\\n## Verification\\\\nRun: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -v`\\\\n\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":0,\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.started\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_48\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,220p' artifacts/563b7352a8d94c82bf26787efb827fc0/01_plan_output.md\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":null,\\\"status\\\":\\\"in_progress\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.completed\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_48\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,220p' artifacts/563b7352a8d94c82bf26787efb827fc0/01_plan_output.md\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"# Output: plan\\\\n## Summary\\\\nImplement the robustness work in three slices with tests after each slice:\\\\n\\\\n1. Codex account rotation\\\\n- Keep `QuotaRouter.select_model()` side-effect free so `can_run_stage()` remains safe.\\\\n- Extend routing to choose the best Codex account among all Codex quota snapshots using the existing use-it-or-lose-it scoring, and preserve the chosen `account_email` in `ModelChoice`.\\\\n- Add a separate activation step before Codex execution that calls `models.codex.account.set_active_account()` only when the chosen Codex account differs from the current active account.\\\\n- Log/surface the selected account in the routing reason and stage telemetry.\\\\n\\\\n2. Daemon lifecycle\\\\n- Add a small daemon manager module instead of embedding process control directly in CLI branches.\\\\n- Use a detached `subprocess.Popen(..., start_new_session=True)` worker for a portable nohup-style background process.\\\\n- Add `daemon start`, `daemon stop`, and `daemon status` CLI subcommands plus a hidden worker command that runs `Harness.run_forever()`.\\\\n- Persist daemon metadata in a PID file, detect stale PID files, and install a `SIGTERM` handler that lets the current iteration finish and exits cleanly.\\\\n\\\\n3. Logging, monitoring, and dashboard\\\\n- Add one centralized logging setup for the harness CLI/daemon path.\\\\n- Emit structured JSONL events for stage start, completion, retry, quota pause, permission pause, and failure.\\\\n- Compute dashboard aggregates from the DB plus the JSONL event stream: task counts by status, stage counts by status, total/average duration, total token usage, and execution error rate.\\\\n- Include daemon state, recent failures, and quota/permission pause counts in the dashboard output.\\\\n\\\\n## File Targets\\\\n- `harness/quota_router.py`\\\\n- `harness/main.py`\\\\n- `harness/stage_executor.py`\\\\n- `harness/task_queue.py`\\\\n- `config/settings.py`\\\\n- New modules are likely justified for daemon/process management and telemetry aggregation.\\\\n\\\\n## Test Plan\\\\n- Add router tests for multi-account Codex selection and no-side-effect feasibility checks.\\\\n- Add harness/main tests for Codex account activation before execution.\\\\n- Add daemon tests for PID lifecycle, stale PID detection, and stop/status behavior.\\\\n- Add telemetry/dashboard tests for JSONL event emission and aggregate summaries.\\\\n- Final verification: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -v`\\\\n\\\\n## Baseline\\\\nCurrent baseline is green: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -q` passed with `21 passed`.\\\\n\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":0,\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.completed\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_49\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"agent_message\\\",\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\u89c4\\u5212\\u7ed3\\u679c\\u5df2\\u843d\\u5230 intake_agent or IntakeAgent()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.router = quota_router or QuotaRouter()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.executor = stage_\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            live_ids = set(self.chat_client.list_models())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not live_ids:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for name in self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if self.chat2api_id(name) in live_ids\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        ]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def can_run_stage(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> bool:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            self.select_model(task, stage, quota_snapshot=quota_snapshot, available_models=available_models)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except AllQuotaExhaustedError:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return False\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return True\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def select_model(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quotas = quota_snapshot if quota_snapshot is not None else self.quota_manager.fetch_all_quotas()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        available = set(available_models or self.list_available_models())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        eligible = self._eligible_candidates(self.models_for_role(stage.model_role), quotas, available)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not eligible:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raise AllQuotaExhaustedError(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No eligible model for role={stage.model_role} with min_remaining={self.min_remaining_pct}%\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if self.enable_llm_selector:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            llm_choice = self._select_with_llm(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if llm_choice is not None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                return llm_choice\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self._fallback_select(task, stage, eligible)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _eligible_candidates(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        candidates: list[str],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        available: set[str],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for model in candidates:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if model not in available:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                continue\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            provider = self.get_model_info(model).get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if not provider:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                continue\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            provider_snapshots = [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                snapshot\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                for snapshot in quotas\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                if snapshot.provider.value == provider and snapshot.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            ]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if provider_snapshots:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                eligible.append((model, provider, max(provider_snapshots, key=self._score_snapshot)))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            elif provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                eligible.append((model, provider, None))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return eligible\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _select_with_llm(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice | None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        selector_model = self._pick_selector_model()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if selector_model is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        prompt = self._build_selection_prompt(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raw = self.chat_client.chat(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                model=selector_model,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                prompt=prompt,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                system=(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"You are code-orchestra's model router. \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Return compact JSON with fields model, provider, account, reason.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            parsed = json.loads(raw)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        chosen_model = parsed.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not isinstance(chosen_model, str):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        eligible_models = {model: (provider, snapshot) for model, provider, snapshot in eligible}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        selected = eligible_models.get(chosen_model)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if selected is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        provider, snapshot = selected\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if snapshot is not None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            requested_account = parsed.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if isinstance(requested_account, str) and requested_account and requested_account != snapshot.email:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                alternative = next(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        quota\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        for quota in quotas\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        if quota.provider.value == provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        and quota.email == requested_account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        and quota.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                if alternative is not None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    snapshot = alternative\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return ModelChoice(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            model=chosen_model,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            provider=provider,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            account_email=snapshot.email if snapshot is not None else None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            reason=str(parsed.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"llm_selector\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _fallback_select(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        best_choice: ModelChoice | None = None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        best_score: float | None = None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for role_index, (model, provider, snapshot) in enumerate(eligible):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            role_bonus = max(0, 40 - role_index * 10)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if snapshot is not None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                total_score = role_bonus + self._score_snapshot(snapshot)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                choice = ModelChoice(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    model=model,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    provider=provider,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    account_email=snapshot.email,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    reason=(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fallback: role={stage.model_role}, complexity={task.complexity}, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}%, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            else:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                total_score = role_bonus + self._score_provider_without_snapshot(provider)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                choice = ModelChoice(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    model=model,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    provider=provider,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    account_email=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    reason=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fallback: role={stage.model_role}, complexity={task.complexity}, provider={provider}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if best_score is None or total_score > best_score:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                best_score = total_score\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                best_choice = choice\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if best_choice is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raise AllQuotaExhaustedError(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No eligible model for role={stage.model_role} with min_remaining={self.min_remaining_pct}%\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return best_choice\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _pick_selector_model(self) -> str | None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Pick the cheapest available model to use as the LLM selector.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        preferred = (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gpt-4o\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"claude-haiku-4-5\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gemini-3.1-pro\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gpt-5.4-codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        available = set(self.list_available_models())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for model in preferred:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if model in available:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                return self.chat2api_id(model)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _build_selection_prompt(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        lines = [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task: {task.title}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Description: {task.description}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Complexity: {task.complexity}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Stage: {stage.stage_type} ({stage.model_role})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n   if snapshot is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                lines.append(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"- {model} | provider={provider} | account=n/a | remaining=n/a | reset_in=n/a\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            else:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                lines.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"- {model} | provider={provider} | account={snapshot.email} | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}% | reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if quotas:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            lines.extend([\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Quota snapshot:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"])\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for snapshot in quotas:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                lines.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"- {snapshot.provider.value}:{snapshot.email} \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}% reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        lines.extend(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Prefer use-it-or-lose-it quota, but keep role fit.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                'Respond as JSON: {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}',\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            ]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(lines)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _score_snapshot(self, snapshot: QuotaSnapshot) -> float:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        waste_bonus = 0.0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if snapshot.time_until_reset_hours <= 6:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            waste_bonus = snapshot.remaining_percent * (6 - max(snapshot.time_until_reset_hours, 0)) / 6\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        safety_bonus = 15.0 if snapshot.remaining_percent >= 40 else 0.0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return snapshot.remaining_percent + waste_bonus + safety_bonus\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _score_provider_without_snapshot(self, provider: str) -> float:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return 85.0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"claude\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return 70.0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 50.0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_6\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash self.last_used,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    @classmethod\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> email=data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"AccountIndex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        accounts = data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        active = data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"active_account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return cls(accounts=list(accounts), active_account=active)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _ensure_accounts_dir() -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ACCOUNTS_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _account_path(email: str) -> Path:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return ACCOUNTS_DIR / f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{email}.json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _read_json(path: Path) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    with path.open(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return json.load(f)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _atomic_write_json(path: Path, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    _ensure_accounts_dir()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    tmp_path = path.with_suffix(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".tmp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    with tmp_path.open(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"w\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        json.dump(data, f, indent=2, sort_keys=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        f.flush()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        os.fsync(f.fileno())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    os.replace(tmp_path, path)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    os.chmod(path, 0o600)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _load_index() -> AccountIndex:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not ACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH.exists():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return AccountIndex(accounts=[], active_account=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return AccountIndex.from_dict(_read_json(ACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _save_index(index: AccountIndex) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    _atomic_write_json(ACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH, index.to_dict())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef get_account_index() -> AccountIndex:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return _load_index()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef get_active_email() -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return _load_index().active_account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef list_accounts() -> List[str]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return _load_index().accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef load_account(email: str) -> CodexAccount:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    path = _account_path(email)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not path.exists():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Account not found: {email}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return CodexAccount.from_dict(_read_json(path))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef load_all_accounts() -> List[CodexAccount]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    accounts: List[CodexAccount] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    for email in index.accounts:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            accounts.append(load_account(email))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except FileNotFoundError:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            continue\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef save_account(account: CodexAccount) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    _atomic_write_json(_account_path(account.email), account.to_dict())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef add_account(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    email: str,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    tokens: Dict[str, Any],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    account_id: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    plan_type: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    quota_snapshot: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    disabled: Optional[bool] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    set_active: bool = False,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    update_last_used: bool = True,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n) -> CodexAccount:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or not tokens.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Missing access_token or refresh_token for account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    now = int(time.time())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    existing = None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n
