risk_level=exc.decision.risk_level,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    decision=exc.decision.decision,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    voters=[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": vote.model, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"vote\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": vote.vote, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": vote.reason}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        for vote in exc.decision.votes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    ],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    decided_at=utcnow_iso(),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except StageExecutionError as exc:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            retry_count = stage.retry_count + 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if retry_count > settings.MAX_RETRIES:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.fail_stage(stage.stage_id, result_summary=str(exc), retry_count=retry_count)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.FAILED)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            else:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.reset_stage_to_pending(stage.stage_id, retry_count=retry_count)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def _finish_task(self, task: TaskRecord) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if task.verify_cmd and task.working_dir:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            verification = await self.executor.run_verify_cmd(task.verify_cmd, task.working_dir)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if verification.returncode != 0:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.FAILED)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                return\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.DONE)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Autonomous multi-LLM harness\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    subparsers = parser.add_subparsers(dest=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", required=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    submit = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"submit\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Submit a task into the harness queue\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Override generated title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--goal\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Acceptance goal\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--verify-cmd\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Verification command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--priority\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", type=int, default=50)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--working-dir\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task working directory\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    chat = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chat\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Interactive requirement clarification\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    chat.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", nargs=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Initial task description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    chat.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--priority\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", type=int, default=50)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    chat.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--working-dir\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task working directory\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    inspect = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"inspect\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Show a task in detail\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    inspect.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    pause = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pause\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Pause a task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    pause.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    resume = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"resume\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Resume a task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    resume.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"quota\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Show quota snapshot\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"run-once\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Run one scheduling iteration\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Show queued tasks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return parser\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nasync def _prompt_user_approval(command: str, context: str) -> bool | None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not sys.stdin.isatty():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Permission request for command: {command}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if context:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Context: {context}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    answer = await asyncio.to_thread(input, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Allow? [y/N]: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    lowered = answer.strip().lower()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if lowered in {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"y\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"yes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return True\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if lowered in {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"no\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return False\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef build_cli_harness() -> Harness:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    chat_client = None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    permission_gate = PermissionGate(user_approver=_prompt_user_approval)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stage_executor = StageExecutor(chat_client=chat_client, permission_gate=permission_gate)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    quota_router = QuotaRouter(chat_client=stage_executor.chat_client)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return Harness(quota_router=quota_router, stage_executor=stage_executor)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _read_multiline_description() -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Describe the task. Press Enter twice to finish:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    lines: list[str] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    while True:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        line = input()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not line and (not lines or not lines[-1]):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            break\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        lines.append(line)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(lines).strip()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _run_chat_submission(harness: Harness, description: str | None, priority: int, working_dir: str | None) -> TaskRecord:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    initial_description = description or _read_multiline_description()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not initial_description:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        raise ValueError(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task description cannot be empty.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    base = harness.intake.plan_task(initial_description)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    questions = harness.intake.generate_questions(initial_description, base.complexity)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    answers: dict[str, str] = {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    for question in questions:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        suffix = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" [{question.default}]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if question.default else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        response = input(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{question.prompt}{suffix}: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        answers[question.key] = response or (question.default or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    intake = harness.intake.apply_answers(initial_description, answers)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return harness.submit_intake(intake, priority=priority, working_dir=working_dir)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nasync def _main_async(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    harness = build_cli_harness()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"submit\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task = harness.submit_task(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            args.description,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            title=args.title,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            goal=args.goal,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            verify_cmd=args.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            priority=args.priority,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            working_dir=args.working_dir,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chat\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task = _run_chat_submission(harness, args.description, args.priority, args.working_dir)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(json.dumps({\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.task_id, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.title}, ensure_ascii=False))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"run-once\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task = await harness.run_once()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(task.task_id if task else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"idle\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for item in harness.status_report():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(json.dumps(item, ensure_ascii=False))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"inspect\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(json.dumps(harness.inspect_task(args.task_id), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pause\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        harness.pause_task(args.task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(args.task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"resume\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        harness.resume_task(args.task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(args.task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"quota\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for item in harness.quota_report():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(json.dumps(item, ensure_ascii=False))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef main() -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    parser = build_parser()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    args = parser.parse_args()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    raise SystemExit(asyncio.run(_main_async(args)))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nif __name__ == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"__main__\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    main()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_9\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,320p' models/quota_manager.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_9\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,320p' models/quota_manager.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nUnified Quota Manager for Google (Antigravity) and Codex accounts.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nSmart switching algorithm \\\\\\\\u2014 optimizes for:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n1. WASTE PREVENTION: Use quota before it expires (don't let resets waste unused quota)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n2. TASK SAFETY: Ensure >40% remaining when starting new tasks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n3. CONTINUITY: Avoid unnecessary switching (anti-thrash)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nUnified scoring formula per account:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  score = remaining + waste_urgency + safety_bonus + inertia\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nWhere:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  - remaining: current remaining % (0-100)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  - waste_urgency: remaining \\\\\\\\u00d7 (WASTE_WINDOW - hours_to_reset) / WASTE_WINDOW\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\u2192 Boosts accounts with quota about to be lost on reset\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  - safety_bonus: +15 if remaining > 40% (enough for a full task)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  - inertia: +5 for current account (avoid switching for marginal gains)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nSwitch when best candidate's score exceeds current by > 10 points.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport time\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom enum import Enum\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.codex.account import load_account as load_codex_account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.codex.account import list_accounts as list_codex_accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.codex.account import set_active_account as set_active_codex_account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.codex.account import get_active_email as get_active_codex_email\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.codex.quota import fetch_quota as fetch_codex_quota\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.account import load_account as load_google_account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.account import list_accounts as list_google_accounts_fn\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.account import set_active_account as set_active_google_account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.account import get_active_email as get_active_google_email\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.account import save_account as save_google_account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.oauth import ensure_fresh_token as ensure_fresh_google_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.quota import fetch_account_quota as fetch_google_quota\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass Provider(str, Enum):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    CODEX = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    GOOGLE = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"google\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass QuotaSnapshot:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Point-in-time quota snapshot for an account.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    provider: Provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    email: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    account_id: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    plan_type: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    used_percent: int\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    reset_at: int                    # Unix timestamp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    reset_at_readable: str           # Human-readable\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    time_until_reset_hours: float\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    @property\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def remaining_percent(self) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return max(0, 100 - self.used_percent)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    @property\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def is_exhausted(self) -> bool:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"True if quota is essentially depleted (>= 95%).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self.used_percent >= 95\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    @property\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def is_fresh(self) -> bool:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"True if just reset or will reset very soon.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self.remaining_percent >= 90 or self.time_until_reset_hours < 0.5\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __str__(self) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{self.email:<40} {self.plan_type:<6} \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[{self.used_percent:>3}%] \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{self.time_until_reset_hours:>5.1f}h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass SwitchDecision:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Result of quota analysis and switching decision.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    should_switch: bool\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    reason: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    target_email: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    target_remaining: Optional[int]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    current_email: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    current_remaining: Optional[int]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __str__(self) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not self.should_switch:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"STAY on {self.current_email} ({self.current_remaining}% remaining) - {self.reason}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SWITCH {self.current_email} \\\\\\\\u2192 {self.target_email} \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"({self.current_remaining}% \\\\\\\\u2192 {self.target_remaining}%) - {self.reason}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass QuotaManager:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    Intelligent quota manager for multi-provider, multi-account systems.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    Optimizes for three goals (in priority order):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    1. WASTE PREVENTION \\\\\\\\u2014 Use quota before it resets (don't lose unused quota)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    2. TASK SAFETY \\\\\\\\u2014 Prefer accounts with >40% for new tasks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    3. CONTINUITY \\\\\\\\u2014 Avoid unnecessary mid-session switching\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    Uses a unified scoring formula:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n      score = remaining + waste_urgency + safety_bonus + inertia\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    TASK_SAFETY_THRESHOLD = 40              # Prefer accounts > 40% for new tasks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    FRESH_QUOTA_THRESHOLD = 90              # Consider \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fresh\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if >= 90%\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS = 6                  # Boost accounts resetting within 6h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    SAFETY_BONUS = 15                       # Score bonus for accounts > 40%\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    INERTIA_BONUS = 5                       # Score bonus for staying on current\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    HEALTHY_INERTIA = 20                    # Extra inertia when current is healthy (>40%)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    SWITCH_THRESHOLD = 10                   # Minimum score improvement to switch\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, check_interval_minutes: int = 60):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.check_interval_minutes = check_interval_minutes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.last_check_time = 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.account_reset_times: dict[str, int] = {}  # email -> reset_at timestamp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.last_switch_time = 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.state_file = Path.home() / \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" / \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"quota_manager_state.json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self._load_state()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _load_state(self) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Load persistent state (reset times).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if self.state_file.exists():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                with open(self.state_file) as f:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    data = json.load(f)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.account_reset_times = {k: int(v) for k, v in data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reset_times\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).items()}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            except Exception:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.account_reset_times = {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _save_state(self) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Save persistent state.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.state_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with open(self.state_file, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"w\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            json.dump(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reset_times\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.account_reset_times},\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                f,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                indent=2,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def fetch_all_quotas(self) -> list[QuotaSnapshot]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Fetch quota for all accounts (both providers).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        snapshots: list[QuotaSnapshot] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        now = int(time.time())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Codex accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for email in list_codex_accounts():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    account = load_codex_account(email)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    quota = fetch_codex_quota(account.access_token, account.account_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    reset_at = quota.weekly_reset_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    time_until_reset = (reset_at - now) / 3600.0  # hours\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    snapshot = QuotaSnapshot(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        provider=Provider.CODEX,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        email=account.email,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        account_id=account.account_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        plan_type=quota.plan_type or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        used_percent=quota.weekly_used_percent,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        reset_at=reset_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        reset_at_readable=datetime.fromtimestamp(reset_at).strftime(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        time_until_reset_hours=time_until_reset,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    snapshots.append(snapshot)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    self.account_reset_times[account.email] = reset_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to fetch Codex quota for {email}: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to load Codex accounts: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Google accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            accounts = list_google_accounts_fn()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            # Google's list_accounts returns Account objects directly\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for account in accounts:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    # Refresh token if expired\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    account.token = ensure_fresh_google_token(account.token)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    save_google_account(account)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    quota, _ = fetch_google_quota(account.token.access_token, account.project_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    # Google quotas are per-model, find the max usage\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    max_used_percent = 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    max_reset_at = 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    for model_quota in quota.models:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        used = 100 - (model_quota.percentage or 0)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        if used > max_used_percent:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                            max_used_percent = used\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        if model_quota.reset_time:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                            try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                                reset_ts = int(datetime.fromisoformat(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                                    model_quota.reset_time.replace(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Z\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"+00:00\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                                ).timestamp())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                                if reset_ts > max_reset_at:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                                    max_reset_at = reset_ts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                            except Exception:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                                pass\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    if max_reset_at == 0:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        max_reset_at = now + 86400  # Default 24h if unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    time_until_reset = (max_reset_at - now) / 3600.0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    snapshot = QuotaSnapshot(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        provider=Provider.GOOGLE,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        email=account.email,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        account_id=account.project_id or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        plan_type=quota.subscription_tier or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        used_percent=max_used_percent,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        reset_at=max_reset_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        reset_at_readable=datetime.fromtimestamp(max_reset_at).strftime(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        time_until_reset_hours=time_until_reset,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    snapshots.append(snapshot)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    self.account_reset_times[account.email] = max_reset_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to fetch Google quota for {account.email}: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to load Google accounts: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self._save_state()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return sorted(snapshots, key=lambda s: (-s.remaining_percent, s.time_until_reset_hours))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _score_account(self, snapshot: QuotaSnapshot, is_current: bool = False) -> float:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        Unified scoring formula for an account.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        score = remaining + waste_urgency + safety_bonus + inertia\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        Components:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - remaining: base value (0-100)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - waste_urgency: boosts accounts with quota about to expire\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n          = remaining \\\\\\\\u00d7 (WASTE_WINDOW - hours_to_reset) / WASTE_WINDOW\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n          Only applies when hours_to_reset < WASTE_WINDOW\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - safety_bonus: +15 for accounts with >40% (can sustain a full task)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - inertia: +5 for current account (anti-thrash)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        Examples:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - Account A: 50% remaining, 2h until reset, current\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\u2192 50 + 50*(6-2)/6 + 15 + 5 = 50 + 33.3 + 15 + 5 = 103.3\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - Account B: 80% remaining, 120h until reset, not current\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\u2192 80 + 0 + 15 + 0 = 95\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - Account C: 20% remaining, 1h until reset, not current\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\u2192 20 + 20*(6-1)/6 + 0 + 0 = 20 + 16.7 + 0 = 36.7\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\u2192 Switch to A (use its 50% before reset), even though B has more remaining\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        remaining = snapshot.remaining_percent\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Waste urgency: boost accounts with quota about to be lost on reset\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        waste_urgency = 0.0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        hours = snapshot.time_until_reset_hours\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if 0 < hours <= self.WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS and remaining > 0:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            waste_urgency = remaining * (self.WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS - hours) / self.WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Safety bonus: prefer accounts that can sustain a full task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        safety = self.SAFETY_BONUS if remaining > self.TASK_SAFETY_THRESHOLD else 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Inertia: preference for staying on current account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Extra inertia when healthy \\\\\\\\u2014 don't switch between two good accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        inertia = 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if is_current:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            inertia = self.INERTIA_BONUS\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if remaining > self.TASK_SAFETY_THRESHOLD:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                inertia += self.HEALTHY_INERTIA\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return remaining + waste_urgency + safety + inertia\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _is_fresh_reset(self, snapshot: QuotaSnapshot) -> bool:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Check if account just reset or is in immediate post-reset window.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return snapshot.remaining_percent >= self.FRESH_QUOTA_THRESHOLD\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def analyze_and_decide(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        current_email: str,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        current_snapshot: Optional[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        all_snapshots: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> SwitchDecision:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        Analyze quota situation and decide whether to switch accounts.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        Uses unified scoring that balances:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        1. Waste prevention (use expiring quota before it's lost)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        2. Task safety (prefer >40% for new tasks)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        3. Continuity (inertia for current account)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not current_snapshot:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            # No current account info \\\\\\\\u2014 pick the best available\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if all_snapshots:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                scored = [(s, self._score_account(s)) for s in all_snapshots]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                best, best_score = max(scored, key=lambda x: x[1])\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                return SwitchDecision(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    should_switch=True,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    reason=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No current account \\\\\\\\u2014 selecting best (score {best_score:.0f})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    target_email=best.email,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    target_remaining=best.remaining_percent,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    current_email=current_email,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    current_remaining=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return SwitchDecision(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                should_switch=False,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                reason=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No account quota available\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                target_email=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                target_remaining=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                current_email=current_email,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                current_remaining=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Score current account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_10\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,280p' models/codex/quota.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_10\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,280p' models/codex/quota.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"from __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport urllib.error\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport urllib.request\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Any, List\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom .account import CodexAccount\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nUSAGE_URL = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"https://chatgpt.com/backend-api/wham/usage\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass QuotaError(RuntimeError):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, message: str, status_code: int | None = None) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        super().__init__(message)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.status_code = status_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass CodexQuota:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    email: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    plan_type: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    weekly_used_percent: int\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    weekly_reset_at: int\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    weekly_limit_reached: bool\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    burst_used_percent: int\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    burst_reset_at: int\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    code_review_used_percent: int\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    code_review_reset_at: int\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    raw: dict | None = None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _get_int(value: Any, default: int = 0) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return int(value)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except (TypeError, ValueError):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return default\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef fetch_quota(access_token: str, account_id: str) -> CodexQuota:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    req = urllib.request.Request(USAGE_URL, method=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"GET\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    req.add_header(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Authorization\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Bearer {access_token}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if account_id:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        req.add_header(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ChatGPT-Account-Id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", account_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    req.add_header(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"User-Agent\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"CodexBar\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    req.add_header(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Accept\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"application/json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=20) as resp:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            payload = resp.read().decode(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except urllib.error.HTTPError as exc:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        body = exc.read().decode(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", errors=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ignore\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        raise QuotaError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Quota fetch failed: HTTP {exc.code} {body}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", status_code=exc.code) from exc\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except urllib.error.URLError as exc:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        raise QuotaError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Quota fetch failed: {exc.reason}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") from exc\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        data = json.loads(payload)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        raise QuotaError(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Quota response was not valid JSON\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") from exc\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    rate_limit = data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rate_limit\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    primary = rate_limit.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"primary_window\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    secondary = rate_limit.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"secondary_window\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    code_review = data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"code_review_rate_limit\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    code_primary = code_review.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"primary_window\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return CodexQuota(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        email=data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        plan_type=data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"plan_type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        weekly_used_percent=_get_int(primary.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"used_percent\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        weekly_reset_at=_get_int(primary.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reset_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        weekly_limit_reached=bool(rate_limit.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"limit_reached\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", False)),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        burst_used_percent=_get_int(secondary.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"used_percent\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        burst_reset_at=_get_int(secondary.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reset_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        code_review_used_percent=_get_int(code_primary.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"used_percent\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        code_review_reset_at=_get_int(code_primary.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reset_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        raw=data,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef fetch_all_quotas(accounts: List[CodexAccount]) -> List[CodexQuota]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not accounts:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    results: List[CodexQuota] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    errors = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=min(8, len(accounts))) as executor:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        futures = {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            executor.submit(fetch_quota, account.access_token, account.account_id): account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for account in accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for future in as_completed(futures):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            account = futures[future]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                results.append(future.result())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            except Exception as exc:  # pragma: no cover - pass-through\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                errors.append((account.email, exc))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if errors:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        details = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"; \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{email}: {exc}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" for email, exc in errors)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        raise QuotaError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Failed to fetch quota for some accounts: {details}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return results\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_11\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash import PermissionGate\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass CommandExecution:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    returncode: int\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stdout: Awaitable[CommandExecution]]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass StageExecutionError(RuntimeError):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n error.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass QuotaExhaustedError(StageExecutionError):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Raised when the underlying provider reports quota exhaustion.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, provider: str, message: str, partial_output: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        super().__init__(message)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.provider = provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.partial_output = partial_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass PermissionBlockedError(StageExecutionError):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n gate.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, command: str, decision: PermissionDecision) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        super().__init__(decision.reason)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.command = command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.decision = decision\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass StageExecutor:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Execute planned stages via CLI backends or lightweight API calls.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    APPROVED_DECISIONS = {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"auto_approved\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"model_approved\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"user_approved\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        chat_client: Optional[Chat2APIClient] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        permission_gate: Optional[PermissionGate] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        runner: Optional[Runner] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        codex_tier: str = settings.CODEX_TIER,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.chat_client = chat_client or Chat2APIClient()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.permission_gate = permission_gate or PermissionGate()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.runner = runner or self._run_command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.codex_tier = codex_tier\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def execute(self, stage: StageRecord, handoff_doc_path: str, working_dir: str | None) -> StageExecutionResult:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        started_at = time.time()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        prompt = Path(handoff_doc_path).read_text(encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        provider = stage.assigned_provider or self._infer_provider(stage.assigned_model or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        cwd = working_dir or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chat2api\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raw_output = await asyncio.to_thread(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.chat_client.chat,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                model=stage.assigned_model or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                prompt=prompt,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            duration = time.time() - started_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return StageExecutionResult(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                stage_id=stage.stage_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                status=StageStatus.DONE,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                raw_output=raw_output,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                summary=self._summarize(raw_output),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                duration_sec=duration,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if provider == provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            cmd = [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gemini\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(outputs).strip()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return StageExecutionResult(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n Optional[str]) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        text = stdout.strip()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if provider != \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" or not text:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            parsed = json.loads(text)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except json.JSONDecodeError:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n parsed[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"output_text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"message\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in parsed and isinstance(parsed[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"message\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"], str):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                return parsed[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"message\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _summarize(self, text: str) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        cleaned = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(text.split())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if len(cleaned) <= 280:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n str) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if model.startswith(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"claude-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return model.startswith(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gemini-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return model.startswith(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gpt-4.1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return FAILED = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"failed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass StageStatus(str, Enum):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    PENDING = annotations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport sqlite3\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom contextlib import contextmanager\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Iterator\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nSCHEMA = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nPRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    task_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    title TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    description TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    goal TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    verify_cmd TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    complexity TEXT DEFAULT 'medium',\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    priority INTEGER DEFAULT 50,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n
