NULL\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stages (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stage_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    task_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tasks(task_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stage_type TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stage_order INTEGER NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    model_role TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    assigned_model TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    assigned_provider TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending',\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    handoff_doc_path TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    result_summary TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    token_used INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    duration_sec REAL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    started_at TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    finished_at TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    retry_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    verify_cmd TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    metadata TEXT DEFAULT '{}'\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS permission_requests (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    request_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stage_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stages(stage_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    action TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    context TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    risk_level TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    decision TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    voters TEXT DEFAULT '[]',\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    decided_at TEXT\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quota_events (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    event_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    provider TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    account_email TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    event_type TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    details TEXT DEFAULT '{}',\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    created_at TEXT NOT NULL\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_status_priority\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ON tasks(status, priority DESC, created_at ASC);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_stages_task_order\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ON stages(task_id, stage_order ASC);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_stages_task_status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ON stages(task_id, status, stage_order ASC);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass HarnessDB:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Small wrapper around a SQLite database file.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, db_path: str | Path) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.db_path = Path(db_path)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.db_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.initialize()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def initialize(self) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.executescript(SCHEMA)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    @contextmanager\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def connect(self) -> Iterator[sqlite3.Connection]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        conn = sqlite3.connect(self.db_path)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            yield conn\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.commit()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.rollback()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raise\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        finally:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.close()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_17\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/task_queue.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_17\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/task_queue.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SQLite-backed task and stage queue.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport uuid\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Iterable, Optional\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.db import HarnessDB\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.models import (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    PermissionRequestRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    PlannedStage,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    QuotaEventRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    RiskLevel,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    StageStatus,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    TaskStatus,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef utcnow_iso() -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass TaskQueue:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"CRUD layer for tasks, stages, and audit tables.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, db: HarnessDB) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.db = db\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def create_task(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        title: str,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        description: str,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        goal: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        complexity: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"medium\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        priority: int = 50,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        status: TaskStatus = TaskStatus.PENDING,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task_id: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        now = utcnow_iso()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        record = TaskRecord(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            task_id=task_id or uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            title=title,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            description=description,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            goal=goal,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            verify_cmd=verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            complexity=complexity,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            priority=priority,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            status=status,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            working_dir=working_dir,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            created_at=now,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            updated_at=now,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                INSERT INTO tasks (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    task_id, title, description, goal, verify_cmd, complexity,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    priority, status, working_dir, created_at, updated_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.task_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.title,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.description,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.goal,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.complexity,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.priority,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.status.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.working_dir,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.created_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.updated_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return record\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def get_task(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            row = conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", (task_id,)).fetchone()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self._row_to_task(row) if row else None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def list_tasks(self, status: Optional[TaskStatus] = None) -> list[TaskRecord]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        query = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SELECT * FROM tasks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        params: tuple[object, ...] = ()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if status is not None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            query += \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" WHERE status = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            params = (status.value,)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        query += \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" ORDER BY priority DESC, created_at ASC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            rows = conn.execute(query, params).fetchall()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return [self._row_to_task(row) for row in rows]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def pick_next_runnable_task(self) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            row = conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                SELECT * FROM tasks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                WHERE status IN (?, ?, ?)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ORDER BY\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    CASE status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        WHEN ? THEN 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        WHEN ? THEN 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        ELSE 2\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    END,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    priority DESC,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    created_at ASC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                LIMIT 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.EXECUTING.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.PENDING.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.PLANNING.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.EXECUTING.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.PENDING.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            ).fetchone()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self._row_to_task(row) if row else None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def update_task_status(self, task_id: str, status: TaskStatus) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"UPDATE tasks SET status = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (status.value, utcnow_iso(), task_id),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def update_task_working_dir(self, task_id: str, working_dir: str) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"UPDATE tasks SET working_dir = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (working_dir, utcnow_iso(), task_id),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def save_stages(self, task_id: str, stages: Iterable[PlannedStage]) -> list[StageRecord]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        now = utcnow_iso()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        records: list[StageRecord] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for planned in stages:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                record = StageRecord(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    stage_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    task_id=task_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    stage_type=planned.stage_type,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    stage_order=planned.stage_order,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    model_role=planned.model_role,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    assigned_model=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    assigned_provider=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    status=StageStatus.PENDING,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    handoff_doc_path=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    result_summary=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    token_used=0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    duration_sec=0.0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    started_at=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    finished_at=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    retry_count=0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    verify_cmd=planned.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    metadata=dict(planned.metadata),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    INSERT INTO stages (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        stage_id, task_id, stage_type, stage_order, model_role,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        assigned_model, assigned_provider, status, handoff_doc_path,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        result_summary, token_used, duration_sec, started_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        finished_at, retry_count, verify_cmd, metadata\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        record.stage_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        record.task_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        record.stage_type,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        record.stage_order,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        record.model_role,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        record.assigned_model,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        record.assigned_provider,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        record.status.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        record.handoff_doc_path,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        record.result_summary,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        record.token_used,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        record.duration_sec,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        record.started_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        record.finished_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        record.retry_count,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        record.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        json.dumps(record.metadata),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                records.append(record)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"UPDATE tasks SET updated_at = ? WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (now, task_id),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return records\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def count_stages(self, task_id: str) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            row = conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM stages WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", (task_id,)).fetchone()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return int(row[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"count\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"])\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def get_stage(self, stage_id: str) -> Optional[StageRecord]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            row = conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SELECT * FROM stages WHERE stage_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", (stage_id,)).fetchone()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self._row_to_stage(row) if row else None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def list_stages(self, task_id: str) -> list[StageRecord]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            rows = conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SELECT * FROM stages WHERE task_id = ? ORDER BY stage_order ASC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (task_id,),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            ).fetchall()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return [self._row_to_stage(row) for row in rows]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def list_completed_stages(self, task_id: str) -> list[StageRecord]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            rows = conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                SELECT * FROM stages\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                WHERE task_id = ? AND status IN (?, ?)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ORDER BY stage_order ASC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (task_id, StageStatus.DONE.value, StageStatus.SKIPPED.value),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            ).fetchall()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return [self._row_to_stage(row) for row in rows]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def next_pending_stage(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[StageRecord]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            row = conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                SELECT * FROM stages\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                WHERE task_id = ? AND status = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ORDER BY stage_order ASC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                LIMIT 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (task_id, StageStatus.PENDING.value),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            ).fetchone()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self._row_to_stage(row) if row else None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def assign_stage_model(self, stage_id: str, model: str, provider: str) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                UPDATE stages\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                SET assigned_model = ?, assigned_provider = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                WHERE stage_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (model, provider, stage_id),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def mark_stage_running(self, stage_id: str, handoff_doc_path: str) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        now = utcnow_iso()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                UPDATE stages\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                SET status = ?, handoff_doc_path = ?, started_at = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                WHERE stage_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (StageStatus.RUNNING.value, handoff_doc_path, now, stage_id),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def complete_stage(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage_id: str,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        result_summary: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        token_used: int = 0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        duration_sec: float = 0.0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                UPDATE stages\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                SET status = ?, result_summary = ?, token_used = ?, duration_sec = ?,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    finished_at = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                WHERE stage_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    StageStatus.DONE.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    result_summary,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    token_used,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    duration_sec,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    utcnow_iso(),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    stage_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def skip_stage(self, stage_id: str, *, result_summary: Optional[str] = None) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                UPDATE stages\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                SET status = ?, result_summary = ?, finished_at = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                WHERE stage_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (StageStatus.SKIPPED.value, result_summary, utcnow_iso(), stage_id),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def reset_stage_to_pending(self, stage_id: str, *, retry_count: Optional[int] = None) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        query = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"UPDATE stages SET status = ?, started_at = NULL\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        params: list[object] = [StageStatus.PENDING.value]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if retry_count is not None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            query += \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", retry_count = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            params.append(retry_count)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        query += \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" WHERE stage_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        params.append(stage_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(query, tuple(params))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def fail_stage(self, stage_id: str, *, result_summary: Optional[str], retry_count: int) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                UPDATE stages\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                SET status = ?, result_summary = ?, retry_count = ?, finished_at = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                WHERE stage_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    StageStatus.FAILED.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    result_summary,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    retry_count,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    utcnow_iso(),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    stage_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def log_permission_request(self, record: PermissionRequestRecord) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                INSERT INTO permission_requests (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    request_id, stage_id, action, context, risk_level,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    decision, voters, decided_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.request_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.stage_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.action,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.context,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.risk_level.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.decision,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    json.dumps(record.voters),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.decided_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def list_permission_requests(self, stage_id: Optional[str] = None) -> list[PermissionRequestRecord]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        query = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SELECT * FROM permission_requests\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        params: tuple[object, ...] = ()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if stage_id is not None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            query += \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" WHERE stage_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            params = (stage_id,)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        query += \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" ORDER BY decided_at ASC, request_id ASC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            rows = conn.execute(query, params).fetchall()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        records: list[PermissionRequestRecord] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_18\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '360,520p' harness/task_queue.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_18\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '360,520p' harness/task_queue.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"        records: list[PermissionRequestRecord] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for row in rows:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            records.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                PermissionRequestRecord(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    request_id=row[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"request_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    stage_id=row[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    action=row[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"action\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        files_changed=[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"scheduler/planner.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_22\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash os\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _get_env(name: str, default: str) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return os.environ.get(name, default)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _get_env_int(name: str, default: int) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    value = os.environ.get(name)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if value is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return default\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return int(value)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except ValueError:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return default\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _get_env_float(name: str, default: float) -> float:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    value = os.environ.get(name)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if value is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return default\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return float(value)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except ValueError:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return default\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _get_env_bool(name: str, default: bool) -> bool:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    value = os.environ.get(name)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if value is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return default\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return value.strip().lower() in {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"true\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"yes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"on\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCLAUDE_PORT = -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,320p' scripts/orchestra_cli.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_23\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,320p' scripts/orchestra_cli.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"#!/usr/bin/env python3\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Interactive CLI for running multi-agent orchestrator workflows.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport argparse\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport asyncio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport logging\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport re\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport sys\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport time\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport uuid\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport yaml\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n# Fix path to allow importing from the project root if run from anywhere\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nsys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).parent.parent.absolute()))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom common.acp_client import ACPClient\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom common.models import Message, MessagePart, RunStatus\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom scripts.check_server_status import check_all_servers, StatusReport\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom orchestrator.pipeline import PipelineDefinition, PipelineExecutor, PipelineError\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom orchestrator.stage import StageDefinition, StageResult\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n# Setup minimal logging, only warning+ so it doesn't clutter CLI\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nlogging.basicConfig(level=logging.WARNING, format=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%(message)s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef hide_code_blocks(text: str) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Replaces markdown code blocks and diffs with a hidden placeholder.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not text:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    # Regex to match ```language \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n code... \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n ```\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    pattern = re.compile(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"```[a-zA-Z0-9_-]*\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\S]*?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n```\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", re.MULTILINE)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return pattern.sub(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n```\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n[CODE DIFF/BLOCK HIDDEN]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n```\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", text)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass CLIExecutor(PipelineExecutor):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Custom executor that streams updates to the CLI interface and routes to ACP services.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, pipeline_def: PipelineDefinition, config_path: str):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        super().__init__(pipeline_def)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.session_id = uuid.uuid4().hex[:12]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.clients: dict[str, ACPClient] = {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with open(config_path, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as handle:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            data = yaml.safe_load(handle) or {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for name, info in data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"agents\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).items():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.clients[name] = ACPClient(info[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"base_url\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"])\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def cleanup(self):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        import asyncio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        await asyncio.gather(*(client.close() for client in self.clients.values()), return_exceptions=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def _invoke_model(self, stage_def: StageDefinition, prompt: str) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        agent_name = stage_def.metadata.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"agent\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not agent_name:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return await super()._invoke_model(stage_def, prompt)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        client = self.clients.get(agent_name)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not client:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raise ValueError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Unknown agent '{agent_name}' configured in metadata for stage {stage_def.stage_id}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        message = Message(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            role=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"user\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            parts=[MessagePart(content=prompt)]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        run = await client.create_run(agent_name, [message], session_id=self.session_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if run.status != RunStatus.COMPLETED:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raise RuntimeError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Agent {agent_name} failed: {run.error}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not run.output_messages:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return run.output_messages[0].text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def _execute_stage(self, stage_def: StageDefinition) -> StageResult:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Override to provide CLI feedback before and after the stage.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n========================================================\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udd04 CURRENT STEP: {stage_def.name} ({stage_def.stage_id})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\ud83e\\\\\\\\udd16 Agent Model:  {stage_def.model}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"========================================================\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Prepare prompt to show user what is being asked\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        prompt = self._prepare_prompt(stage_def)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n[Input] -> Sending to Agent:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # We don't hide code blocks in prompt for context, but we can limit size\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        short_prompt = prompt if len(prompt) < 1000 else prompt[:500] + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n...[TRUNCATED FOR DISPLAY]...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + prompt[-500:]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(short_prompt)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\u23f3 Waiting for agent response...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        start_time = time.time()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            output = await self._invoke_model(stage_def, prompt)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            execution_time = time.time() - start_time\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u2705 Agent responded in {execution_time:.1f}s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n[Output] <- Received from Agent:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            # Hide code blocks for clean UI\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            clean_output = hide_code_blocks(output)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(clean_output)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return StageResult(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                stage_id=stage_def.stage_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                status=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                output=output,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                raw_output=output,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                execution_time=execution_time,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                model_used=stage_def.model,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except Exception as exc:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            execution_time = time.time() - start_time\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u274c Stage failed after {execution_time:.1f}s: {exc}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raise  # Let the base class intercept it and handle fail_fast\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nasync def ensure_servers_running(config_path: str, timeout: float = 3.0) -> bool:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Check if required servers are healthy. Return True if all ok.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udd0d Checking ACP Server Status...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    report = await check_all_servers(config_path, timeout)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if report.unhealthy_count == 0:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u2705 All {report.total_servers} servers are healthy!\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return True\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\u274c SOME SERVERS ARE UNREACHABLE!\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    for server in report.servers:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not server.healthy:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            err = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" ({server.error})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if server.error else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"  - {server.base_url} is DOWN{err}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nPlease start the required servers (e.g. using scripts/run_*_server.py).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return False\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef get_available_workflows() -> list[Path]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Return a list of workflow YAML files.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    workflows_dir = Path(__file__).parent.parent / \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"workflows\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not workflows_dir.exists():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return sorted(workflows_dir.glob(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"*.yaml\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nasync def main_async(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    # 1. Check Servers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    servers_ok = await ensure_servers_running(args.config, args.timeout)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not servers_ok:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"*60)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"               ORCHESTRA MULTI-AGENT CLI\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"*60 + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    # 2. Select Workflow\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    workflows = get_available_workflows()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not workflows:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u274c No workflows found in the 'workflows/' directory.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    workflow_path = None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.workflow:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        workflow_path = Path(args.workflow)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not workflow_path.exists():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u274c Workflow {workflow_path} not found.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    else:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Available Workflows:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for idx, wf in enumerate(workflows):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"  [{idx + 1}] {wf.name}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        while True:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                choice = input(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nSelect a workflow (1-%d): \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" % len(workflows))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                idx = int(choice.strip()) - 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                if 0 <= idx < len(workflows):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    workflow_path = workflows[idx]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    break\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                else:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Invalid choice.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            except ValueError:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Please enter a number.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            except KeyboardInterrupt:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCanceled by user.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                sys.exit(0)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\u2705 Selected workflow: {workflow_path.name}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    # Load pipeline\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        pipeline_def = PipelineDefinition(workflow_path)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except PipelineError as e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u274c Failed to load pipeline: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    # 3. Get Task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    task_description = args.task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not task_description:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nEnter task description (press Enter twice to finish):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        lines = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        while True:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                line = input()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                if not line and (not lines or not lines[-1]):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    break\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                lines.append(line)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            except KeyboardInterrupt:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCanceled by user.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                sys.exit(0)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task_description = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(lines).strip()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not task_description:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u274c Task description cannot be empty.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    # 4. Execute Pipeline\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\ude80 Starting Pipeline Execution...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    executor = CLIExecutor(pipeline_def, args.config)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Also map user_task so it's available for workflows explicitly requesting it\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        initial_state = {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"user_task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task_description}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        results = await executor.execute(task_description, initial_state=initial_state)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"*60)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\ud83c\\\\\\\\udf89 PIPELINE EXECUTION COMPLETED\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"*60)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for stage_id, result in results.items():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            icon = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u2705\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if result.status == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u274c\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{icon} Stage '{stage_id}': {result.status.upper()} ({result.execution_time:.1f}s)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Check for absolute failure\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if any(r.status == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"failed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" for r in results.values()):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\u274c Pipeline completed with ERRORS.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\u274c Pipeline execution failed due to an error: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        import traceback\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        traceback.print_exc()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    finally:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        await executor.cleanup()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef main() -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Interactive Multi-Agent Orchestrator CLI\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--config\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", default=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"config/agents.yaml\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Path to agents.yaml\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--timeout\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", type=float, default=3.0, help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Per-server health check timeout in seconds\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--workflow\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Path to a specific workflow YAML, bypasses selection\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Initial task description, bypasses input dialog\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    args = parser.parse_args()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        asyncio.run(main_async(args))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except KeyboardInterrupt:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nExiting CLI...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(0)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nif __name__ == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"__main__\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    main()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_24\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash harness/handoff.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Handoff document generation and artifact storage.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Iterable\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.models import StageExecutionResult, StageRecord, TaskRecord\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass HandoffProtocol:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Persist stage inputs and outputs as markdown artifacts.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, artifact_root: str | Path = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"artifacts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.artifact_root = Path(artifact_root)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.artifact_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def task_dir(self, task_id: str) -> Path:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        path = self.artifact_root / task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return path\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def handoff_path(self, task: TaskRecord, stage: StageRecord) -> Path:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self.task_dir(task.task_id) / f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{stage.stage_order:02d}_{stage.stage_type}_handoff.md\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def output_path(self, task: TaskRecord, stage: StageRecord) -> Path:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self.task_dir(task.task_id) / f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{stage.stage_order:02d}_{stage.stage_type}_output.md\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def generate(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        previous_stages: Iterable[StageRecord],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        previous = list(previous_stages)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        previous_stage_name = previous[-1].stage_type if previous else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bootstrap\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        lines = [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"# Handoff: {previous_stage_name} -> {stage.stage_type}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"## Task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            task.title,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"## Description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            task.description,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        ]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if task.goal:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            lines.extend([\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"## Goal\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", task.goal, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"])\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        lines.extend(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"## Context\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"- Complexity: {task.complexity}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"- Current Stage: {stage.stage_type} ({stage.model_role})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"- Working Directory: {task.working_dir or '.'}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            ]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if previous:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            lines.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"## Previous Stage Output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for previous_stage in previous:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                summary = previous_stage.result_summary or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No summary recorded.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                lines.extend(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"### {previous_stage.stage_type}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        summary.strip(),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    ]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        lines.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"## Current Stage Instructions\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        instruction = stage.metadata.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"instructions\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") if stage.metadata else None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if instruction:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            lines.append(str(instruction).strip())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        else:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            lines.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Complete the `{stage.stage_type}` stage for this task in `{task.working_dir or '.'}`.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        lines.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        verify_cmd = stage.verify_cmd or task.verify_cmd\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if verify_cmd:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            lines.extend([\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"## Verification\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Run: `{verify_cmd}`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"])\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(lines).rstrip() + self.generate(task, stage, previous_stages)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        path = self.handoff_path(task, stage)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        path.write_text(content, {hours}h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _fetch_quota_for_account(acc: account.CodexAccount) -> quota.CodexQuota:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    acc = quota.fetch_quota(acc.access_token, acc.account_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        raise\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _fetch_quotas_parallel(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    accounts: for future in as_completed(futures):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            acc = futures[future]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                results.append((acc, future.result()))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            except Exception as exc:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                errors.append((acc, exc))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return results, error\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{marker} {acc.email.ljust(max_email)}  {plan.ljust(5)}  error: {err_msg}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef cmd_list(_: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    accounts = _load_accounts_in_order()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    active_email = account.get_active_email()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    for acc in accounts:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        marker = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\">\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if acc.email == active_email else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{marker} {acc.email}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef cmd_switch(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    target = account.set_active_account(args.email)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Active account set to {target.email}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef cmd_import(_: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    acc = account.import_current_account()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Imported account {acc.email}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef cmd_login(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    cmd = [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"login\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.device_auth:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        cmd.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--device-auth\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        subprocess.run(cmd, check=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except FileNotFoundError as exc:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex CLI not found on PATH\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", file=sys.stderr)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except subprocess.CalledProcessError as exc:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex login failed: {exc}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", file=sys.stderr)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return exc.returncode or 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef cmd_remove(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    account.remove_account(args.email)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Removed account {args.email}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef cmd_rotate(_: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    accounts = _load_accounts_in_order()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not accounts:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No accounts found.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    results, errors = _fetch_quotas_parallel(accounts)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if errors:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for acc, err in errors:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to fetch quota for {acc.email}: {err}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", file=sys.stderr)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    candidates = [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        (acc, quo)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for acc, quo in results\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not quo.weekly_limit_reached and not acc.disabled\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not candidates:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"All accounts are exhausted or disabled.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    best_acc, best_quota = min(candidates, key=lambda item: item[1].weekly_used_percent)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    active_email = account.get_active_email()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    best_remaining = 100 - best_quota.weekly_used_percent\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if best_acc.email == active_email:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Already on best account {best_acc.email} ({best_remaining}% remaining).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    account.set_active_account(best_acc.email)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Switched to {best_acc.email} ({best_remaining}% remaining).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Codex multi-account manager\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    sub = parser.add_subparsers(dest=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", required=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    sub.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Show quota status for all accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    sub.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"list\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"List accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    switch_parser = sub.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"switch\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Switch active account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    switch_parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    sub.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"import\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Import current ~/.codex/auth.json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    login_parser = sub.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"login\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Run codex login\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    login_parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--device-auth\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", action=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"store_true\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    remove_parser = sub.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"remove\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Remove an account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    remove_parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    sub.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rotate\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Switch to account with most quota remaining\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return parser\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    parser = build_parser()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    args = parser.parse_args(argv)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return cmd_status(args)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"list\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return cmd_list(args)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"switch\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return cmd_switch(args)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"import\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return cmd_import(args)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"login\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return cmd_login(args)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"remove\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return cmd_remove(args)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rotate\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return cmd_rotate(args)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    parser.print_help()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nif __name__ == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"__main__\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    raise Chat2APIClient:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Simple stdlib HTTP client for the local chat2api gateway.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        base_url: str = settings.CHAT2API_BASE_URL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        timeout: float = settings.CHAT2API_TIMEOUT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        catalog_path: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_ROLE_MODELS_PATH,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.base_url = base_url.rstrip(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.timeout = timeout\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self._model_map = self._load_model_map(catalog_path)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    @staticmethod\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _load_model_map(catalog_path: str | Path) -> dict[str, str]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Build semantic-name \\\\\\\\u2192 chat2api_id mapping from role_models.yaml.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            with open(catalog_path, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as fh:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                catalog = yaml.safe_load(fh) or {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except (OSError, yaml.YAMLError):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            name: info[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chat2api_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for name, info in catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).items()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chat2api_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in info\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def resolve_model(self, model: str) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Map a semantic model name to its chat2api ID, passthrough if unknown.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self._model_map.get(model, model)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def list_models(self) -> list[str]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        payload = self._get_json(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/v1/models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return [item[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"] for item in payload.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"data\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", []) if \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in item]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def chat(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        model: str,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        prompt: str,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        system: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        messages: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if system:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            messages.append({\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"role\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"system\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": system})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        messages.append({\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"role\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"user\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": prompt})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        payload =
