{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_18","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,260p' harness/task_queue.py\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}
{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_18","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,260p' harness/task_queue.py\"","aggregated_output":"\"\"\"SQLite-backed task and stage queue.\"\"\"\nfrom __future__ import annotations\n\nimport json\nimport uuid\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\nfrom typing import Iterable, Optional\n\nfrom harness.db import HarnessDB\nfrom harness.models import (\n    PermissionRequestRecord,\n    PlannedStage,\n    QuotaEventRecord,\n    RiskLevel,\n    StageRecord,\n    StageStatus,\n    TaskRecord,\n    TaskStatus,\n)\n\n\ndef utcnow_iso() -> str:\n    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat()\n\n\nclass TaskQueue:\n    \"\"\"CRUD layer for tasks, stages, and audit tables.\"\"\"\n\n    def __init__(self, db: HarnessDB) -> None:\n        self.db = db\n\n    def create_task(\n        self,\n        title: str,\n        description: str,\n        *,\n        goal: Optional[str] = None,\n        verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None,\n        complexity: str = \"medium\",\n        priority: int = 50,\n        status: TaskStatus = TaskStatus.PENDING,\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\n        task_id: Optional[str] = None,\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\n        now = utcnow_iso()\n        record = TaskRecord(\n            task_id=task_id or uuid.uuid4().hex,\n            title=title,\n            description=description,\n            goal=goal,\n            verify_cmd=verify_cmd,\n            complexity=complexity,\n            priority=priority,\n            status=status,\n            working_dir=working_dir,\n            created_at=now,\n            updated_at=now,\n        )\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                INSERT INTO tasks (\n                    task_id, title, description, goal, verify_cmd, complexity,\n                    priority, status, working_dir, created_at, updated_at\n                ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n                \"\"\",\n                (\n                    record.task_id,\n                    record.title,\n                    record.description,\n                    record.goal,\n                    record.verify_cmd,\n                    record.complexity,\n                    record.priority,\n                    record.status.value,\n                    record.working_dir,\n                    record.created_at,\n                    record.updated_at,\n                ),\n            )\n        return record\n\n    def get_task(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            row = conn.execute(\"SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE task_id = ?\", (task_id,)).fetchone()\n        return self._row_to_task(row) if row else None\n\n    def list_tasks(self, status: Optional[TaskStatus] = None) -> list[TaskRecord]:\n        query = \"SELECT * FROM tasks\"\n        params: tuple[object, ...] = ()\n        if status is not None:\n            query += \" WHERE status = ?\"\n            params = (status.value,)\n        query += \" ORDER BY priority DESC, created_at ASC\"\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            rows = conn.execute(query, params).fetchall()\n        return [self._row_to_task(row) for row in rows]\n\n    def pick_next_runnable_task(self) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            row = conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                SELECT * FROM tasks\n                WHERE status IN (?, ?, ?)\n                ORDER BY\n                    CASE status\n                        WHEN ? THEN 0\n                        WHEN ? THEN 1\n                        ELSE 2\n                    END,\n                    priority DESC,\n                    created_at ASC\n                LIMIT 1\n                \"\"\",\n                (\n                    TaskStatus.EXECUTING.value,\n                    TaskStatus.PENDING.value,\n                    TaskStatus.PLANNING.value,\n                    TaskStatus.EXECUTING.value,\n                    TaskStatus.PENDING.value,\n                ),\n            ).fetchone()\n        return self._row_to_task(row) if row else None\n\n    def update_task_status(self, task_id: str, status: TaskStatus) -> None:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"UPDATE tasks SET status = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE task_id = ?\",\n                (status.value, utcnow_iso(), task_id),\n            )\n\n    def update_task_working_dir(self, task_id: str, working_dir: str) -> None:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"UPDATE tasks SET working_dir = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE task_id = ?\",\n                (working_dir, utcnow_iso(), task_id),\n            )\n\n    def save_stages(self, task_id: str, stages: Iterable[PlannedStage]) -> list[StageRecord]:\n        now = utcnow_iso()\n        records: list[StageRecord] = []\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            for planned in stages:\n                record = StageRecord(\n                    stage_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\n                    task_id=task_id,\n                    stage_type=planned.stage_type,\n                    stage_order=planned.stage_order,\n                    model_role=planned.model_role,\n                    assigned_model=None,\n                    assigned_provider=None,\n                    status=StageStatus.PENDING,\n                    handoff_doc_path=None,\n                    result_summary=None,\n                    token_used=0,\n                    duration_sec=0.0,\n                    started_at=None,\n                    finished_at=None,\n                    retry_count=0,\n                    verify_cmd=planned.verify_cmd,\n                    metadata=dict(planned.metadata),\n                )\n                conn.execute(\n                    \"\"\"\n                    INSERT INTO stages (\n                        stage_id, task_id, stage_type, stage_order, model_role,\n                        assigned_model, assigned_provider, status, handoff_doc_path,\n                        result_summary, token_used, duration_sec, started_at,\n                        finished_at, retry_count, verify_cmd, metadata\n                    ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n                    \"\"\",\n                    (\n                        record.stage_id,\n                        record.task_id,\n                        record.stage_type,\n                        record.stage_order,\n                        record.model_role,\n                        record.assigned_model,\n                        record.assigned_provider,\n                        record.status.value,\n                        record.handoff_doc_path,\n                        record.result_summary,\n                        record.token_used,\n                        record.duration_sec,\n                        record.started_at,\n                        record.finished_at,\n                        record.retry_count,\n                        record.verify_cmd,\n                        json.dumps(record.metadata),\n                    ),\n                )\n                records.append(record)\n            conn.execute(\n                \"UPDATE tasks SET updated_at = ? WHERE task_id = ?\",\n                (now, task_id),\n            )\n        return records\n\n    def count_stages(self, task_id: str) -> int:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            row = conn.execute(\"SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM stages WHERE task_id = ?\", (task_id,)).fetchone()\n        return int(row[\"count\"])\n\n    def get_stage(self, stage_id: str) -> Optional[StageRecord]:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            row = conn.execute(\"SELECT * FROM stages WHERE stage_id = ?\", (stage_id,)).fetchone()\n        return self._row_to_stage(row) if row else None\n\n    def list_stages(self, task_id: str) -> list[StageRecord]:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            rows = conn.execute(\n                \"SELECT * FROM stages WHERE task_id = ? ORDER BY stage_order ASC\",\n                (task_id,),\n            ).fetchall()\n        return [self._row_to_stage(row) for row in rows]\n\n    def list_completed_stages(self, task_id: str) -> list[StageRecord]:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            rows = conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                SELECT * FROM stages\n                WHERE task_id = ? AND status IN (?, ?)\n                ORDER BY stage_order ASC\n                \"\"\",\n                (task_id, StageStatus.DONE.value, StageStatus.SKIPPED.value),\n            ).fetchall()\n        return [self._row_to_stage(row) for row in rows]\n\n    def next_pending_stage(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[StageRecord]:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            row = conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                SELECT * FROM stages\n                WHERE task_id = ? AND status = ?\n                ORDER BY stage_order ASC\n                LIMIT 1\n                \"\"\",\n                (task_id, StageStatus.PENDING.value),\n            ).fetchone()\n        return self._row_to_stage(row) if row else None\n\n    def assign_stage_model(self, stage_id: str, model: str, provider: str) -> None:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                UPDATE stages\n                SET assigned_model = ?, assigned_provider = ?\n                WHERE stage_id = ?\n                \"\"\",\n                (model, provider, stage_id),\n            )\n\n    def mark_stage_running(self, stage_id: str, handoff_doc_path: str) -> None:\n        now = utcnow_iso()\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                UPDATE stages\n                SET status = ?, handoff_doc_path = ?, started_at = ?\n                WHERE stage_id = ?\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}
{"type":"item.started","item":{"id":"item_19","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,260p' tests/harness/test_task_queue.py\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}
{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_19","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,260p' tests/harness/test_task_queue.py\"","aggregated_output":"from harness.db import HarnessDB\nfrom harness.models import PlannedStage, TaskStatus\nfrom harness.task_queue import TaskQueue\n\n\ndef test_task_queue_creates_and_orders_tasks(tmp_path) -> None:\n    queue = TaskQueue(HarnessDB(tmp_path / \"harness.db\"))\n\n    low = queue.create_task(\"low\", \"low priority task\", priority=10, status=TaskStatus.PENDING)\n    high = queue.create_task(\"high\", \"high priority task\", priority=90, status=TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\n    queue.save_stages(high.task_id, [PlannedStage(stage_type=\"code\", stage_order=1, model_role=\"coder\")])\n    queue.save_stages(low.task_id, [PlannedStage(stage_type=\"code\", stage_order=1, model_role=\"coder\")])\n\n    picked = queue.pick_next_runnable_task()\n\n    assert picked is not None\n    assert picked.task_id == high.task_id\n    assert queue.next_pending_stage(high.task_id).stage_type == \"code\"\n\n\ndef test_task_queue_updates_stage_lifecycle(tmp_path) -> None:\n    queue = TaskQueue(HarnessDB(tmp_path / \"harness.db\"))\n    task = queue.create_task(\"task\", \"desc\", status=TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\n    [stage] = queue.save_stages(\n        task.task_id,\n        [\n            PlannedStage(\n                stage_type=\"code\",\n                stage_order=1,\n                model_role=\"coder\",\n                verify_cmd=\"pytest tests/test_feature.py\",\n            )\n        ],\n    )\n\n    queue.assign_stage_model(stage.stage_id, \"gpt-5.4-codex\", \"codex\")\n    queue.mark_stage_running(stage.stage_id, \"/tmp/handoff.md\")\n    queue.complete_stage(stage.stage_id, result_summary=\"Implemented feature.\", token_used=123, duration_sec=4.5)\n\n    loaded = queue.get_stage(stage.stage_id)\n    assert loaded is not None\n    assert loaded.assigned_model == \"gpt-5.4-codex\"\n    assert loaded.handoff_doc_path == \"/tmp/handoff.md\"\n    assert loaded.result_summary == \"Implemented feature.\"\n    assert loaded.token_used == 123\n    assert loaded.duration_sec == 4.5\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

?\n                \"\"\",\n                (StageStatus.RUNNING.value, handoff_doc_path, now, stage_id),\n            )\n\n    def complete_stage(\n        self,\n        stage_id: str,\n        *,\n        result_summary: Optional[str] = None,\n        token_used: int = 0,\n        duration_sec: float = 0.0,\n    ) -> None:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                UPDATE stages\n                SET status = ?, result_summary = ?, token_used = ?, duration_sec = ?,\n                    finished_at = ?\n                WHERE stage_id = ?\n                \"\"\",\n                (\n                    StageStatus.DONE.value,\n                    result_summary,\n                    token_used,\n                    duration_sec,\n                    utcnow_iso(),\n                    stage_id,\n                ),\n            )\n\n    def skip_stage(self, stage_id: str, *, result_summary: Optional[str] = None) -> None:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                UPDATE stages\n                SET status = ?, result_summary = ?, finished_at = ?\n                WHERE stage_id = ?\n                \"\"\",\n                (StageStatus.SKIPPED.value, result_summary, utcnow_iso(), stage_id),\n            )\n\n    def reset_stage_to_pending(self, stage_id: str, *, retry_count: Optional[int] = None) -> None:\n        query = \"UPDATE stages SET status = ?, started_at = NULL\"\n        params: list[object] = [StageStatus.PENDING.value]\n        if retry_count is not None:\n            query += \", retry_count = ?\"\n            params.append(retry_count)\n        query += \" WHERE stage_id = ?\"\n        params.append(stage_id)\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(query, tuple(params))\n\n    def fail_stage(self, stage_id: str, *, result_summary: Optional[str], retry_count: int) -> None:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                UPDATE stages\n                SET status = ?, result_summary = ?, retry_count = ?, finished_at = ?\n                WHERE stage_id = ?\n                \"\"\",\n                (\n                    StageStatus.FAILED.value,\n                    result_summary,\n                    retry_count,\n                    utcnow_iso(),\n                    stage_id,\n                ),\n            )\n\n    def log_permission_request(self, record: PermissionRequestRecord) -> None:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                INSERT INTO permission_requests (\n                    request_id, stage_id, action, context, risk_level,\n                    decision, voters, decided_at\n                ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n                \"\"\",\n                (\n                    record.request_id,\n                    record.stage_id,\n                    record.action,\n                    record.context,\n                    record.risk_level.value,\n                    record.decision,\n                    json.dumps(record.voters),\n                    record.decided_at,\n                ),\n            )\n\n    def list_permission_requests(self, stage_id: Optional[str] = None) -> list[PermissionRequestRecord]:\n        query = \"SELECT * FROM permission_requests\"\n        params: tuple[object, ...] = ()\n        if stage_id is not None:\n            query += \" WHERE stage_id = ?\"\n            params = (stage_id,)\n        query += \" ORDER BY decided_at ASC, request_id ASC\"\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            rows = conn.execute(query, params).fetchall()\n        records: list[PermissionRequestRecord] = []\n        for row in rows:\n            records.append(\n                PermissionRequestRecord(\n                    request_id=row[\"request_id\"],\n                    stage_id=row[\"stage_id\"],\n                    action=row[\"action\"],\n                    context=row[\"context\"],\n                    risk_level=RiskLevel(row[\"risk_level\"]),\n                    decision=row[\"decision\"],\n                    voters=json.loads(row[\"voters\"] or \"[]\"),\n                    decided_at=row[\"decided_at\"],\n                )\n            )\n        return records\n\n    def log_quota_event(self, record: QuotaEventRecord) -> None:\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            conn.execute(\n                \"\"\"\n                INSERT INTO quota_events (\n                    event_id, provider, account_email, event_type, details, created_at\n                ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n                \"\"\",\n                (\n                    record.event_id,\n                    record.provider,\n                    record.account_email,\n                    record.event_type,\n                    json.dumps(record.details),\n                    record.created_at,\n                ),\n            )\n\n    def list_quota_events(self, provider: Optional[str] = None) -> list[QuotaEventRecord]:\n        query = \"SELECT * FROM quota_events\"\n        params: tuple[object, ...] = ()\n        if provider is not None:\n            query += \" WHERE provider = ?\"\n            params = (provider,)\n        query += \" ORDER BY created_at ASC, event_id ASC\"\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\n            rows = conn.execute(query, params).fetchall()\n        records: list[QuotaEventRecord] = []\n        for row in rows:\n            records.append(\n                QuotaEventRecord(\n                    event_id=row[\"event_id\"],\n                    provider=row[\"provider\"],\n                    account_email=row[\"account_email\"],\n                    event_type=row[\"event_type\"],\n                    details=json.loads(row[\"details\"] or \"{}\"),\n                    created_at=row[\"created_at\"],\n                )\n            )\n        return records\n\n    def _row_to_task(self, row) -> TaskRecord:\n        return TaskRecord(\n            task_id=row[\"task_id\"],\n            title=row[\"title\"],\n            description=row[\"description\"],\n            goal=row[\"goal\"],\n            verify_cmd=row[\"verify_cmd\"],\n            complexity=row[\"complexity\"],\n            priority=row[\"priority\"],\n            status=TaskStatus(row[\"status\"]),\n            working_dir=row[\"working_dir\"],\n            created_at=row[\"created_at\"],\n            updated_at=row[\"updated_at\"],\n        )\n\n    def _row_to_stage(self, row) -> StageRecord:\n        metadata = row[\"metadata\"]\n        parsed_metadata = json.loads(metadata) if metadata else {}\n        return StageRecord(\n            stage_id=row[\"stage_id\"],\n            task_id=row[\"task_id\"],\n            stage_type=row[\"stage_type\"],\n            stage_order=row[\"stage_order\"],\n            model_role=row[\"model_role\"],\n            assigned_model=row[\"assigned_model\"],\n            assigned_provider=row[\"assigned_provider\"],\n            status=StageStatus(row[\"status\"]),\n            handoff_doc_path=row[\"handoff_doc_path\"],\n            result_summary=row[\"result_summary\"],\n            token_used=row[\"token_used\"],\n            duration_sec=row[\"duration_sec\"],\n            started_at=row[\"started_at\"],\n            finished_at=row[\"finished_at\"],\n            retry_count=row[\"retry_count\"],\n            verify_cmd=row[\"verify_cmd\"],\n            metadata=parsed_metadata,\n        )\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}
{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_20","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,260p' tests/harness/test_main.py\"","aggregated_output":"import asyncio\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\nfrom harness.main import Harness\nfrom harness.models import ModelChoice, PlannedStage, StageExecutionResult, StageStatus, TaskStatus\nfrom harness.stage_executor import CommandExecution\n\n\nclass DummyRouter:\n    def select_model(self, task, stage, **kwargs):\n        return ModelChoice(model=\"gpt-5.4-codex\", provider=\"codex\", reason=\"test\")\n\n    def can_run_stage(self, task, stage, **kwargs):\n        return True\n\n\nclass DummyExecutor:\n    def __init__(self) -> None:\n        self.executed = []\n\n    async def execute(self, stage, handoff_doc_path, working_dir):\n        self.executed.append((stage.stage_type, handoff_doc_path, working_dir))\n        return StageExecutionResult(\n            stage_id=stage.stage_id,\n            status=StageStatus.DONE,\n            raw_output=\"implemented feature\",\n            summary=\"implemented feature\",\n            files_changed=[\"src/feature.py\"],\n        )\n\n    async def run_verify_cmd(self, verify_cmd, working_dir):\n        return CommandExecution(returncode=0, stdout=\"ok\", stderr=\"\")\n\n\ndef test_harness_run_once_executes_stage_and_finishes_task(tmp_path) -> None:\n    executor = DummyExecutor()\n    harness = Harness(\n        db_path=tmp_path / \"harness.db\",\n        artifact_root=tmp_path / \"artifacts\",\n        quota_router=DummyRouter(),\n        stage_executor=executor,\n    )\n    task = harness.task_queue.create_task(\n        \"task\",\n        \"desc\",\n        status=TaskStatus.EXECUTING,\n        working_dir=str(tmp_path),\n    )\n    harness.task_queue.save_stages(\n        task.task_id,\n        [PlannedStage(stage_type=\"code\", stage_order=1, model_role=\"coder\")],\n    )\n\n    asyncio.run(harness.run_once())\n\n    updated_task = harness.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\n    [stage] = harness.task_queue.list_stages(task.task_id)\n\n    assert updated_task is not None\n    assert updated_task.status == TaskStatus.DONE\n    assert stage.status == StageStatus.DONE\n    assert stage.handoff_doc_path is not None\n    assert Path(stage.handoff_doc_path).exists()\n    assert executor.executed == [(\"code\", stage.handoff_doc_path, str(tmp_path))]\n\n\ndef test_harness_recovers_paused_quota_tasks(tmp_path) -> None:\n    executor = DummyExecutor()\n    harness = Harness(\n        db_path=tmp_path / \"harness.db\",\n        artifact_root=tmp_path / \"artifacts\",\n        quota_router=DummyRouter(),\n        stage_executor=executor,\n    )\n    task = harness.task_queue.create_task(\n        \"task\",\n        \"desc\",\n        status=TaskStatus.PAUSED_QUOTA,\n        working_dir=str(tmp_path),\n    )\n    harness.task_queue.save_stages(\n        task.task_id,\n        [PlannedStage(stage_type=\"code\", stage_order=1, model_role=\"coder\")],\n    )\n\n    asyncio.run(harness.run_once())\n\n    updated_task = harness.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\n    assert updated_task is not None\n    assert updated_task.status == TaskStatus.DONE\n\n\ndef test_harness_inspect_includes_permission_requests(tmp_path) -> None:\n    executor = DummyExecutor()\n    harness = Harness(\n        db_path=tmp_path / \"harness.db\",\n        artifact_root=tmp_path / \"artifacts\",\n        quota_router=DummyRouter(),\n        stage_executor=executor,\n    )\n    task = harness.task_queue.create_task(\"task\", \"desc\", status=TaskStatus.EXECUTING, working_dir=str(tmp_path))\n    [stage] = harness.task_queue.save_stages(\n        task.task_id,\n        [PlannedStage(stage_type=\"code\", stage_order=1, model_role=\"coder\")],\n    )\n    from harness.models import PermissionRequestRecord, RiskLevel\n\n    harness.task_queue.log_permission_request(\n        PermissionRequestRecord(\n            request_id=\"req-1\",\n            stage_id=stage.stage_id,\n            action=\"git push origin main\",\n            context=\"task=demo\",\n            risk_level=RiskLevel.DANGEROUS,\n            decision=\"needs_user_approval\",\n            voters=[{\"model\": \"gpt-5.4-codex\", \"vote\": \"REJECT\", \"reason\": \"too risky\"}],\n            decided_at=\"2026-03-27T00:00:00+00:00\",\n        )\n    )\n\n    data = harness.inspect_task(task.task_id)\n\n    assert data[\"task\"][\"task_id\"] == task.task_id\n    assert data[\"permission_requests\"][0][\"action\"] == \"git push origin main\"\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

_is_codex_running,\n    ACCOUNTS_DIR,\n    ACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH,\n)\n\n\n@pytest.fixture\ndef mock_fs(monkeypatch, tmp_path):\n    accounts_dir = tmp_path / \"accounts\"\n    accounts_index = accounts_index, \"auth\": codex_auth}\n\n\ndef test_add_and_list_accounts(mock_fs):\n    tokens = {\"access_token\": \"a1\", \"refresh_token\": \"r1\", \"id_token\": \"i1\"}\n\n    acc = add_account(\"test@example.com\", tokens, account_id=\"acc123\")\n    assert acc.email == \"test@example.com\"\n    assert acc.account_id == \"acc123\"\n\n    accounts = list_accounts()\n    assert accounts == [\"test@example.com\"]\n\n    acc2 = add_account(\"test2@example.com\", tokens, account_id=\"acc456\", set_active=True)\n    assert acc2.email == \"test2@example.com\"\n    assert get_active_email() == \"test2@example.com\"\n    assert \"test2@example.com\" in list_accounts()\n\n\ndef test_load_all_accounts(mock_fs):\n    tokens = {\"access_token\": \"a\", \"refresh_token\": \"r\"}\n    add_account(\"a@1\", tokens)\n    add_account(\"b@1\", tokens)\n\n    loaded = load_all_accounts()\n    assert len(loaded) == 2\n    emails = [a.email for a in loaded]\n    assert \"a@1\" in emails\n    assert \"b@1\" in emails\n\n\ndef test_add_account_missing_tokens():\n    with pytest.raises(RuntimeError, match=\"Missing access_token or refresh_token\"):\n        add_account(\"test@test.com\", {\"id_token\": \"only\"})\n\n\ndef test_remove_account(mock_fs):\n    tokens = {\"access_token\": \"a\", \"refresh_token\": \"r\"}\n    add_account(\"test@test.com\", tokens, set_active=True)\n    assert get_active_email() == \"test@test.com\"\n\n    remove_account(\"test@test.com\")\n    assert list_accounts() == []\n    assert get_active_email() == \"\"\n    with pytest.raises(FileNotFoundError):\n        load_account(\"test@test.com\")\n\n\ndef test_get_active_account_none(mock_fs):\n    with pytest.raises(RuntimeError, match=\"No active account set\"):\n        get_active_account()\n\n\n@mock.patch(\"models.codex.account.auth.ensure_fresh_tokens\")\n@mock.patch(\"models.codex.account.auth.extract_account_info\")\ndef test_refresh_account_tokens(mock_extract, mock_ensure_fresh, mock_fs):\n    mock_ensure_fresh.return_value = {\n        \"access_token\": \"new_a\",\n        \"refresh_token\": \"new_r\",\n        \"id_token\": \"new_i\",\n        \"account_id\": \"new_acc\",\n    }\n    mock_info = mock.MagicMock()\n    mock_info.account_id = \"new_acc\"\n    mock_info.plan_type = \"plus\"\n    mock_extract.return_value = mock_info\n\n    tokens = {\"access_token\": \"a\", \"refresh_token\": \"r\"}\n    acc = add_account(\"test@test\", tokens)\n\n    refreshed = refresh_account_tokens(acc)\n    assert refreshed.access_token == \"new_a\"\n    assert refreshed.refresh_token == \"new_r\"\n    assert refreshed.account_id == \"new_acc\"\n    assert refreshed.plan_type == \"plus\"\n\n\n@mock.patch(\"models.codex.auth.read_codex_auth\")\ndef test_import_current_account(mock_read_auth, mock_fs):\n    mock_read_auth.return_value = {\n        \"tokens\": {\n mock.patch(\"models.codex.account.auth.extract_account_info\") as mock_extract:\n        mock_info = mock.MagicMock()\n        mock_info.email = \"current@example.com\"\n        mock_info.account_id = \"curr_acc\"\n        mock_info.plan_type = \"free\"\n        mock_extract.return_value = mock_info\n\n        acc = import_current_account()\n        assert acc.email == \"current@example.com\"\n        assert get_active_email() == \"current@example.com\"\n\n\n@mock.patch(\"subprocess.run\")\ndef test_is_codex_running(mock_run):\n    mock_result = mock.MagicMock()\n    mock_result.returncode = 0\n    mock_run.return_value = mock_result\n    assert _is_codex_running() is True\n\n    mock_result.returncode = 1\n    assert _is_codex_running() is False\n\n    mock_run.side_effect = FileNotFoundError()\n    assert _is_codex_running() is False\n\n\n@mock.patch(\"models.codex.account._is_codex_running\", return_value=False)\n@mock.patch(\"models.codex.account.refresh_account_tokens\")\ndef test_set_active_account(mock_refresh, mock_is_running, mock_fs):\n    # Setup two accounts\n    tokens1 = {\"access_token\": \"a1\", \"refresh_token\": \"r1\"}\n    tokens2 = {\"access_token\": \"a2\", \"refresh_token\": \"r2\"}\n    \n    add_account(\"old@a\", tokens1, set_active=True)\n    add_account(\"new@a\", tokens2)\n\n    # Set mock refresh to just return the account as-is (already tested refresh logic)\n    mock_refresh.side_effect = lambda a, **kw: a\n\n    # Fake current auth.json\n    from models.codex.auth import write_codex_auth\n    write_codex_auth({\"access_token\": \"a1\", \"refresh_token\": \"r1\", \"account_id\": \"old-acc\"})\n\n    with        mock_info.plan_type = \"free\"\n        mock_extract.return_value = mock_info\n\n        # Perform switch\n        target = set_active_account(\"new@a\")\n        \n        assert target.email == \"new@a\"\n        assert get_active_email() == \"new@a\"\n        \n        # Verify auth.json was rewritten properly\n        from models.codex.auth import read_codex_auth\n        new_auth = read_codex_auth()\n        assert new_auth[\"tokens\"][\"access_token\"] == \"a2\"\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_25","type":"command_execution","command":"/bin/bash -lc \"sed -n '1,220p' tests/codex/test_quota.py\"","aggregated_output":"import json\nimport urllib.error\nfrom unittest import mock\n\nimport pytest\nfrom models.codex.account import CodexAccount\nfrom models.codex.quota import CodexQuota, QuotaError, fetch_all_quotas, fetch_quota\n\n\n@pytest.fixture\ndef mock_usage_response():\n    return {\n        \"email\": \"test@example.com\",\n        \"plan_type\": \"free\",\n        \"rate_limit\": {\n            \"limit_reached\": False,\n            \"primary_window\": {\n                \"used_percent\": 42,\n                \"reset_at\": 1700000000,\n            },\n            \"secondary_window\": None,\n        },\n        \"code_review_rate_limit\": {\n            \"primary_window\": {\n                \"used_percent\": 10,\n                \"reset_at\": 1700000001,\n            }\n        },\n    }\n\n\n@mock.patch(\"urllib.request.urlopen\")\ndef test_fetch_quota_success(mock_urlopen, mock_usage_response):\n    mock_resp = mock.MagicMock()\n    mock_resp.read.return_value = json.dumps(mock_usage_response).encode(\"utf-8\")\n    mock_urlopen.return_value.__enter__.return_value = mock_resp\n\n    quota = fetch_quota(\"fake_access\", \"fake_account_id\")\n\n    assert quota.email == \"test@example.com\"\n    assert quota.plan_type == \"free\"\n    assert quota.weekly_used_percent == 42\n    assert quota.weekly_reset_at == 1700000000\n    assert quota.weekly_limit_reached is False\n    assert quota.burst_used_percent == 0\n    assert quota.code_review_used_percent == 10\n    assert quota.code_review_reset_at == 1700000001\n    assert quota.raw == mock_usage_response\n\n\n@mock.patch(\"urllib.request.urlopen\")\ndef test_fetch_quota_http_error(mock_urlopen):\n    mock_error = urllib.error.HTTPError(\n        url=\"https://chatgpt.com/backend-api/wham/usage\",\n        code=403,\n        msg=\"Forbidden\",\n        hdrs={},\n        fp=mock.MagicMock(),\n    )\n    # Give the mock fp a working read() method that returns bytes so decode() works\n    mock_error.read = mock.MagicMock(return_value=b\"Custom error body\")\n    mock_urlopen.side_effect = mock_error\n\n    with pytest.raises(QuotaError, match=\"Quota fetch failed: HTTP 403 Custom error body\") as exc:\n        fetch_quota(\"fake_access\", \"fake_account_id\")\n    assert exc.value.status_code == 403\n\n\n@mock.patch(\"urllib.request.urlopen\")\ndef test_fetch_quota_url_error(mock_urlopen):\n    mock_urlopen.side_effect = urllib.error.URLError(\"Connection reset by peer\")\n\n    with pytest.raises(QuotaError, match=\"Quota fetch failed: Connection reset by peer\"):\n        fetch_quota(\"fake_access\", \"fake_account_id\")\n\n\n@mock.patch(\"urllib.request.urlopen\")\ndef test_fetch_quota_invalid_json(mock_urlopen):\n    mock_resp = mock.MagicMock()\n    mock_resp.read.return_value = b\"<!DOCTYPE html><html>...</html>\"\n    mock_urlopen.return_value.__enter__.return_value = mock_resp\n\n    with pytest.raises(QuotaError, match=\"Quota response was not valid JSON\"):\n        fetch_quota(\"fake_access\", \"fake_account_id\")\n\n\n@mock.patch(\"models.codex.quota.fetch_quota\")\ndef test_fetch_all_quotas_success(mock_fetch_quota):\n    acc1 = CodexAccount(\"a@test\", \"tok1\", \"\", \"\", \"id1\", \"free\", {}, False, 0, 0)\n    acc2 = CodexAccount(\"b@test\", \"tok2\", \"\", \"\", \"id2\", \"plus\", {}, False, 0, 0)\n\n    q1 = CodexQuota(\"a@test\", \"free\", 10, 0, False, 0, 0, 0, 0)\n    q2 = CodexQuota(\"b@test\", \"plus\", 20, 0, False, 0, 0, 0, 0)\n\n    # Return q1 for a@test, q2 for b@test\n    def mock_fetch(access, account_id):\n        if access == \"tok1\":\n            return q1\n        return q2\n\n    mock_fetch_quota.side_effect = mock_fetch\n\n    results = fetch_all_quotas([acc1, acc2])\n    assert len(results) == 2\n    assert q1 in results\n    assert q2 in results\n\n\n@mock.patch(\"models.codex.quota.fetch_quota\")\ndef test_fetch_all_quotas_partial_failure(mock_fetch_quota):\n    acc1 = CodexAccount(\"a@test\", \"tok1\", \"\", \"\", \"id1\", \"free\", {}, False, 0, 0)\n    acc2 = CodexAccount(\"b@test\", \"tok2\", \"\", \"\", \"id2\", \"free\", {}, False, 0, 0)\n\n    def mock_fetch(access, account_id):\n        if access == \"tok1\":\n            return CodexQuota(\"a@test\", \"free\", 10, 0, False, 0, 0, 0, 0)\n        raise QuotaError(\"Simulated failure\")\n\n    mock_fetch_quota.side_effect = mock_fetch\n\n    with pytest.raises(QuotaError, match=\"Failed to fetch quota for some accounts: b@test: Simulated failure\"):\n        fetch_all_quotas([acc1, acc2])\n","exit_code":0,"status":"completed"}}

-lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' harness/main.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Harness entry point and scheduler loop.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\n\\\\nimport argparse\\\\nimport asyncio\\\\nimport json\\\\nimport sys\\\\nimport uuid\\\\nfrom dataclasses import asdict\\\\nfrom dataclasses import replace\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\nfrom typing import Optional\\\\n\\\\nfrom config import settings\\\\nfrom harness.checkpoint import CheckpointStore\\\\nfrom harness.db import HarnessDB\\\\nfrom harness.handoff import HandoffProtocol\\\\nfrom harness.intake import IntakeAgent\\\\nfrom harness.models import (\\\\n    IntakeResult,\\\\n    PermissionRequestRecord,\\\\n    QuotaEventRecord,\\\\n    RiskLevel,\\\\n    StageCheckpoint,\\\\n    StageRecord,\\\\n    TaskRecord,\\\\n    TaskStatus,\\\\n)\\\\nfrom harness.permission_gate import PermissionGate\\\\nfrom harness.quota_router import AllQuotaExhaustedError, QuotaRouter\\\\nfrom harness.stage_executor import PermissionBlockedError, QuotaExhaustedError, StageExecutionError, StageExecutor\\\\nfrom harness.task_queue import TaskQueue, utcnow_iso\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass Harness:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Main scheduler that turns queued tasks into stage executions.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        db_path: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_DB_PATH,\\\\n        artifact_root: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_ARTIFACT_DIR,\\\\n        intake_agent: Optional[IntakeAgent] = None,\\\\n        quota_router: Optional[QuotaRouter] = None,\\\\n        stage_executor: Optional[StageExecutor] = None,\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\n        self.db = HarnessDB(db_path)\\\\n        self.task_queue = TaskQueue(self.db)\\\\n        self.handoff = HandoffProtocol(artifact_root)\\\\n        self.checkpoints = CheckpointStore(artifact_root)\\\\n        self.intake = intake_agent or IntakeAgent()\\\\n        self.router = quota_router or QuotaRouter()\\\\n        self.executor = stage_executor or StageExecutor()\\\\n\\\\n    def submit_task(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        description: str,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        title: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n        goal: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n        verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n        priority: int = 50,\\\\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\\\\n        intake = self.intake.plan_task(description, goal=goal, verify_cmd=verify_cmd)\\\\n        if title:\\\\n            intake = replace(intake, title=title)\\\\n        return self.submit_intake(intake, priority=priority, working_dir=working_dir)\\\\n\\\\n    def submit_intake(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        intake: IntakeResult,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        priority: int = 50,\\\\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n        status: TaskStatus = TaskStatus.EXECUTING,\\\\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.create_task(\\\\n            title=intake.title,\\\\n            description=intake.description,\\\\n            goal=intake.goal,\\\\n            verify_cmd=intake.verify_cmd,\\\\n            complexity=intake.complexity,\\\\n            priority=priority,\\\\n            status=status,\\\\n            working_dir=working_dir,\\\\n        )\\\\n        self.task_queue.save_stages(task.task_id, intake.stages)\\\\n        return task\\\\n\\\\n    async def run_once(self) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\\\\n        await self._recover_paused_quota_tasks()\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.pick_next_runnable_task()\\\\n        if task is None:\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n        if self.task_queue.count_stages(task.task_id) == 0:\\\\n            await self._plan_missing_stages(task)\\\\n            task = self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id) or task\\\\n\\\\n        stage = self.task_queue.next_pending_stage(task.task_id)\\\\n        if stage is None:\\\\n            await self._finish_task(task)\\\\n            return self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\\\\n\\\\n        await self._run_stage(task, stage)\\\\n        return self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\\\\n\\\\n    async def run_forever(self, poll_interval_sec: int = settings.HARNESS_POLL_INTERVAL_SEC) -> None:\\\\n        while True:\\\\n            task = await self.run_once()\\\\n            if task is None:\\\\n                await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval_sec)\\\\n\\\\n    def status_report(self) -> list[dict[str, object]]:\\\\n        report: list[dict[str, object]] = []\\\\n        for task in self.task_queue.list_tasks():\\\\n            report.append(\\\\n                {\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\": task.task_id,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\": task.title,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\": task.status.value,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"priority\\\\\\\": task.priority,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"complexity\\\\\\\": task.complexity,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"working_dir\\\\\\\": task.working_dir,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"stages\\\\\\\": [\\\\n                        {\\\\n                            \\\\\\\"stage_type\\\\\\\": stage.stage_type,\\\\n                            \\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\": stage.status.value,\\\\n                            \\\\\\\"assigned_model\\\\\\\": stage.assigned_model,\\\\n                            \\\\\\\"retry_count\\\\\\\": stage.retry_count,\\\\n                        }\\\\n                        for stage in self.task_queue.list_stages(task.task_id)\\\\n                    ],\\\\n                }\\\\n            )\\\\n        return report\\\\n\\\\n    def inspect_task(self, task_id: str) -> dict[str, object]:\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.get_task(task_id)\\\\n        if task is None:\\\\n            raise KeyError(f\\\\\\\"Task not found: {task_id}\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n        stages = self.task_queue.list_stages(task_id)\\\\n        return {\\\\n            \\\\\\\"task\\\\\\\": {\\\\n                \\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\": task.task_id,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\": task.title,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\": task.description,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"goal\\\\\\\": task.goal,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"verify_cmd\\\\\\\": task.verify_cmd,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\": task.status.value,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"priority\\\\\\\": task.priority,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"complexity\\\\\\\": task.complexity,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"working_dir\\\\\\\": task.working_dir,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"created_at\\\\\\\": task.created_at,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"updated_at\\\\\\\": task.updated_at,\\\\n            },\\\\n            \\\\\\\"stages\\\\\\\": [\\\\n                {\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\": stage.stage_id,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"stage_type\\\\\\\": stage.stage_type,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"model_role\\\\\\\": stage.model_role,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\": stage.status.value,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"assigned_model\\\\\\\": stage.assigned_model,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"assigned_provider\\\\\\\": stage.assigned_provider,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"handoff_doc_path\\\\\\\": stage.handoff_doc_path,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"result_summary\\\\\\\": stage.result_summary,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"retry_count\\\\\\\": stage.retry_count,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"verify_cmd\\\\\\\": stage.verify_cmd,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"metadata\\\\\\\": stage.metadata,\\\\n                }\\\\n                for stage in stages\\\\n            ],\\\\n            \\\\\\\"permission_requests\\\\\\\": [\\\\n                {\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"request_id\\\\\\\": item.request_id,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\": item.stage_id,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"action\\\\\\\": item.action,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"risk_level\\\\\\\": item.risk_level.value,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"decision\\\\\\\": item.decision,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"voters\\\\\\\": item.voters,\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"decided_at\\\\\\\": item.decided_at,\\\\n                }\\\\n                for stage in stages\\\\n                for item in self.task_queue.list_permission_requests(stage.stage_id)\\\\n            ],\\\\n            \\\\\\\"checkpoints\\\\\\\": [\\\\n                asdict(checkpoint) for checkpoint in self.checkpoints.list_for_task(task_id)\\\\n            ],\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n    def pause_task(self, task_id: str) -> None:\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task_id, TaskStatus.PAUSED_PERMISSION)\\\\n\\\\n    def resume_task(self, task_id: str) -> None:\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.get_task(task_id)\\\\n        if task is None:\\\\n            raise KeyError(f\\\\\\\"Task not found: {task_id}\\\\\\\")\\\\n        if task.status in {TaskStatus.DONE, TaskStatus.FAILED}:\\\\n            raise ValueError(f\\\\\\\"Cannot resume task in terminal status {task.status.value}\\\\\\\")\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\n\\\\n    def quota_report(self) -> list[dict[str, object]]:\\\\n        snapshots = self.router.quota_manager.fetch_all_quotas()\\\\n        return [\\\\n            {\\\\n                \\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\": snapshot.provider.value,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\": snapshot.email,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"remaining_percent\\\\\\\": snapshot.remaining_percent,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"reset_at\\\\\\\": snapshot.reset_at_readable,\\\\n                \\\\\\\"time_until_reset_hours\\\\\\\": round(snapshot.time_until_reset_hours, 1),\\\\n            }\\\\n            for snapshot in snapshots\\\\n        ]\\\\n\\\\n    async def _plan_missing_stages(self, task: TaskRecord) -> None:\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.PLANNING)\\\\n        intake = self.intake.plan_task(task.description, goal=task.goal, verify_cmd=task.verify_cmd)\\\\n        self.task_queue.save_stages(task.task_id, intake.stages)\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\n\\\\n    async def _recover_paused_quota_tasks(self) -> None:\\\\n        for task in self.task_queue.list_tasks(TaskStatus.PAUSED_QUOTA):\\\\n            stage = self.task_queue.next_pending_stage(task.task_id)\\\\n            if stage is None:\\\\n                continue\\\\n            if self.router.can_run_stage(task, stage):\\\\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\n                self.task_queue.log_quota_event(\\\\n                    QuotaEventRecord(\\\\n                        event_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\n                        provider=stage.assigned_provider or \\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\",\\\\n                        account_email=None,\\\\n                        event_type=\\\\\\\"recovered\\\\\\\",\\\\n                        details={\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\": task.task_id, \\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\": stage.stage_id},\\\\n                        created_at=utcnow_iso(),\\\\n                    )\\\\n                )\\\\n\\\\n    async def _run_stage(self, task: TaskRecord, stage: StageRecord) -> None:\\\\n        try:\\\\n            if not stage.assigned_model or not stage.assigned_provider:\\\\n                choice = self.router.select_model(task, stage)\\\\n                self.task_queue.assign_stage_model(stage.stage_id, choice.model, choice.provider)\\\\n                stage = self.task_queue.get_stage(stage.stage_id) or stage\\\\n\\\\n            previous = self.task_queue.list_completed_stages(task.task_id)\\\\n            handoff_path = self.handoff.write_handoff(task, stage, previous)\\\\n            self.task_queue.mark_stage_running(stage.stage_id, str(handoff_path))\\\\n            stage = self.task_queue.get_stage(stage.stage_id) or stage\\\\n\\\\n            result = await self.executor.execute(stage, str(handoff_path), task.working_dir)\\\\n            if stage.verify_cmd and task.working_dir:\\\\n                verification = await self.executor.run_verify_cmd(stage.verify_cmd, task.working_dir)\\\\n                if verification.returncode != 0:\\\\n                    raise StageExecutionError(verification.stderr.strip() or verification.stdout.strip() or stage.verify_cmd)\\\\n\\\\n            self.handoff.save_stage_output(task, stage, result)\\\\n            self.task_queue.complete_stage(\\\\n\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":0,\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.started\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_5\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/quota_router.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":null,\\\"status\\\":\\\"in_progress\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.completed\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_5\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/quota_router.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Quota-aware model routing.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\n\\\\nimport json\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\\\\n\\\\nimport yaml\\\\n\\\\nfrom config import settings\\\\nfrom harness.chat2api_client import Chat2APIClient\\\\nfrom harness.models import ModelChoice, StageRecord, TaskRecord\\\\nfrom models.quota_manager import QuotaManager, QuotaSnapshot\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass AllQuotaExhaustedError(RuntimeError):\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Raised when no configured candidate model is currently usable.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass QuotaRouter:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Select a model using role preferences, availability, and quota heuristics.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        catalog_path: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_ROLE_MODELS_PATH,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        quota_manager: Optional[QuotaManager] = None,\\\\n        chat_client: Optional[Chat2APIClient] = None,\\\\n        min_remaining_pct: int = settings.HARNESS_MIN_QUOTA_PCT,\\\\n        enable_llm_selector: bool = True,\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\n        self.catalog_path = Path(catalog_path)\\\\n        self.quota_manager = quota_manager or QuotaManager()\\\\n        self.chat_client = chat_client or Chat2APIClient()\\\\n        self.min_remaining_pct = min_remaining_pct\\\\n        self.enable_llm_selector = enable_llm_selector\\\\n        self.catalog = self._load_catalog()\\\\n\\\\n    def _load_catalog(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\n        with open(self.catalog_path, \\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\") as handle:\\\\n            return yaml.safe_load(handle) or {}\\\\n\\\\n    def models_for_role(self, role: str) -> list[str]:\\\\n        roles = self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"roles\\\\\\\", {})\\\\n        configured = roles.get(role)\\\\n        if configured:\\\\n            return list(configured)\\\\n        return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\n\\\\n    def get_model_info(self, model: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\n        return dict(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {}).get(model, {}))\\\\n\\\\n    def chat2api_id(self, model: str) -> str:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Return the chat2api model ID for a catalog model name.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        info = self.get_model_info(model)\\\\n        return info.get(\\\\\\\"chat2api_id\\\\\\\", model)\\\\n\\\\n    def list_available_models(self) -> list[str]:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Return catalog model names whose chat2api_id is live.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        try:\\\\n            live_ids = set(self.chat_client.list_models())\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\n            return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\n        if not live_ids:\\\\n            return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\n        return [\\\\n            name\\\\n            for name in self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {})\\\\n            if self.chat2api_id(name) in live_ids\\\\n        ]\\\\n\\\\n    def can_run_stage(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\\\\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\\\\n    ) -> bool:\\\\n        try:\\\\n            self.select_model(task, stage, quota_snapshot=quota_snapshot, available_models=available_models)\\\\n        except AllQuotaExhaustedError:\\\\n            return False\\\\n        return True\\\\n\\\\n    def select_model(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\\\\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\\\\n        quotas = quota_snapshot if quota_snapshot is not None else self.quota_manager.fetch_all_quotas()\\\\n        available = set(available_models or self.list_available_models())\\\\n        eligible = self._eligible_candidates(self.models_for_role(stage.model_role), quotas, available)\\\\n\\\\n        if not eligible:\\\\n            raise AllQuotaExhaustedError(\\\\n                f\\\\\\\"No eligible model for role={stage.model_role} with min_remaining={self.min_remaining_pct}%\\\\\\\"\\\\n            )\\\\n\\\\n        if self.enable_llm_selector:\\\\n            llm_choice = self._select_with_llm(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\\\\n            if llm_choice is not None:\\\\n                return llm_choice\\\\n\\\\n        return self._fallback_select(task, stage, eligible)\\\\n\\\\n    def _eligible_candidates(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        candidates: list[str],\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\n        available: set[str],\\\\n    ) -> list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]]:\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]] = []\\\\n        for model in candidates:\\\\n            if model not in available:\\\\n                continue\\\\n            provider = self.get_model_info(model).get(\\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\")\\\\n            if not provider:\\\\n                continue\\\\n\\\\n            provider_snapshots = [\\\\n                snapshot\\\\n                for snapshot in quotas\\\\n                if snapshot.provider.value == provider and snapshot.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\\\\n            ]\\\\n            if provider_snapshots:\\\\n                eligible.append((model, provider, max(provider_snapshots, key=self._score_snapshot)))\\\\n            elif provider == \\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\":\\\\n                eligible.append((model, provider, None))\\\\n        return eligible\\\\n\\\\n    def _select_with_llm(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice | None:\\\\n        selector_model = self._pick_selector_model()\\\\n        if selector_model is None:\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n        prompt = self._build_selection_prompt(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\\\\n        try:\\\\n            raw = self.chat_client.chat(\\\\n                model=selector_model,\\\\n                prompt=prompt,\\\\n                system=(\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"You are code-orchestra's model router. \\\\\\\"\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"Return compact JSON with fields model, provider, account, reason.\\\\\\\"\\\\n                ),\\\\n            )\\\\n            parsed = json.loads(raw)\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n        chosen_model = parsed.get(\\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\")\\\\n        if not isinstance(chosen_model, str):\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n        eligible_models = {model: (provider, snapshot) for model, provider, snapshot in eligible}\\\\n        selected = eligible_models.get(chosen_model)\\\\n        if selected is None:\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n        provider, snapshot = selected\\\\n        if snapshot is not None:\\\\n            requested_account = parsed.get(\\\\\\\"account\\\\\\\")\\\\n            if isinstance(requested_account, str) and requested_account and requested_account != snapshot.email:\\\\n                alternative = next(\\\\n                    (\\\\n                        quota\\\\n                        for quota in quotas\\\\n                        if quota.provider.value == provider\\\\n                        and quota.email == requested_account\\\\n                        and quota.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\\\\n                    ),\\\\n                    None,\\\\n                )\\\\n                if alternative is not None:\\\\n                    snapshot = alternative\\\\n\\\\n        return ModelChoice(\\\\n            model=chosen_model,\\\\n            provider=provider,\\\\n            account_email=snapshot.email if snapshot is not None else None,\\\\n            reason=str(parsed.get(\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\"llm_selector\\\\\\\"),\\\\n        )\\\\n\\\\n    def _fallback_select(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\\\\n        best_choice: ModelChoice | None = None\\\\n        best_score: float | None = None\\\\n\\\\n        for role_index, (model, provider, snapshot) in enumerate(eligible):\\\\n            role_bonus = max(0, 40 - role_index * 10)\\\\n            if snapshot is not None:\\\\n                total_score = role_bonus + self._score_snapshot(snapshot)\\\\n                choice = ModelChoice(\\\\n                    model=model,\\\\n                    provider=provider,\\\\n                    account_email=snapshot.email,\\\\n                    reason=(\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\"fallback: role={stage.model_role}, complexity={task.complexity}, \\\\\\\"\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}%, \\\\\\\"\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\"reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\"\\\\n                    ),\\\\n                )\\\\n            else:\\\\n                total_score = role_bonus + self._score_provider_without_snapshot(provider)\\\\n                choice = ModelChoice(\\\\n                    model=model,\\\\n                    provider=provider,\\\\n                    account_email=None,\\\\n                    reason=f\\\\\\\"fallback: role={stage.model_role}, complexity={task.complexity}, provider={provider}\\\\\\\",\\\\n                )\\\\n\\\\n            if best_score is None or total_score > best_score:\\\\n                best_score = total_score\\\\n                best_choice = choice\\\\n\\\\n        if best_choice is None:\\\\n            raise AllQuotaExhaustedError(\\\\n                f\\\\\\\"No eligible model for role={stage.model_role} with min_remaining={self.min_remaining_pct}%\\\\\\\"\\\\n            )\\\\n        return best_choice\\\\n\\\\n    def _pick_selector_model(self) -> str | None:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Pick the cheapest available model to use as the LLM selector.\\\\n\\\\n        Returns the *chat2api_id* since the selector call goes directly to chat2api.\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        preferred = (\\\\\\\"gpt-4o\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"claude-haiku-4-5\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"gemini-3.1-pro\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"gpt-5.4-codex\\\\\\\")\\\\n        available = set(self.list_available_models())\\\\n        for model in preferred:\\\\n            if model in available:\\\\n                return self.chat2api_id(model)\\\\n        return None\\\\n\\\\n    def _build_selection_prompt(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\n    ) -> str:\\\\n        lines = [\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"Task: {task.title}\\\\\\\",\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"Description: {task.description}\\\\\\\",\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"Complexity: {task.complexity}\\\\\\\",\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"Stage: {stage.stage_type} ({stage.model_role})\\\\\\\",\\\\n            \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n            \\\\\\\"Eligible models:\\\\\\\",\\\\n        ]\\\\n        for model, provider, snapshot in eligible:\\\\n            if snapshot is None:\\\\n                lines.append(f\\\\\\\"- {model} | provider={provider} | account=n/a | remaining=n/a | reset_in=n/a\\\\\\\")\\\\n            else:\\\\n                lines.append(\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\"- {model} | provider={provider} | account={snapshot.email} | \\\\\\\"\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}% | reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\"\\\\n                )\\\\n        if quotas:\\\\n            lines.extend([\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"Quota snapshot:\\\\\\\"])\\\\n            for snapshot in quotas:\\\\n                lines.append(\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\"- {snapshot.provider.value}:{snapshot.email} \\\\\\\"\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}% reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\"\\\\n                )\\\\n        lines.extend(\\\\n            [\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n                \\\\\\\"Prefer use-it-or-lose-it quota, but keep role fit.\\\\\\\",\\\\n                'Respond as JSON: {\\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"account\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\"}',\\\\n            ]\\\\n        )\\\\n        return \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\".join(lines)\\\\n\\\\n    def _score_snapshot(self, snapshot: QuotaSnapshot) -> float:\\\\n        waste_bonus = 0.0\\\\n        if snapshot.time_until_reset_hours <= 6:\\\\n            waste_bonus = snapshot.remaining_percent * (6 - max(snapshot.time_until_reset_hours, 0)) / 6\\\\n        safety_bonus = 15.0 if snapshot.remaining_percent >= 40 else 0.0\\\\n        return snapshot.remaining_percent + waste_bonus + safety_bonus\\\\n\\\\n    def _score_provider_without_snapshot(self, provider: str) -> float:\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\":\\\\n            return 85.0\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\"claude\\\\\\\":\\\\n            return 70.0\\\\n        return 50.0\\\\n\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":0,\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.started\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_6\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' models/codex/account.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":null,\\\"status\\\":\\\"in_progress\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.completed\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_6\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' models/codex/account.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"from __future__ import annotations\\\\n\\\\nimport json\\\\nimport os\\\\nimport subprocess\\\\nimport time\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional\\\\n\\\\nfrom . import auth\\\\n\\\\nCODEX_DIR = Path.home() / \\\\\\\".codex\\\\\\\"\\\\nACCOUNTS_DIR = CODEX_DIR / \\\\\\\"accounts\\\\\\\"\\\\nACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH = ACCOUNTS_DIR / \\\\\\\"accounts.json\\\\\\\"\\\\nCODEX_AUTH_PATH = CODEX_DIR / \\\\\\\"auth.json\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\n@dataclass\\\\nclass CodexAccount:\\\\n    email: str\\\\n    access_token: str\\\\n    refresh_token: str\\\\n    id_token: str\\\\n    account_id: str\\\\n    plan_type: str\\\\n    quota_snapshot: Dict[str, Any]\\\\n    disabled: bool\\\\n    created_at: int\\\\n    last_used: int\\\\n\\\\n    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\\\n        return {\\\\n            \\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\": self.email,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\": self.access_token,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\": self.refresh_token,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\": self.id_token,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"account_id\\\\\\\": self.account_id,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"plan_type\\\\\\\": self.plan_type,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"quota_snapshot\\\\\\\": self.quota_snapshot,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"disabled\\\\\\\": self.disabled,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"created_at\\\\\\\": self.created_at,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"last_used\\\\\\\": self.last_used,\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n    @classmethod\\\\n    def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> \\\\\\\"CodexAccount\\\\\\\":\\\\n        return cls(\\\\n            email=data.get(\\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            access_token=data.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            refresh_token=data.get(\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            id_token=data.get(\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            account_id=data.get(\\\\\\\"account_id\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            plan_type=data.get(\\\\\\\"plan_type\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            quota_snapshot=data.get(\\\\\\\"quota_snapshot\\\\\\\") or {},\\\\n            disabled=bool(data.get(\\\\\\\"disabled\\\\\\\", False)),\\\\n            created_at=int(data.get(\\\\\\\"created_at\\\\\\\") or int(time.time())),\\\\n            last_used=int(data.get(\\\\\\\"last_used\\\\\\\") or int(time.time())),\\\\n        )\\\\n\\\\n\\\\n@dataclass\\\\nclass AccountIndex:\\\\n    accounts: List[str]\\\\n    active_account: str\\\\n\\\\n    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\\\n        return {\\\\n            \\\\\\\"accounts\\\\\\\": list(self.accounts),\\\\n            \\\\\\\"active_account\\\\\\\": self.active_account,\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n    @classmethod\\\\n    def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> \\\\\\\"AccountIndex\\\\\\\":\\\\n        accounts = data.get(\\\\\\\"accounts\\\\\\\") or []\\\\n        active = data.get(\\\\\\\"active_account\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        return cls(accounts=list(accounts), active_account=active)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _ensure_accounts_dir() -> None:\\\\n    ACCOUNTS_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _account_path(email: str) -> Path:\\\\n    return ACCOUNTS_DIR / f\\\\\\\"{email}.json\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _read_json(path: Path) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\\\n    with path.open(\\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\n        return json.load(f)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _atomic_write_json(path: Path, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:\\\\n    _ensure_accounts_dir()\\\\n    tmp_path = path.with_suffix(\\\\\\\".tmp\\\\\\\")\\\\n    with tmp_path.open(\\\\\\\"w\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\n        json.dump(data, f, indent=2, sort_keys=True)\\\\n        f.flush()\\\\n        os.fsync(f.fileno())\\\\n    os.replace(tmp_path, path)\\\\n    os.chmod(path, 0o600)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _load_index() -> AccountIndex:\\\\n    if not ACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH.exists():\\\\n        return AccountIndex(accounts=[], active_account=\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\")\\\\n    return AccountIndex.from_dict(_read_json(ACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH))\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _save_index(index: AccountIndex) -> None:\\\\n    _atomic_write_json(ACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH, index.to_dict())\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef get_account_index() -> AccountIndex:\\\\n    return _load_index()\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef get_active_email() -> str:\\\\n    return _load_index().active_account\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef list_accounts() -> List[str]:\\\\n    return _load_index().accounts\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef load_account(email: str) -> CodexAccount:\\\\n    path = _account_path(email)\\\\n    if not path.exists():\\\\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\\\\\\\"Account not found: {email}\\\\\\\")\\\\n    return CodexAccount.from_dict(_read_json(path))\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef load_all_accounts() -> List[CodexAccount]:\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\n    accounts: List[CodexAccount] = []\\\\n    for email in index.accounts:\\\\n        try:\\\\n            accounts.append(load_account(email))\\\\n        except FileNotFoundError:\\\\n            continue\\\\n    return accounts\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef save_account(account: CodexAccount) -> None:\\\\n    _atomic_write_json(_account_path(account.email), account.to_dict())\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef add_account(\\\\n    email: str,\\\\n    tokens: Dict[str, Any],\\\\n    account_id: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n    plan_type: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n    quota_snapshot: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,\\\\n    disabled: Optional[bool] = None,\\\\n    set_active: bool = False,\\\\n    update_last_used: bool = True,\\\\n) -> CodexAccount:\\\\n    if not tokens.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\") or not tokens.get(\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\"):\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(\\\\\\\"Missing access_token or refresh_token for account\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    now = int(time.time())\\\\n    existing = None\\\\n    try:\\\\n        existing = load_account(email)\\\\n    except FileNotFoundError:\\\\n        pass\\\\n\\\\n    account = CodexAccount(\\\\n        email=email,\\\\n        access_token=tokens.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n        refresh_token=tokens.get(\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n        id_token=tokens.get(\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n        account_id=account_id or (existing.account_id if existing else \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"),\\\\n        plan_type=plan_type or (existing.plan_type if existing else \\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\"),\\\\n        quota_snapshot=quota_snapshot if quota_snapshot is not None else (existing.quota_snapshot if existing else {}),\\\\n        disabled=existing.disabled if (existing and disabled is None) else bool(disabled),\\\\n        created_at=existing.created_at if existing else now,\\\\n        last_used=now if update_last_used else (existing.last_used if existing else now),\\\\n    )\\\\n\\\\n    save_account(account)\\\\n\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\n    if email not in index.accounts:\\\\n        index.accounts.append(email)\\\\n    if set_active:\\\\n        index.active_account = email\\\\n    _save_index(index)\\\\n\\\\n    return account\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef get_active_account() -> CodexAccount:\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\n    if not index.active_account:\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(\\\\\\\"No active account set\\\\\\\")\\\\n    return load_account(index.active_account)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef remove_account(email: str) -> None:\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\n    if email in index.accounts:\\\\n        index.accounts.remove(email)\\\\n    if index.active_account == email:\\\\n        index.active_account = \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    _save_index(index)\\\\n\\\\n    path = _account_path(email)\\\\n    if path.exists():\\\\n        path.unlink()\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef import_current_account() -> CodexAccount:\\\\n    auth_data = auth.read_codex_auth()\\\\n    tokens = auth_data.get(\\\\\\\"tokens\\\\\\\", {})\\\\n    if not tokens.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\") or not tokens.get(\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\"):\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(\\\\\\\"Current auth.json is missing access_token or refresh_token\\\\\\\")\\\\n    info = auth.extract_account_info(tokens.get(\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\"), tokens.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\"))\\\\n\\\\n    email = info.email\\\\n    if not email:\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(\\\\\\\"Unable to extract email from current auth.json\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    account_id = tokens.get(\\\\\\\"account_id\\\\\\\") or info.account_id\\\\n    plan_type = info.plan_type or \\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    account = add_account(\\\\n        email=email,\\\\n        tokens={\\\\n            \\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\": tokens.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            \\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\": tokens.get(\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            \\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\": tokens.get(\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\"),\\\\n        },\\\\n        account_id=account_id,\\\\n        plan_type=plan_type,\\\\n        set_active=True,\\\\n        update_last_used=True,\\\\n    )\\\\n\\\\n    return account\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _is_codex_running() -> bool:\\\\n    try:\\\\n        result = subprocess.run(\\\\n            [\\\\\\\"pgrep\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"-f\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\"],\\\\n            check=False,\\\\n            stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL,\\\\n            stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL,\\\\n        )\\\\n        return result.returncode == 0\\\\n    except FileNotFoundError:\\\\n        return False\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef refresh_account_tokens(account: CodexAccount, force: bool = False) -> CodexAccount:\\\\n    tokens = {\\\\n        \\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\": account.access_token,\\\\n        \\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\": account.refresh_token,\\\\n        \\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\": account.id_token,\\\\n        \\\\\\\"account_id\\\\\\\": account.account_id,\\\\n    }\\\\n\\\\n    try:\\\\n        new_tokens = auth.ensure_fresh_tokens(tokens, force=force)\\\\n    except auth.AuthError as exc:\\\\n        account.disabled = True\\\\n        save_account(account)\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(f\\\\\\\"Failed to refresh tokens for {account.email}\\\\\\\") from exc\\\\n\\\\n    if new_tokens != tokens:\\\\n        info = auth.extract_account_info(new_tokens.get(\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\"), new_tokens.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\"))\\\\n        if info.account_id:\\\\n            account.account_id = info.account_id\\\\n        if info.plan_type:\\\\n            account.plan_type = info.plan_type\\\\n\\\\n        account.access_token = new_tokens.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\") or account.access_token\\\\n        account.refresh_token = new_tokens.get(\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\") or account.refresh_token\\\\n        account.id_token = new_tokens.get(\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\") or account.id_token\\\\n        account.last_used = int(time.time())\\\\n        save_account(account)\\\\n\\\\n    return account\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef set_active_account(email: str) -> CodexAccount:\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\n    if email not in index.accounts:\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(f\\\\\\\"Account not found: {email}\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    if _is_codex_running():\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"Warning: codex appears to be running; restart it after switching.\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    try:\\\\n        current_auth = auth.read_codex_auth()\\\\n    except FileNotFoundError:\\\\n        current_auth = None\\\\n\\\\n    if current_auth:\\\\n        tokens = current_auth.get(\\\\\\\"tokens\\\\\\\", current_email != email:\\\\n            add_account(\\\\n                email=current_email,\\\\n                tokens={\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\": tokens.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\"),\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\": tokens.get(\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\"),\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\": tokens.get(\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\"),\\\\n                },\\\\n                account_id=tokens.get(\\\\\\\"account_id\\\\\\\") or info.account_id,\\\\n                plan_type=info.plan_type or \\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\": target.access_token,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\": target.refresh_token,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\": target.id_token,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"account_id\\\\\\\": target.account_id,\\\\n        }\\\\n    )\\\\n\\\\n    index.active_account = email\\\\n    _save_index(index)\\\\n\\\\n    target.last_used = int(time.time())\\\\n
