-lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,320p' scripts/orchestra_cli.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"#!/usr/bin/env python3\\\\n\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Interactive CLI for running multi-agent orchestrator workflows.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\n\\\\nimport argparse\\\\nimport asyncio\\\\nimport json\\\\nimport logging\\\\nimport re\\\\nimport sys\\\\nimport time\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\n\\\\nimport uuid\\\\nimport yaml\\\\n\\\\n# Fix path to allow importing from the project root if run from anywhere\\\\nsys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).parent.parent.absolute()))\\\\n\\\\nfrom common.acp_client import ACPClient\\\\nfrom common.models import Message, MessagePart, RunStatus\\\\nfrom scripts.check_server_status import check_all_servers, StatusReport\\\\nfrom orchestrator.pipeline import PipelineDefinition, PipelineExecutor, PipelineError\\\\nfrom orchestrator.stage import StageDefinition, StageResult\\\\n\\\\n# Setup minimal logging, only warning+ so it doesn't clutter CLI\\\\nlogging.basicConfig(level=logging.WARNING, format=\\\\\\\"%(message)s\\\\\\\")\\\\nlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef hide_code_blocks(text: str) -> str:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Replaces markdown code blocks and diffs with a hidden placeholder.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    if not text:\\\\n        return \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    # Regex to match ```language \\\\\\\\n code... \\\\\\\\n ```\\\\n    pattern = re.compile(r\\\\\\\"```[a-zA-Z0-9_-]*\\\\\\\\n[\\\\\\\\s\\\\\\\\S]*?\\\\\\\\n```\\\\\\\", re.MULTILINE)\\\\n    return pattern.sub(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n```\\\\\\\\n[CODE DIFF/BLOCK HIDDEN]\\\\\\\\n```\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\", text)\\\\n    \\\\n\\\\nclass CLIExecutor(PipelineExecutor):\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Custom executor that streams updates to the CLI interface and routes to ACP services.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    \\\\n    def __init__(self, pipeline_def: PipelineDefinition, config_path: str):\\\\n        super().__init__(pipeline_def)\\\\n        self.session_id = uuid.uuid4().hex[:12]\\\\n        self.clients: dict[str, ACPClient] = {}\\\\n        \\\\n        with open(config_path, \\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\") as handle:\\\\n            data = yaml.safe_load(handle) or {}\\\\n            for name, info in data.get(\\\\\\\"agents\\\\\\\", {}).items():\\\\n                self.clients[name] = ACPClient(info[\\\\\\\"base_url\\\\\\\"])\\\\n                \\\\n    async def cleanup(self):\\\\n        import asyncio\\\\n        await asyncio.gather(*(client.close() for client in self.clients.values()), return_exceptions=True)\\\\n\\\\n    async def _invoke_model(self, stage_def: StageDefinition, prompt: str) -> str:\\\\n        agent_name = stage_def.metadata.get(\\\\\\\"agent\\\\\\\")\\\\n        if not agent_name:\\\\n            return await super()._invoke_model(stage_def, prompt)\\\\n            \\\\n        client = self.clients.get(agent_name)\\\\n        if not client:\\\\n            raise ValueError(f\\\\\\\"Unknown agent '{agent_name}' configured in metadata for stage {stage_def.stage_id}\\\\\\\")\\\\n            \\\\n        message = Message(\\\\n            role=\\\\\\\"user\\\\\\\",\\\\n            parts=[MessagePart(content=prompt)]\\\\n        )\\\\n        \\\\n        run = await client.create_run(agent_name, [message], session_id=self.session_id)\\\\n        if run.status != RunStatus.COMPLETED:\\\\n            raise RuntimeError(f\\\\\\\"Agent {agent_name} failed: {run.error}\\\\\\\")\\\\n            \\\\n        if not run.output_messages:\\\\n            return \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        return run.output_messages[0].text\\\\n    \\\\n    async def _execute_stage(self, stage_def: StageDefinition) -> StageResult:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Override to provide CLI feedback before and after the stage.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n========================================================\\\\\\\")\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\"\\ud83d\\udd04 CURRENT STEP: {stage_def.name} ({stage_def.stage_id})\\\\\\\")\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\"\\ud83e\\udd16 Agent Model:  {stage_def.model}\\\\\\\")\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\"========================================================\\\\\\\")\\\\n        \\\\n        # Prepare prompt to show user what is being asked\\\\n        prompt = self._prepare_prompt(stage_def)\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n[Input] -> Sending to Agent:\\\\\\\")\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\n        # We don't hide code blocks in prompt for context, but we can limit size\\\\n        short_prompt = prompt if len(prompt) < 1000 else prompt[:500] + \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n...[TRUNCATED FOR DISPLAY]...\\\\\\\" + prompt[-500:]\\\\n        print(short_prompt)\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\u23f3 Waiting for agent response...\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\")\\\\n        \\\\n        start_time = time.time()\\\\n        try:\\\\n            output = await self._invoke_model(stage_def, prompt)\\\\n            execution_time = time.time() - start_time\\\\n            \\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"\\u2705 Agent responded in {execution_time:.1f}s\\\\\\\")\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n[Output] <- Received from Agent:\\\\\\\")\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\n            \\\\n            # Hide code blocks for clean UI\\\\n            clean_output = hide_code_blocks(output)\\\\n            print(clean_output)\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\n            \\\\n            return StageResult(\\\\n                stage_id=stage_def.stage_id,\\\\n                status=\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\",\\\\n                output=output,\\\\n                raw_output=output,\\\\n                execution_time=execution_time,\\\\n                model_used=stage_def.model,\\\\n            )\\\\n            \\\\n        except Exception as exc:\\\\n            execution_time = time.time() - start_time\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"\\u274c Stage failed after {execution_time:.1f}s: {exc}\\\\\\\")\\\\n            raise  # Let the base class intercept it and handle fail_fast\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nasync def ensure_servers_running(config_path: str, timeout: float = 3.0) -> bool:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Check if required servers are healthy. Return True if all ok.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\"\\ud83d\\udd0d Checking ACP Server Status...\\\\\\\")\\\\n    report = await check_all_servers(config_path, timeout)\\\\n    if report.unhealthy_count == 0:\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\"\\u2705 All {report.total_servers} servers are healthy!\\\\\\\")\\\\n        return True\\\\n    \\\\n    print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\u274c SOME SERVERS ARE UNREACHABLE!\\\\\\\")\\\\n    for server in report.servers:\\\\n        if not server.healthy:\\\\n            err = f\\\\\\\" ({server.error})\\\\\\\" if server.error else \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"  - {server.base_url} is DOWN{err}\\\\\\\")\\\\n    \\\\n    print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nPlease start the required servers (e.g. using scripts/run_*_server.py).\\\\\\\")\\\\n    return False\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef get_available_workflows() -> list[Path]:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Return a list of workflow YAML files.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    workflows_dir = Path(__file__).parent.parent / \\\\\\\"workflows\\\\\\\"\\\\n    if not workflows_dir.exists():\\\\n        return []\\\\n    return sorted(workflows_dir.glob(\\\\\\\"*.yaml\\\\\\\"))\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nasync def main_async(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:\\\\n    # 1. Check Servers\\\\n    servers_ok = await ensure_servers_running(args.config, args.timeout)\\\\n    if not servers_ok:\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\n        \\\\n    print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\" + \\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\"*60)\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\"               ORCHESTRA MULTI-AGENT CLI\\\\\\\")\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\"*60 + \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\")\\\\n    \\\\n    # 2. Select Workflow\\\\n    workflows = get_available_workflows()\\\\n    if not workflows:\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"\\u274c No workflows found in the 'workflows/' directory.\\\\\\\")\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\n        \\\\n    workflow_path = None\\\\n    if args.workflow:\\\\n        workflow_path = Path(args.workflow)\\\\n        if not workflow_path.exists():\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"\\u274c Workflow {workflow_path} not found.\\\\\\\")\\\\n            sys.exit(1)\\\\n    else:\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"Available Workflows:\\\\\\\")\\\\n        for idx, wf in enumerate(workflows):\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"  [{idx + 1}] {wf.name}\\\\\\\")\\\\n            \\\\n        while True:\\\\n            try:\\\\n                choice = input(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nSelect a workflow (1-%d): \\\\\\\" % len(workflows))\\\\n                idx = int(choice.strip()) - 1\\\\n                if 0 <= idx < len(workflows):\\\\n                    workflow_path = workflows[idx]\\\\n                    break\\\\n                else:\\\\n                    print(\\\\\\\"Invalid choice.\\\\\\\")\\\\n            except ValueError:\\\\n                print(\\\\\\\"Please enter a number.\\\\\\\")\\\\n            except KeyboardInterrupt:\\\\n                print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nCanceled by user.\\\\\\\")\\\\n                sys.exit(0)\\\\n                \\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\u2705 Selected workflow: {workflow_path.name}\\\\\\\")\\\\n    \\\\n    # Load pipeline\\\\n    try:\\\\n        pipeline_def = PipelineDefinition(workflow_path)\\\\n    except PipelineError as e:\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\"\\u274c Failed to load pipeline: {e}\\\\\\\")\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\n        \\\\n    # 3. Get Task\\\\n    task_description = args.task\\\\n    if not task_description:\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nEnter task description (press Enter twice to finish):\\\\\\\")\\\\n        lines = []\\\\n        while True:\\\\n            try:\\\\n                line = input()\\\\n                if not line and (not lines or not lines[-1]):\\\\n                    break\\\\n                lines.append(line)\\\\n            except KeyboardInterrupt:\\\\n                print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\nCanceled by user.\\\\\\\")\\\\n                sys.exit(0)\\\\n        task_description = \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\".join(lines).strip()\\\\n        \\\\n    if not task_description:\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"\\u274c Task description cannot be empty.\\\\\\\")\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\n\\\\n    # 4. Execute Pipeline\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\ud83d\\ude80 Starting Pipeline Execution...\\\\\\\")\\\\n    executor = CLIExecutor(pipeline_def, args.config)\\\\n    \\\\n    try:\\\\n        # Also map user_task so it's available for workflows explicitly requesting it\\\\n        initial_state = {\\\\\\\"user_task\\\\\\\": task_description}\\\\n        results = await executor.execute(task_description, initial_state=initial_state)\\\\n        \\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\" + \\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\"*60)\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"\\ud83c\\udf89 PIPELINE EXECUTION COMPLETED\\\\\\\")\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\"*60)\\\\n        for stage_id, result in results.items():\\\\n            icon = \\\\\\\"\\u2705\\\\\\\" if result.status == \\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\" else \\\\\\\"\\u274c\\\\\\\"\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\"{icon} Stage '{stage_id}': {result.status.upper()} ({result.execution_time:.1f}s)\\\\\\\")\\\\n            \\\\n        # Check for absolute failure\\\\n        if any(r.status == \\\\\\\"failed\\\\\\\" for r in results.values()):\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\u274c Pipeline completed with ERRORS.\\\\\\\")\\\\n            sys.exit(1)\\\\n            \\\\n    except Exception as e:\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\u274c Pipeline execution failed due to an error: {e}\\\\\\\")\\\\n        import traceback\\\\n        traceback.print_exc()\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\n    finally:\\\\n        await executor.cleanup()\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef main() -> None:\\\\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\\\\\\\"Interactive Multi-Agent Orchestrator CLI\\\\\\\")\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--config\\\\\\\", default=\\\\\\\"config/agents.yaml\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Path to agents.yaml\\\\\\\")\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--timeout\\\\\\\", type=float, default=3.0, help=\\\\\\\"Per-server health check timeout in seconds\\\\\\\")\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--workflow\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Path to a specific workflow YAML, bypasses selection\\\\\\\")\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\"--task\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\"Initial task description, bypasses input dialog\\\\\\\")\\\\n    \\\\n    args = parser.parse_args()\\\\n    \\\\n    try:\\\\n        asyncio.run(main_async(args))\\\\n    except KeyboardInterrupt:\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nExiting CLI...\\\\\\\")\\\\n        sys.exit(0)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nif __name__ == \\\\\\\"__main__\\\\\\\":\\\\n    main()\\\\n\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":0,\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.started\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_24\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,220p' harness/handoff.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":null,\\\"status\\\":\\\"in_progress\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.completed\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_24\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,220p' harness/handoff.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Handoff document generation and artifact storage.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\n\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\nfrom typing import Iterable\\\\n\\\\nfrom harness.models import StageExecutionResult, StageRecord, TaskRecord\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass HandoffProtocol:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Persist stage inputs and outputs as markdown artifacts.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def __init__(self, artifact_root: str | Path = \\\\\\\"artifacts\\\\\\\") -> None:\\\\n        self.artifact_root = Path(artifact_root)\\\\n        self.artifact_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\n\\\\n    def task_dir(self, task_id: str) -> Path:\\\\n        path = self.artifact_root / task_id\\\\n        path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\n        return path\\\\n\\\\n    def handoff_path(self, task: TaskRecord, stage: StageRecord) -> Path:\\\\n        return self.task_dir(task.task_id) / f\\\\\\\"{stage.stage_order:02d}_{stage.stage_type}_handoff.md\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def output_path(self, task: TaskRecord, stage: StageRecord) -> Path:\\\\n        return self.task_dir(task.task_id) / f\\\\\\\"{stage.stage_order:02d}_{stage.stage_type}_output.md\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def generate(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        previous_stages: Iterable[StageRecord],\\\\n    ) -> str:\\\\n        previous = list(previous_stages)\\\\n        previous_stage_name = previous[-1].stage_type if previous else \\\\\\\"bootstrap\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n        lines = [\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"# Handoff: {previous_stage_name} -> {stage.stage_type}\\\\\\\",\\\\n            \\\\\\\"## Task\\\\\\\",\\\\n            task.title,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n            \\\\\\\"## Description\\\\\\\",\\\\n            task.description,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n        ]\\\\n\\\\n        if task.goal:\\\\n            lines.extend([\\\\\\\"## Goal\\\\\\\", task.goal, \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"])\\\\n\\\\n        lines.extend(\\\\n            [\\\\n                \\\\\\\"## Context\\\\\\\",\\\\n                f\\\\\\\"- Complexity: {task.complexity}\\\\\\\",\\\\n                f\\\\\\\"- Current Stage: {stage.stage_type} ({stage.model_role})\\\\\\\",\\\\n                f\\\\\\\"- Working Directory: {task.working_dir or '.'}\\\\\\\",\\\\n                \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n            ]\\\\n        )\\\\n\\\\n        if previous:\\\\n            lines.append(\\\\\\\"## Previous Stage Output\\\\\\\")\\\\n            for previous_stage in previous:\\\\n                summary = previous_stage.result_summary or \\\\\\\"No summary recorded.\\\\\\\"\\\\n                lines.extend(\\\\n                    [\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\"### {previous_stage.stage_type}\\\\\\\",\\\\n                        summary.strip(),\\\\n                        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n                    ]\\\\n                )\\\\n\\\\n        lines.append(\\\\\\\"## Current Stage Instructions\\\\\\\")\\\\n        instruction = stage.metadata.get(\\\\\\\"instructions\\\\\\\") if stage.metadata else None\\\\n        if instruction:\\\\n            lines.append(str(instruction).strip())\\\\n        else:\\\\n            lines.append(\\\\n                f\\\\\\\"Complete the `{stage.stage_type}` stage for this task in `{task.working_dir or '.'}`.\\\\\\\"\\\\n            )\\\\n        lines.append(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n        verify_cmd = stage.verify_cmd or task.verify_cmd\\\\n        if verify_cmd:\\\\n            lines.extend([\\\\\\\"## Verification\\\\\\\", f\\\\\\\"Run: `{verify_cmd}`\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"])\\\\n\\\\n        return \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\".join(lines).rstrip() + \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def write_handoff(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        previous_stages: Iterable[StageRecord],\\\\n    ) -> Path:\\\\n        content = self.generate(task, stage, previous_stages)\\\\n        path = self.handoff_path(task, stage)\\\\n        path.write_text(content, encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\")\\\\n        return path\\\\n\\\\n    def save_stage_output(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        result: StageExecutionResult,\\\\n    ) -> Path:\\\\n        path = self.output_path(task, stage)\\\\n        lines = [\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"# Output: {stage.stage_type}\\\\\\\",\\\\n            \\\\\\\"## Summary\\\\\\\",\\\\n            result.summary or \\\\\\\"No summary generated.\\\\\\\",\\\\n            \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n        ]\\\\n        if result.files_changed:\\\\n            lines.append(\\\\\\\"## Files Changed\\\\\\\")\\\\n            lines.extend(f\\\\\\\"- {path_item}\\\\\\\" for path_item in result.files_changed)\\\\n            lines.append(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\")\\\\n        if result.raw_output:\\\\n            lines.extend([\\\\\\\"## Raw Output\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"```text\\\\\\\", result.raw_output.rstrip(), \\\\\\\"```\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"])\\\\n        path.write_text(\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\".join(lines).rstrip() + \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\")\\\\n        return time\\\\nfrom concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed\\\\n\\\\nfrom . import account\\\\nfrom . import quota\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _format_bar(remaining_percent: int, width: int = 10) -> str:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Progress bar showing remaining quota (filled = remaining).\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    remaining_percent = max(0, min(100, int(remaining_percent)))\\\\n    filled = int(round(remaining_percent / 100 * width))\\\\n    filled = max(0, min(width, filled))\\\\n    return \\\\\\\"[\\\\\\\" + (\\\\\\\"\\u2588\\\\\\\" * filled) + (\\\\\\\"\\u2591\\\\\\\" * (width - filled)) + \\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _format_reset(reset_at: int) -> str:\\\\n    if not reset_at:\\\\n        return \\\\\\\"n/a\\\\\\\"\\\\n    diff = max(0, int(reset_at) - int(time.time()))\\\\n    days = diff // 86400\\\\n    hours = (diff % 86400) // 3600\\\\n    return f\\\\\\\"{days}d {hours}h\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _fetch_quota_for_account(acc: account.CodexAccount) -> quota.CodexQuota:\\\\n    acc = account.refresh_account_tokens(acc)\\\\n    try:\\\\n        return quota.fetch_quota(acc.access_token, acc.account_id)\\\\n    except quota.QuotaError as exc:\\\\n        if exc.status_code == 403:\\\\n            acc = account.refresh_account_tokens(acc, force=True)\\\\n            return quota.fetch_quota(acc.access_token, acc.account_id)\\\\n        raise\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _fetch_quotas_parallel(\\\\n    accounts: list[account.CodexAccount],\\\\n) -> tuple[list[tuple[account.CodexAccount, quota.CodexQuota]], list[tuple[account.CodexAccount, Exception]]]:\\\\n    results: list[tuple[account.CodexAccount, quota.CodexQuota]] = []\\\\n    errors: list[tuple[account.CodexAccount, Exception]] = []\\\\n\\\\n    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=min(8, len(accounts))) as executor:\\\\n        futures = {executor.submit(_fetch_quota_for_account, acc): acc for acc in accounts}\\\\n        for future in as_completed(futures):\\\\n            acc = futures[future]\\\\n            try:\\\\n                results.append((acc, future.result()))\\\\n            except Exception as exc:\\\\n                errors.append((acc, exc))\\\\n\\\\n    return results, errors\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _load_accounts_in_order() -> list[account.CodexAccount]:\\\\n    emails = account.list_accounts()\\\\n    accounts = []\\\\n    for email in emails:\\\\n        try:\\\\n            accounts.append(account.load_account(email))\\\\n        except FileNotFoundError:\\\\n            continue\\\\n    return accounts\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef cmd_status(_: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\n    accounts = _load_accounts_in_order()\\\\n    if not accounts:\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"No accounts found. Use `python -m models.codex.cli import` after logging in.\\\\\\\")\\\\n        return 1\\\\n\\\\n    active_email = account.get_active_email()\\\\n    results, errors = _fetch_quotas_parallel(accounts)\\\\n\\\\n    quota_by_email: dict[str, quota.CodexQuota] = {}\\\\n    for acc, quo in results:\\\\n        quota_by_email[acc.email] = quo\\\\n        if quo.plan_type:\\\\n            acc.plan_type = quo.plan_type\\\\n        if quo.raw:\\\\n            acc.quota_snapshot = quo.raw\\\\n        account.save_account(acc)\\\\n\\\\n    errors_by_email = {acc.email: exc for acc, exc in errors}\\\\n\\\\n    max_email = max(len(acc.email) for acc in accounts)\\\\n    header = \\\\\\\"Codex Account Status\\\\\\\"\\\\n    print(header)\\\\n    print()\\\\n    print(\\\\n        f\\\\\\\"{'Account'.ljust(max_email)}  Plan   Remaining           Resets\\\\\\\"\\\\n    )\\\\n    print(\\\\n        f\\\\\\\"{'-' * max_email}  ----   -----------------  ------\\\\\\\"\\\\n    )\\\\n\\\\n    for acc in accounts:\\\\n        marker = \\\\\\\">\\\\\\\" if acc.email == active_email else \\\\\\\" \\\\\\\"\\\\n        if acc.email in quota_by_email:\\\\n            quo = quota_by_email[acc.email]\\\\n            remaining = 100 - quo.weekly_used_percent\\\\n            bar = _format_bar(remaining)\\\\n            pct = f\\\\\\\"{remaining:>3}%\\\\\\\"\\\\n            reset = _format_reset(quo.weekly_reset_at)\\\\n            icon = \\\\\\\"\\ud83d\\udfe2\\\\\\\" if remaining > 40 else \\\\\\\"\\ud83d\\udfe1\\\\\\\" if remaining > 5 else \\\\\\\"\\ud83d\\udd34\\\\\\\"\\\\n            warn = \\\\\\\" \\u26a0\\\\\\\" if (quo.weekly_limit_reached or remaining <= 5) else \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n            plan = (quo.plan_type or acc.plan_type or \\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\").capitalize()\\\\n            print(\\\\n                f\\\\\\\"{marker} {icon} {acc.email.ljust(max_email)}  {plan.ljust(5)}  {bar} {pct}  {reset}{warn}\\\\\\\"\\\\n            )\\\\n        else:\\\\n            err = errors_by_email.get(acc.email)\\\\n            plan = (acc.plan_type or \\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\").capitalize()\\\\n {err_msg}\\\\\\\"\\\\n            )\\\\n\\\\n    return 0\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef cmd_list(_: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\n    accounts = _load_accounts_in_order()\\\\n    active_email = account.get_active_email()\\\\n    for acc in accounts:\\\\n        marker = \\\\\\\">\\\\\\\" if acc.email == active_email else \\\\\\\" \\\\\\\"\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\"{marker} {acc.email}\\\\\\\")\\\\n    return 0\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef cmd_switch(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\n    target = account.set_active_account(args.email)\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\"Active account set quo.weekly_limit_reached and not acc.disabled\\\\n    ]\\\\n    if not candidates:\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\"All accounts are exhausted or disabled.\\\\\\\")\\\\n        return 1\\\\n\\\\n -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' harness/chat2api_client.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Minimal chat2api client.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\n\\\\nimport json\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\\\\nfrom urllib import request\\\\n\\\\nimport yaml\\\\n\\\\nfrom config import settings\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass Chat2APIClient:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Simple stdlib HTTP client for the local chat2api gateway.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        base_url: str = settings.CHAT2API_BASE_URL,\\\\n        timeout: float = settings.CHAT2API_TIMEOUT,\\\\n        catalog_path: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_ROLE_MODELS_PATH,\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\n        self.base_url = base_url.rstrip(\\\\\\\"/\\\\\\\")\\\\n        self.timeout = timeout\\\\n        self._model_map = self._load_model_map(catalog_path)\\\\n\\\\n    @staticmethod\\\\n    def _load_model_map(catalog_path: str | Path) -> dict[str, str]:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Build semantic-name \\u2192 chat2api_id mapping from role_models.yaml.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        try:\\\\n            with open(catalog_path, \\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\") as fh:\\\\n                catalog = yaml.safe_load(fh) or {}\\\\n        except (OSError, yaml.YAMLError):\\\\n            return {}\\\\n        return {\\\\n            name: info[\\\\\\\"chat2api_id\\\\\\\"]\\\\n            for name, info in catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {}).items()\\\\n            if \\\\\\\"chat2api_id\\\\\\\" in info\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n    def resolve_model(self, model: str) -> str:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Map a semantic model name to its chat2api ID, passthrough if unknown.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        return self._model_map.get(model, model)\\\\n\\\\n    def list_models(self) -> list[str]:\\\\n        payload = self._get_json(\\\\\\\"/v1/models\\\\\\\")\\\\n        return [item[\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\"] for item in payload.get(\\\\\\\"data\\\\\\\", []) if \\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\" in item]\\\\n\\\\n    def chat(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        model: str,\\\\n        prompt: str,\\\\n        system: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n    ) -> str:\\\\n        messages: list[dict[str, Any]] = []\\\\n        if system:\\\\n            messages.append({\\\\\\\"role\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"system\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\": system})\\\\n        messages.append({\\\\\\\"role\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"user\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\": prompt})\\\\n        payload = self._post_json(\\\\n            \\\\\\\"/v1/chat/completions\\\\\\\",\\\\n            {\\\\n                \\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\": self.resolve_model(model),\\\\n                \\\\\\\"messages\\\\\\\": messages,\\\\n            },\\\\n        )\\\\n        return payload[\\\\\\\"choices\\\\\\\"][0][\\\\\\\"message\\\\\\\"][\\\\\\\"content\\\\\\\"]\\\\n\\\\n    def _get_json(self, path: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\n        req = request.Request(f\\\\\\\"{self.base_url}{path}\\\\\\\", method=\\\\\\\"GET\\\\\\\")\\\\n        with request.urlopen(req, timeout=self.timeout) as response:\\\\n            return json.loads(response.read().decode(\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\"))\\\\n\\\\n    def _post_json(self, path: str, body: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\n        data = json.dumps(body).encode(\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\")\\\\n        req = request.Request(\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"{self.base_url}{path}\\\\\\\",\\\\n            data=data,\\\\n            headers={\\\\\\\"Content-Type\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\"application/json\\\\\\\"},\\\\n            method=\\\\\\\"POST\\\\\\\",\\\\n        )\\\\n        with request.urlopen(req, timeout=self.timeout) as response:\\\\n            return json.loads(response.read().decode(\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\"))\\\\n\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":0,\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.started\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_40\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash slices.\\\\n\\\\nSlice 1: keep routing pure, but add an explicit Codex account activation step before Codex execution so feasibility checks do not mutate global auth state.\\\\n\\\\nSlice 2: add a nohup-style daemon manager with PID metadata, stale PID detection, hidden worker entrypoint, and SIGTERM-driven graceful shutdown around `run_forever`.\\\\n\\\\nSlice 3: add centralized logging plus JSONL stage events, then build `dashboard` aggregates from DB state and event history instead of mixing metrics into ad hoc CLI output.\\\\n\\\\nBaseline before changes: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -q` => `21 passed`.\\\\n\\\\n## Current Stage Instructions\\\\nImplement all three features end-to-end. Keep the Codex account switch separate from pure model selection, prefer a portable nohup-style daemon path for tests, and add focused tests as each slice lands so the final `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -v` run is stable.\\\\n\\\\n## Verification\\\\nRun: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -v`\\\\n\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":0,\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.started\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_48\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,220p' artifacts/563b7352a8d94c82bf26787efb827fc0/01_plan_output.md\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":null,\\\"status\\\":\\\"in_progress\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.completed\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_48\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,220p' artifacts/563b7352a8d94c82bf26787efb827fc0/01_plan_output.md\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"# Output: plan\\\\n## Summary\\\\nImplement the robustness work in three slices with tests after each slice:\\\\n\\\\n1. Codex account rotation\\\\n- Keep `QuotaRouter.select_model()` side-effect free so `can_run_stage()` remains safe.\\\\n- Extend routing to choose the best Codex account among all Codex quota snapshots using the existing use-it-or-lose-it scoring, and preserve the chosen `account_email` in `ModelChoice`.\\\\n- Add a separate activation step before Codex execution that calls `models.codex.account.set_active_account()` only when the chosen Codex account differs from the current active account.\\\\n- Log/surface the selected account in the routing reason and stage telemetry.\\\\n\\\\n2. Daemon lifecycle\\\\n- Add a small daemon manager module instead of embedding process control directly in CLI branches.\\\\n- Use a detached `subprocess.Popen(..., start_new_session=True)` worker for a portable nohup-style background process.\\\\n- Add `daemon start`, `daemon stop`, and `daemon status` CLI subcommands plus a hidden worker command that runs `Harness.run_forever()`.\\\\n- Persist daemon metadata in a PID file, detect stale PID files, and install a `SIGTERM` handler that lets the current iteration finish and exits cleanly.\\\\n\\\\n3. Logging, monitoring, and dashboard\\\\n- Add one centralized logging setup for the harness CLI/daemon path.\\\\n- Emit structured JSONL events for stage start, completion, retry, quota pause, permission pause, and failure.\\\\n- Compute dashboard aggregates from the DB plus the JSONL event stream: task counts by status, stage counts by status, total/average duration, total token usage, and execution error rate.\\\\n- Include daemon state, recent failures, and quota/permission pause counts in the dashboard output.\\\\n\\\\n## File Targets\\\\n- `harness/quota_router.py`\\\\n- `harness/main.py`\\\\n- `harness/stage_executor.py`\\\\n- `harness/task_queue.py`\\\\n- `config/settings.py`\\\\n- New modules are likely justified for daemon/process management and telemetry aggregation.\\\\n\\\\n## Test Plan\\\\n- Add router tests for multi-account Codex selection and no-side-effect feasibility checks.\\\\n- Add harness/main tests for Codex account activation before execution.\\\\n- Add daemon tests for PID lifecycle, stale PID detection, and stop/status behavior.\\\\n- Add telemetry/dashboard tests for JSONL event emission and aggregate summaries.\\\\n- Final verification: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -v`\\\\n\\\\n## Baseline\\\\nCurrent baseline is green: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -q` passed with `21 passed`.\\\\n\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":0,\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.completed\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_49\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"agent_message\\\",\\\"text\\\":\\\"\\u89c4\\u5212\\u7ed3\\u679c\\u5df2\\u843d\\u5230 \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Main scheduler that turns queued tasks into stage TaskQueue(self.db)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.handoff = HandoffProtocol(artifact_root)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.checkpoints = CheckpointStore(artifact_root)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.intake = intake_agent or IntakeAgent()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.router = quota_router or QuotaRouter()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.executor = stage_executor or Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        goal: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        priority: int = 50,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        intake = self.intake.plan_task(description, goal=goal, verify_cmd=verify_cmd)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if title:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            intake = replace(intake, title=title)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self.submit_intake(intake, priority=priority, working_dir=working_dir)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def submit_intake(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        intake: IntakeResult,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        priority: int = 50,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        status: TaskStatus = TaskStatus.EXECUTING,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.create_task(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            title=intake.title,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            description=intake.description,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            goal=intake.goal,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            verify_cmd=intake.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            complexity=intake.complexity,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            priority=priority,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            status=status,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            working_dir=working_dir,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.save_stages(task.task_id, intake.stages)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def run_once(self) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        await self._recover_paused_quota_tasks()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.pick_next_runnable_task()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if task is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if self.task_queue.count_stages(task.task_id) == 0:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            await self._plan_missing_stages(task)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            task = self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id) or task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage = self.task_queue.next_pending_stage(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if stage is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            await self._finish_task(task)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        await self._run_stage(task, stage)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self.task_queue.get_task(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def run_forever(self, poll_interval_sec: int = settings.HARNESS_POLL_INTERVAL_SEC) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        while True:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            task = await self.run_once()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if task is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval_sec)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def status_report(self) -> list[dict[str, object]]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        report: list[dict[str, object]] = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"assigned_provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.assigned_provider,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"handoff_doc_path\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.handoff_doc_path,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"result_summary\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.result_summary,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"retry_count\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.retry_count,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"verify_cmd\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"metadata\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.metadata,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                }\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                for stage in stages\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            ],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"permission_requests\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"request_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.request_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.stage_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"action\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.action,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"risk_level\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.risk_level.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"decision\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.decision,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"voters\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.voters,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"decided_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": item.decided_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                }\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                for stage in stages\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                for item in self.task_queue.list_permission_requests(stage.stage_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            ],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"checkpoints\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                asdict(checkpoint) for checkpoint in self.checkpoints.list_for_task(task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            ],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        }\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def pause_task(self, task_id: str) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task_id, TaskStatus.PAUSED_PERMISSION)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def resume_task(self, task_id: str) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task = self.task_queue.get_task(task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if task is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raise KeyError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task not found: {task_id}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if task.status in {TaskStatus.DONE, TaskStatus.FAILED}:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raise ValueError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Cannot resume task in terminal status {task.status.value}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def quota_report(self) -> list[dict[str, object]]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        snapshots = self.router.quota_manager.fetch_all_quotas()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": snapshot.provider.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": snapshot.email,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"remaining_percent\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": snapshot.remaining_percent,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reset_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": snapshot.reset_at_readable,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"time_until_reset_hours\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": round(snapshot.time_until_reset_hours, 1),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            }\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for snapshot in snapshots\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        ]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def _plan_missing_stages(self, task: TaskRecord) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.PLANNING)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        intake = self.intake.plan_task(task.description, goal=task.goal, verify_cmd=task.verify_cmd)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.save_stages(task.task_id, intake.stages)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def _recover_paused_quota_tasks(self) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for task in self.task_queue.list_tasks(TaskStatus.PAUSED_QUOTA):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            stage = self.task_queue.next_pending_stage(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if stage is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                continue\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if self.router.can_run_stage(task, stage):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.log_quota_event(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    QuotaEventRecord(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        event_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        provider=stage.assigned_provider or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        account_email=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        event_type=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"recovered\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        details={\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.task_id, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"stage_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": stage.stage_id},\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        created_at=utcnow_iso(),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def _run_stage(self, task: TaskRecord, stage: StageRecord) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if not stage.assigned_model or not stage.assigned_provider:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                choice = self.router.select_model(task, stage)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.assign_stage_model(stage.stage_id, choice.model, choice.provider)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                stage = self.task_queue.get_stage(stage.stage_id) or stage\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            previous = self.task_queue.list_completed_stages(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            handoff_path = self.handoff.write_handoff(task, stage, previous)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            self.task_queue.mark_stage_running(stage.stage_id, str(handoff_path))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            stage = self.task_queue.get_stage(stage.stage_id) or stage\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            result = await self.executor.execute(stage, str(handoff_path), task.working_dir)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if stage.verify_cmd and task.working_dir:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                verification = await self.executor.run_verify_cmd(stage.verify_cmd, task.working_dir)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                if verification.returncode != 0:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    raise StageExecutionError(verification.stderr.strip() or verification.stdout.strip() or stage.verify_cmd)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            self.handoff.save_stage_output(task, stage, result)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            self.task_queue.complete_stage(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_5\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/quota_router.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_5\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/quota_router.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Quota-aware model routing.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport yaml\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom config import settings\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.chat2api_client import Chat2APIClient\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.models import ModelChoice, StageRecord, TaskRecord\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.quota_manager import QuotaManager, QuotaSnapshot\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass AllQuotaExhaustedError(RuntimeError):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Raised when no configured candidate model is currently usable.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass QuotaRouter:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Select a model using role preferences, availability, and quota heuristics.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        catalog_path: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_ROLE_MODELS_PATH,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quota_manager: Optional[QuotaManager] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        chat_client: Optional[Chat2APIClient] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        min_remaining_pct: int = settings.HARNESS_MIN_QUOTA_PCT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        enable_llm_selector: bool = True,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.catalog_path = Path(catalog_path)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.quota_manager = quota_manager or QuotaManager()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.chat_client = chat_client or Chat2APIClient()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.min_remaining_pct = min_remaining_pct\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.enable_llm_selector = enable_llm_selector\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.catalog = self._load_catalog()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _load_catalog(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with open(self.catalog_path, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as handle:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return yaml.safe_load(handle) or {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def models_for_role(self, role: str) -> list[str]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        roles = self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"roles\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        configured = roles.get(role)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if configured:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return list(configured)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def get_model_info(self, model: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return dict(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).get(model, {}))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def chat2api_id(self, model: str) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Return the chat2api model ID for a catalog model name.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        info = self.get_model_info(model)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return info.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chat2api_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", model)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def list_available_models(self) -> list[str]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Return catalog model names whose chat2api_id is live.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            live_ids = set(self.chat_client.list_models())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not live_ids:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            name\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for name in self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if self.chat2api_id(name) in live_ids\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        ]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def can_run_stage(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> bool:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            self.select_model(task, stage, quota_snapshot=quota_snapshot, available_models=available_models)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except AllQuotaExhaustedError:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return False\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return True\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def select_model(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quotas = quota_snapshot if quota_snapshot is not None else self.quota_manager.fetch_all_quotas()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        available = set(available_models or self.list_available_models())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        eligible = self._eligible_candidates(self.models_for_role(stage.model_role), quotas, available)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not eligible:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raise AllQuotaExhaustedError(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No eligible model for role={stage.model_role} with min_remaining={self.min_remaining_pct}%\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if self.enable_llm_selector:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            llm_choice = self._select_with_llm(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if llm_choice is not None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                return llm_choice\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self._fallback_select(task, stage, eligible)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _eligible_candidates(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        candidates: list[str],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        available: set[str],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for model in candidates:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if model not in available:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                continue\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            provider = self.get_model_info(model).get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if not provider:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                continue\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            provider_snapshots = [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                snapshot\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                for snapshot in quotas\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                if snapshot.provider.value == provider and snapshot.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            ]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if provider_snapshots:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                eligible.append((model, provider, max(provider_snapshots, key=self._score_snapshot)))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            elif provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                eligible.append((model, provider, None))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return eligible\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _select_with_llm(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice | None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        selector_model = self._pick_selector_model()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if selector_model is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        prompt = self._build_selection_prompt(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raw = self.chat_client.chat(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                model=selector_model,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                prompt=prompt,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                system=(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"You are code-orchestra's model router. \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Return compact JSON with fields model, provider, account, reason.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            parsed = json.loads(raw)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        chosen_model = parsed.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not isinstance(chosen_model, str):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        eligible_models = {model: (provider, snapshot) for model, provider, snapshot in eligible}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        selected = eligible_models.get(chosen_model)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if selected is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        provider, snapshot = selected\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if snapshot is not None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            requested_account = parsed.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if isinstance(requested_account, str) and requested_account and requested_account != snapshot.email:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                alternative = next(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        quota\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        for quota in quotas\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        if quota.provider.value == provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        and quota.email == requested_account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        and quota.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                if alternative is not None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    snapshot = alternative\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return ModelChoice(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            model=chosen_model,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            provider=provider,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            account_email=snapshot.email if snapshot is not None else None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            reason=str(parsed.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"llm_selector\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _fallback_select(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        best_choice: ModelChoice | None = None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        best_score: float | None = None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for role_index, (model, provider, snapshot) in enumerate(eligible):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            role_bonus = max(0, 40 - role_index * 10)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if snapshot is not None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                total_score = role_bonus + self._score_snapshot(snapshot)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                choice = ModelChoice(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    model=model,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    provider=provider,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    account_email=snapshot.email,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    reason=(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fallback: role={stage.model_role}, complexity={task.complexity}, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}%, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    ),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            else:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                total_score = role_bonus + self._score_provider_without_snapshot(provider)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                choice = ModelChoice(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    model=model,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    provider=provider,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    account_email=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    reason=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fallback: role={stage.model_role}, complexity={task.complexity}, provider={provider}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if best_score is None or total_score > best_score:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                best_score = total_score\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                best_choice = choice\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if best_choice is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raise AllQuotaExhaustedError(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No eligible model for role={stage.model_role} with min_remaining={self.min_remaining_pct}%\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return best_choice\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _pick_selector_model(self) -> str | None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Pick the cheapest available model to use as the LLM selector.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        Returns the *chat2api_id* since the selector call goes directly to chat2api.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        preferred = (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gpt-4o\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"claude-haiku-4-5\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gemini-3.1-pro\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gpt-5.4-codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        available = set(self.list_available_models())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for model in preferred:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if model in available:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                return self.chat2api_id(model)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _build_selection_prompt(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        lines = [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task: {task.title}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Description: {task.description}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Complexity: {task.complexity}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Stage: {stage.stage_type} ({stage.model_role})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Eligible models:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        ]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for model, provider, snapshot in eligible:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if snapshot is None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                lines.append(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"- {model} | provider={provider} | account=n/a | remaining=n/a | reset_in=n/a\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            else:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                lines.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"- {model} | provider={provider} | account={snapshot.email} | \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}% | reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if quotas:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            lines.extend([\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Quota snapshot:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"])\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for snapshot in quotas:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                lines.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"- {snapshot.provider.value}:{snapshot.email} \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}% reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        lines.extend(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Prefer use-it-or-lose-it quota, but keep role fit.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                'Respond as JSON: {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}',\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            ]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(lines)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _score_snapshot(self, snapshot: QuotaSnapshot) -> float:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        waste_bonus = 0.0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if snapshot.time_until_reset_hours <= 6:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            waste_bonus = snapshot.remaining_percent * (6 - max(snapshot.time_until_reset_hours, 0)) / 6\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        safety_bonus = 15.0 if snapshot.remaining_percent >= 40 else 0.0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return snapshot.remaining_percent + + 1,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                paused_reason=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"quota_exhausted\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                paused_at=utcnow_iso(),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                partial_output=exc.partial_output,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            self.checkpoints.save(checkpoint)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            self.task_queue.log_quota_event(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                QuotaEventRecord(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    event_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n task.task_id},\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    created_at=utcnow_iso(),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except PermissionBlockedError as exc:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            self.task_queue.reset_stage_to_pending(stage.stage_id, retry_count=stage.retry_count)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.PAUSED_PERMISSION)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            self.task_queue.log_permission_request(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                PermissionRequestRecord(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    request_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    stage_id=stage.stage_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    action=exc.command,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": vote.reason}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        for vote in exc.decision.votes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n
