exc:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            retry_count = stage.retry_count + 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if retry_count > settings.MAX_RETRIES:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.fail_stage(stage.stage_id, result_summary=str(exc), retry_count=retry_count)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.FAILED)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            else:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.reset_stage_to_pending(stage.stage_id, retry_count=retry_count)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.EXECUTING)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def _finish_task(self, task: TaskRecord) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if task.verify_cmd and task.working_dir:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            verification = await self.executor.run_verify_cmd(task.verify_cmd, task.working_dir)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if verification.returncode != 0:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.FAILED)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                return\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.task_queue.update_task_status(task.task_id, TaskStatus.DONE)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Autonomous multi-LLM harness\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    subparsers = parser.add_subparsers(dest=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", required=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    submit = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"submit\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Submit a task into the harness queue\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Override generated title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--goal\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Acceptance goal\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--verify-cmd\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Verification command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--priority\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", type=int, default=50)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    submit.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--working-dir\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task working directory\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    chat = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chat\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Interactive requirement clarification\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    chat.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", nargs=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Initial task description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    chat.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--priority\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", type=int, default=50)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    chat.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--working-dir\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task working directory\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    inspect = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"inspect\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Show a task in detail\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    inspect.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    pause = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pause\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Pause a task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    pause.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    resume = subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"resume\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Resume a task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    resume.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"quota\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Show quota snapshot\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"run-once\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Run one scheduling iteration\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    subparsers.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Show queued tasks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return parser\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nasync def _prompt_user_approval(command: str, context: str) -> bool | None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not sys.stdin.isatty():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Permission request for command: {command}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if context:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Context: {context}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    answer = await asyncio.to_thread(input, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Allow? [y/N]: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    lowered = answer.strip().lower()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if lowered in {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"y\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"yes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return True\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if lowered in {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"no\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return False\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef build_cli_harness() -> Harness:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    chat_client = None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    permission_gate = PermissionGate(user_approver=_prompt_user_approval)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stage_executor = StageExecutor(chat_client=chat_client, permission_gate=permission_gate)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    quota_router = QuotaRouter(chat_client=stage_executor.chat_client)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return Harness(quota_router=quota_router, stage_executor=stage_executor)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _read_multiline_description() -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Describe the task. Press Enter twice to finish:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    lines: list[str] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    while True:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        line = input()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not line and (not lines or not lines[-1]):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            break\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        lines.append(line)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(lines).strip()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _run_chat_submission(harness: Harness, description: str | None, priority: int, working_dir: str | None) -> TaskRecord:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    initial_description = description or _read_multiline_description()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not initial_description:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        raise ValueError(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Task description cannot be empty.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    base = harness.intake.plan_task(initial_description)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    questions = harness.intake.generate_questions(initial_description, base.complexity)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    answers: dict[str, str] = {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    for question in questions:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        suffix = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" [{question.default}]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if question.default else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        response = input(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{question.prompt}{suffix}: \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").strip()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        answers[question.key] = response or (question.default or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    intake = harness.intake.apply_answers(initial_description, answers)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return harness.submit_intake(intake, priority=priority, working_dir=working_dir)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nasync def _main_async(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    harness = build_cli_harness()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"submit\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task = harness.submit_task(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            args.description,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            title=args.title,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            goal=args.goal,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            verify_cmd=args.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            priority=args.priority,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            working_dir=args.working_dir,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(task.task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chat\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task = _run_chat_submission(harness, args.description, args.priority, args.working_dir)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(json.dumps({\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.task_id, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"title\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task.title}, ensure_ascii=False))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"run-once\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task = await harness.run_once()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(task.task_id if task else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"idle\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for item in harness.status_report():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(json.dumps(item, ensure_ascii=False))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"inspect\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(json.dumps(harness.inspect_task(args.task_id), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pause\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        harness.pause_task(args.task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(args.task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"resume\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        harness.resume_task(args.task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(args.task_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"quota\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for item in harness.quota_report():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(json.dumps(item, ensure_ascii=False))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef main() -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    parser = build_parser()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    args = parser.parse_args()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    raise SystemExit(asyncio.run(_main_async(args)))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nif __name__ == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"__main__\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    main()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_9\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,320p' models/quota_manager.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nUnified Quota Manager for Google (Antigravity) and Codex accounts.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nSmart switching algorithm \\\\\\\\u2014 optimizes for:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n1. WASTE PREVENTION: Use quota before it expires (don't let resets waste unused quota)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n2. TASK SAFETY: Ensure >40% remaining when starting new tasks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n3. CONTINUITY: Avoid unnecessary switching (anti-thrash)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nUnified scoring formula per account:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  score = remaining + waste_urgency + safety_bonus + inertia\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nWhere:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  - remaining: current remaining % (0-100)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  - waste_urgency: remaining \\\\\\\\u00d7 (WASTE_WINDOW - hours_to_reset) / WASTE_WINDOW\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\u2192 Boosts accounts with quota about to be lost on reset\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  - safety_bonus: +15 if remaining > 40% (enough for a full task)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n  - inertia: +5 for current account (avoid switching for marginal gains)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nSwitch when best candidate's score exceeds current by > 10 points.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport time\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass, field\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom datetime import datetime, ensure_fresh_google_token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom models.google.quota import fetch_account_quota as fetch_google_quota\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass Provider(str, Enum):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    CODEX = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    GOOGLE = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"google\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass QuotaSnapshot:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Point-in-time quota snapshot for an account.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    provider: Provider\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    email: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    account_id: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    plan_type: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    used_percent: int\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    reset_at: int                    # Unix timestamp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    reset_at_readable: str           # Human-readable\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    time_until_reset_hours: float\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    @property\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def remaining_percent(self) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return max(0, 100 - self.used_percent)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    @property\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def is_exhausted(self) -> bool:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"True if quota is essentially depleted (>= 95%).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self.used_percent >= 95\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    @property\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def is_fresh(self) -> bool:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"True if just reset or will reset very soon.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self.remaining_percent >= 90 or self.time_until_reset_hours < 0.5\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __str__(self) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{self.email:<40} {self.plan_type:<6} \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[{self.used_percent:>3}%] \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{self.time_until_reset_hours:>5.1f}h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass SwitchDecision:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Result of quota analysis and switching decision.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    should_switch: bool\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    reason: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    target_email: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    target_remaining: Optional[int]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    current_email: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    current_remaining: Optional[int]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __str__(self) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not self.should_switch:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"STAY on {self.current_email} ({self.current_remaining}% remaining) - {self.reason}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SWITCH {self.current_email} \\\\\\\\u2192 {self.target_email} \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"({self.current_remaining}% \\\\\\\\u2192 {self.target_remaining}%) - {self.reason}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass QuotaManager:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    Intelligent quota manager for multi-provider, multi-account systems.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    Optimizes for three goals (in priority order):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    1. WASTE PREVENTION \\\\\\\\u2014 Use quota before it resets (don't lose unused quota)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    2. TASK SAFETY \\\\\\\\u2014 Prefer accounts with >40% for new tasks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    3. CONTINUITY \\\\\\\\u2014 Avoid unnecessary mid-session switching\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    Uses a unified scoring formula:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n      score = remaining + waste_urgency + safety_bonus + inertia\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    TASK_SAFETY_THRESHOLD = 40              # Prefer accounts > 40% for new tasks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    FRESH_QUOTA_THRESHOLD = 90              # Consider \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"fresh\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if >= 90%\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS = 6                  # Boost accounts resetting within 6h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    SAFETY_BONUS = 15                       # Score bonus for accounts > 40%\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    INERTIA_BONUS = 5                       # Score bonus for staying on current\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    HEALTHY_INERTIA = 20                    # Extra inertia when current is healthy (>40%)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    SWITCH_THRESHOLD = 10                   # Minimum score improvement to switch\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, check_interval_minutes: int = 60):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.check_interval_minutes = check_interval_minutes\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.last_check_time = 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.account_reset_times: dict[str, int] = {}  # email -> reset_at timestamp\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.last_switch_time = 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.state_file = Path.home() / \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" / \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"quota_manager_state.json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self._load_state()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _load_state(self) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Load persistent state (reset times).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if self.state_file.exists():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                with open(self.state_file) as f:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    data = json.load(f)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.account_reset_times = {k: int(v) for k, v in data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reset_times\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).items()}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            except Exception:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.account_reset_times = {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _save_state(self) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Save persistent state.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.state_file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with open(self.state_file, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"w\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            json.dump(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"reset_times\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": self.account_reset_times},\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                f,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                indent=2,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def fetch_all_quotas(self) -> list[QuotaSnapshot]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Fetch quota for all accounts (both providers).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        snapshots: list[QuotaSnapshot] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        now = int(time.time())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Codex accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for email in list_codex_accounts():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    account = load_codex_account(email)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    quota = fetch_codex_quota(account.access_token, account.account_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    reset_at = quota.weekly_reset_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    time_until_reset = (reset_at - now) / 3600.0  # hours\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    snapshot = QuotaSnapshot(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        provider=Provider.CODEX,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        email=account.email,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        account_id=account.account_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        plan_type=quota.plan_type or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        used_percent=quota.weekly_used_percent,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        reset_at=reset_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        reset_at_readable=datetime.fromtimestamp(reset_at).strftime(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        time_until_reset_hours=time_until_reset,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    snapshots.append(snapshot)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    self.account_reset_times[account.email] = reset_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to fetch Codex quota for {email}: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to load Codex accounts: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Google accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            accounts = list_google_accounts_fn()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            # Google's list_accounts returns Account objects directly\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for account in accounts:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    # Refresh token if expired\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    account.token = ensure_fresh_google_token(account.token)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    save_google_account(account)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    quota, _ = fetch_google_quota(account.token.access_token, account.project_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    # Google quotas are per-model, find the max usage\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    max_used_percent = 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    max_reset_at = 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    for model_quota in quota.models:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        used = 100 - (model_quota.percentage or 0)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        if used > max_used_percent:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                            max_used_percent = used\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        if model_quota.reset_time:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                            try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                                reset_ts = int(datetime.fromisoformat(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                                    model_quota.reset_time.replace(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Z\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"+00:00\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                                ).timestamp())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                                if reset_ts > max_reset_at:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                                    max_reset_at = reset_ts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                            except Exception:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                                pass\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    if max_reset_at == 0:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        max_reset_at = now + 86400  # Default 24h if unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    time_until_reset = (max_reset_at - now) / 3600.0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    snapshot = QuotaSnapshot(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        provider=Provider.GOOGLE,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        email=account.email,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        account_id=account.project_id or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        plan_type=quota.subscription_tier or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        used_percent=max_used_percent,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        reset_at=max_reset_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        reset_at_readable=datetime.fromtimestamp(max_reset_at).strftime(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        time_until_reset_hours=time_until_reset,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    snapshots.append(snapshot)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    self.account_reset_times[account.email] = max_reset_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to fetch Google quota for {account.email}: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to load Google accounts: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self._save_state()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return sorted(snapshots, key=lambda s: (-s.remaining_percent, s.time_until_reset_hours))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _score_account(self, snapshot: QuotaSnapshot, is_current: bool = False) -> float:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        Unified scoring formula for an account.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        score = remaining + waste_urgency + safety_bonus + inertia\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        Components:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - remaining: base value (0-100)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - waste_urgency: boosts accounts with quota about to expire\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n          = remaining \\\\\\\\u00d7 (WASTE_WINDOW - hours_to_reset) / WASTE_WINDOW\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n          Only applies when hours_to_reset < WASTE_WINDOW\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - safety_bonus: +15 for accounts with >40% (can sustain a full task)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - inertia: +5 for current account (anti-thrash)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        Examples:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - Account A: 50% remaining, 2h until reset, current\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\u2192 50 + 50*(6-2)/6 + 15 + 5 = 50 + 33.3 + 15 + 5 = 103.3\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - Account B: 80% remaining, 120h until reset, not current\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\u2192 80 + 0 + 15 + 0 = 95\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        - Account C: 20% remaining, 1h until reset, not current\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n          \\\\\\\\u2192 20 + 20*(6-1)/6 + 0 + 0 = 20 + 16.7 + 0 = 36.7\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\u2192 Switch to A (use its 50% before reset), even though B has more remaining\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        remaining = snapshot.remaining_percent\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Waste urgency: boost accounts with quota about to be lost on reset\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        waste_urgency = 0.0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        hours = snapshot.time_until_reset_hours\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if 0 < hours <= self.WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS and remaining > 0:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            waste_urgency = remaining * (self.WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS - hours) / self.WASTE_WINDOW_HOURS\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Safety bonus: prefer accounts that can sustain a full task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        safety = self.SAFETY_BONUS if remaining > self.TASK_SAFETY_THRESHOLD else 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Inertia: preference for staying on current account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Extra inertia when healthy \\\\\\\\u2014 don't switch between two good accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        inertia = 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if is_current:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            inertia = self.INERTIA_BONUS\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if remaining > self.TASK_SAFETY_THRESHOLD:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                inertia += self.HEALTHY_INERTIA\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return remaining + waste_urgency + safety + inertia\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _is_fresh_reset(self, snapshot: QuotaSnapshot) -> bool:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Check if account just reset or is in immediate post-reset window.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return snapshot.remaining_percent >= self.FRESH_QUOTA_THRESHOLD\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def analyze_and_decide(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        current_email: str,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        current_snapshot: Optional[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        all_snapshots: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> SwitchDecision:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        Analyze quota situation and decide whether to switch accounts.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        Uses unified scoring that balances:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        1. Waste prevention (use expiring quota before it's lost)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        2. Task safety (prefer >40% for new tasks)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        3. Continuity (inertia for current account)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not current_snapshot:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            # No current account info \\\\\\\\u2014 pick the best available\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if all_snapshots:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                scored = [(s, self._score_account(s)) for s in all_snapshots]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                best, best_score = max(scored, key=lambda x: x[1])\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                return SwitchDecision(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    should_switch=True,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    reason=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No current account \\\\\\\\u2014 selecting best (score {best_score:.0f})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    target_email=best.email,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    target_remaining=best.remaining_percent,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    current_email=current_email,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    current_remaining=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return SwitchDecision(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                should_switch=False,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                reason=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No account quota available\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                target_email=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                target_remaining=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                current_email=current_email,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                current_remaining=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Score current account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_10\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,280p' models/codex/quota.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_10\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,280p' models/codex/quota.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"from __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport urllib.error\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport urllib.request\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Any, List\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom .account import CodexAccount\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nUSAGE_URL = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"https://chatgpt.com/backend-api/wham/usage\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass QuotaError(RuntimeError):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, message: str, status_code: int | None = None) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        super().__init__(message)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.status_code = status_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n@dataclass\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass CodexQuota:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    email: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    plan_type: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    weekly_used_percent: int\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    weekly_reset_at: int\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    weekly_limit_reached: bool\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    burst_used_percent: int\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    burst_reset_at: int\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    code_review_used_percent: int\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    code_review_reset_at: int\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    raw: dict | None = None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _get_int(value: Any, default: int = 0) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return int(value)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except (TypeError, ValueError):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return default\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef fetch_quota(access_token: str, account_id: str) -> CodexQuota:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    req = urllib.request.Request(USAGE_URL, method=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"GET\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    req.add_header(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Authorization\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Bearer {access_token}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if account_id:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        req.add_header(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ChatGPT-Account-Id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", account_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    req.add_header(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"User-Agent\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"CodexBar\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    req.add_header(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Accept\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"application/json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=20) as resp:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            payload = resp.read().decode(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except urllib.error.HTTPError as exc:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        body = exc.read().decode(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", errors=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ignore\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        raise QuotaError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Quota fetch failed: HTTP {exc.code} {body}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", status_code=exc.code) from exc\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except urllib.error.URLError as exc:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        raise QuotaError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Quota fetch failed: {exc.reason}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") from exc\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        data = json.loads(payload)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except json.JSONDecodeError as exc:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        raise QuotaError(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Quota response was not valid JSON\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") from exc\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    rate_limit = data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rate_limit\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    primary = rate_limit.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"primary_window\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    secondary = rate_limit.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"secondary_window\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    code_review = data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"code_review_rate_limit\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    code_primary = code_review.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"primary_window\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return CodexQuota(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n decision\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass StageExecutor:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n calls.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    APPROVED_DECISIONS = {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"auto_approved\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"model_approved\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        codex_tier: str = settings.CODEX_TIER,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.chat_client = chat_client or Chat2APIClient()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.permission_gate = permission_gate or PermissionGate()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.runner = runner or self._run_command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.codex_tier = codex_tier\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def execute(self, stage: StageRecord, handoff_doc_path: str, working_dir: str | None) -> StageExecutionResult:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        started_at = time.time()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        prompt = Path(handoff_doc_path).read_text(encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        provider = stage.assigned_provider or self._infer_provider(stage.assigned_model or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        cwd = working_dir or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chat2api\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raw_output = await asyncio.to_thread(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.chat_client.chat,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                model=stage.assigned_model or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                prompt=prompt,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            duration = time.time() - started_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return StageExecutionResult(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                stage_id=stage.stage_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                status=StageStatus.DONE,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                raw_output=raw_output,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                summary=self._summarize(raw_output),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                duration_sec=duration,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if provider == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return await self._run_github_ops(stage, prompt, cwd, started_at)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n completed.stderr):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raise QuotaExhaustedError(provider or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", combined_output, partial_output=completed.stdout)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if completed.returncode != 0:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raise StageExecutionError(combined_output or f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Stage failed with exit code {completed.returncode}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        duration = time.time() - started_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        files_changed = self._list_changed_files(cwd)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        raw_output = self._normalize_output(completed.stdout, stage.assigned_provider)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return StageExecutionResult(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            stage_id=stage.stage_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            status=StageStatus.DONE,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raw_output=raw_output,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            summary=self._summarize(raw_output),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            files_changed=files_changed,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            duration_sec=duration,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def build_command(self, stage: StageRecord, prompt: str, working_dir: str) -> list[str]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        provider = stage.assigned_provider or self._infer_provider(stage.assigned_model or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        model = stage.assigned_model or [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gemini\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n StageExecutionError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Unsupported provider for CLI execution: {provider}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def run_verify_cmd(self, verify_cmd: str, working_dir: str | None) -> CommandExecution:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return await self._run_checked_command(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            display_command=verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def _run_github_ops(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        prompt: str,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        working_dir: str,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        started_at: float,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> StageExecutionResult:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        commands = [str(item) for item in stage.metadata.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"commands\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", [])]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not commands:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            summary = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"GitHub stage had no commands configured.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return StageExecutionResult(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                stage_id=stage.stage_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                status=StageStatus.DONE,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                raw_output=summary,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                summary=summary,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                duration_sec=time.time() - started_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        outputs: list[str] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for raw_command in commands:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            rendered = raw_command.format(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                summary=stage.result_summary or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                stage_type=stage.stage_type,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                working_dir=working_dir,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                prompt=prompt,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            completed = await self._run_checked_command(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bash\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-lc\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", rendered],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                working_dir,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                context=f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github_ops stage={stage.stage_type}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                display_command=rendered,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if completed.returncode != 0:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                raise StageExecutionError(completed.stderr.strip() or completed.stdout.strip() or rendered)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            output = completed.stdout.strip() or completed.stderr.strip() or f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Executed: {rendered}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            outputs.append(output)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        raw_output = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(outputs).strip()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return StageExecutionResult(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            stage_id=stage.stage_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            status=StageStatus.DONE,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raw_output=raw_output,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            summary=self._summarize(raw_output),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            files_changed=self._list_changed_files(working_dir),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            duration_sec=time.time() - started_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def _run_checked_command(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        command: list[str],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        cwd: str,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        context: str,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        display_command: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> CommandExecution:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        command_text = display_command or self._display_command(command)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        decision = await self.permission_gate.decide(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            command_text,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            context=context,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            available_models=self._safe_list_available_models(),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if decision.decision not in self.APPROVED_DECISIONS:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raise PermissionBlockedError(command_text, decision)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return await self.runner(command, cwd)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def _run_command(self, command: list[str], cwd: str) -> CommandExecution:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        process = await asyncio.create_subprocess_exec(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            *command,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            cwd=cwd,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            stdout=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            stderr=asyncio.subprocess.PIPE,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stdout, stderr = await process.communicate()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return CommandExecution(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            returncode=process.returncode,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            stdout=stdout.decode(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", errors=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"replace\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            stderr=stderr.decode(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", errors=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"replace\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _normalize_output(self, stdout: str, provider: Optional[str]) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        text = stdout.strip()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if provider != \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" or not text:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            parsed = json.loads(text)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except json.JSONDecodeError:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if isinstance(parsed, dict):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"output_text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in parsed and isinstance(parsed[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"output_text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"], str):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                return parsed[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"output_text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            if \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"message\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in parsed and isinstance(parsed[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"message\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"], str):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                return parsed[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"message\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _summarize(self, text: str) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        cleaned = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(text.split())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if len(cleaned) <= 280:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return cleaned\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return cleaned[:277] + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _infer_provider(self, model: str) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if model.startswith(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"claude-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"claude\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" in model:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if model.startswith(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gemini-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"google\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if model.startswith(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gpt-4o\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") or model.startswith(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"gpt-4.1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _looks_like_quota_exhaustion(self, stdout: str, stderr: str) -> bool:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        text = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{stdout}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n{stderr}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".lower()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return any(token in text for token in (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rate limit\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"quota\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"limit reached\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exhausted\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _list_changed_files(self, working_dir: str) -> list[str]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            completed = subprocess.run(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"git\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"diff\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--name-only\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                cwd=working_dir,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                capture_output=True,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                text=True,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                check=False,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except OSError:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if completed.returncode != 0:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return [line for line in completed.stdout.splitlines() if line.strip()]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _safe_list_available_models(self) -> list[str] | None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return self.chat_client.list_models()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def _display_command(self, command: list[str]) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return Optional\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass TaskStatus(str, Enum):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    PENDING = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pending\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    PLANNING = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"planning\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    EXECUTING = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"executing\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    PAUSED_QUOTA = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"paused_quota\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    PAUSED_PERMISSION = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"paused_permission\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    DONE = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"done\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    FAILED = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"failed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass StageStatus(str, Enum):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    PENDING = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"pending\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    RUNNING = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"running\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    DONE = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"done\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    FAILED = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"failed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    SKIPPED = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"skipped\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass RiskLevel(str, Enum):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    SAFE = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"safe\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    MODERATE = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"moderate\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    DANGEROUS = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"dangerous\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    CRITICAL = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"critical\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass PlannedStage:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stage_type: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stage_order: int\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    model_role: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    metadata: dict[str, Any] = str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    description: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    goal: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    verify_cmd: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    complexity: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    priority: None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass QuotaEventRecord:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    event_id: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    provider: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    account_email: Optional[str]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    event_type: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    details: dict[str, Any] = field(default_factory=dict)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    created_at: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n@dataclass(slots=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass IntakeResult:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    title: risk_level: RiskLevel\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    decision: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    reason: str\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    requires_voting: bool = False\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    requires_user: bool = False\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    votes: list[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"ModelVote\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"] = harness/db.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SQLite schema and connection helpers for the harness.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport sqlite3\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom contextlib import contextmanager\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Iterator\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nSCHEMA = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nPRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tasks (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    task_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    title TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    description TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    goal TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    verify_cmd TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    complexity TEXT DEFAULT 'medium',\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    priority INTEGER DEFAULT 50,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending',\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    working_dir TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    created_at TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    updated_at TEXT NOT NULL\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stages (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stage_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    task_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES tasks(task_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stage_type TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stage_order INTEGER NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    model_role TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    assigned_model TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    assigned_provider TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending',\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    handoff_doc_path TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    result_summary TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    token_used INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    duration_sec REAL DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    started_at TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    finished_at TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    retry_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    verify_cmd TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    metadata TEXT DEFAULT '{}'\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS permission_requests (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    request_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    stage_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES stages(stage_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    action TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    context TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    risk_level TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    decision TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    voters TEXT DEFAULT '[]',\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    decided_at TEXT\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quota_events (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    event_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    provider TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    account_email TEXT,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    event_type TEXT NOT NULL,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    details TEXT DEFAULT '{}',\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    created_at TEXT NOT NULL\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_tasks_status_priority\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ON tasks(status, priority DESC, created_at ASC);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_stages_task_order\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ON stages(task_id, stage_order ASC);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_stages_task_status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ON stages(task_id, status, stage_order ASC);\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass HarnessDB:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Small wrapper around a SQLite database file.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, db_path: str | Path) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.db_path = Path(db_path)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.db_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.initialize()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def initialize(self) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.executescript(SCHEMA)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    @contextmanager\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def connect(self) -> Iterator[sqlite3.Connection]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        conn = sqlite3.connect(self.db_path)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            yield conn\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.commit()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.rollback()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raise\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        finally:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.close()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_17\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/task_queue.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_17\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,360p' harness/task_queue.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SQLite-backed task and stage queue.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport uuid\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom datetime import datetime, timezone\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Iterable, Optional\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.db import HarnessDB\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.models import (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    PermissionRequestRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    PlannedStage,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    QuotaEventRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    RiskLevel,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    StageStatus,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    TaskStatus,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef utcnow_iso() -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return datetime.now(timezone.utc).replace(microsecond=0).isoformat()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass TaskQueue:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"CRUD layer for tasks, stages, and audit tables.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, db: HarnessDB) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.db = db\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def create_task(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        title: str,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        description: str,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        *,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        goal: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        verify_cmd: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        complexity: str = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"medium\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        priority: int = 50,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        status: TaskStatus = TaskStatus.PENDING,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        working_dir: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task_id: Optional[str] = None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> TaskRecord:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        now = utcnow_iso()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        record = TaskRecord(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            task_id=task_id or uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            title=title,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            description=description,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            goal=goal,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            verify_cmd=verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            complexity=complexity,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            priority=priority,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            status=status,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            working_dir=working_dir,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            created_at=now,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            updated_at=now,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                INSERT INTO tasks (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    task_id, title, description, goal, verify_cmd, complexity,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    priority, status, working_dir, created_at, updated_at\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.task_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.title,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.description,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.goal,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.complexity,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.priority,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.status.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.working_dir,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.created_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    record.updated_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return record\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def get_task(self, task_id: str) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            row = conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", (task_id,)).fetchone()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self._row_to_task(row) if row else None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def list_tasks(self, status: Optional[TaskStatus] = None) -> list[TaskRecord]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        query = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"SELECT * FROM tasks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        params: tuple[object, ...] = ()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if status is not None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            query += \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" WHERE status = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            params = (status.value,)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        query += \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" ORDER BY priority DESC, created_at ASC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            rows = conn.execute(query, params).fetchall()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return [self._row_to_task(row) for row in rows]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def pick_next_runnable_task(self) -> Optional[TaskRecord]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            row = conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                SELECT * FROM tasks\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                WHERE status IN (?, ?, ?)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ORDER BY\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    CASE status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        WHEN ? THEN 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        WHEN ? THEN 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        ELSE 2\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    END,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    priority DESC,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    created_at ASC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                LIMIT 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.EXECUTING.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.PENDING.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.PLANNING.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.EXECUTING.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    TaskStatus.PENDING.value,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            ).fetchone()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self._row_to_task(row) if row else None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def update_task_status(self, task_id: str, status: TaskStatus) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"UPDATE tasks SET status = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (status.value, utcnow_iso(), task_id),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def update_task_working_dir(self, task_id: str, working_dir: str) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"UPDATE tasks SET working_dir = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE task_id = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                (working_dir, utcnow_iso(), task_id),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def save_stages(self, task_id: str, stages: Iterable[PlannedStage]) -> list[StageRecord]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        now = utcnow_iso()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        records: list[StageRecord] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with self.db.connect() as conn:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for planned in stages:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                record = StageRecord(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    stage_id=uuid.uuid4().hex,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    task_id=task_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    stage_type=planned.stage_type,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    stage_order=planned.stage_order,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    model_role=planned.model_role,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    assigned_model=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    assigned_provider=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    status=StageStatus.PENDING,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    handoff_doc_path=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    result_summary=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    token_used=0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    duration_sec=0.0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    started_at=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    finished_at=None,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    retry_count=0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    verify_cmd=planned.verify_cmd,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    metadata=dict(planned.metadata),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                conn.execute(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    INSERT INTO stages (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        stage_id, task_id, stage_type, stage_order, model_role,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        assigned_model, assigned_provider, status, handoff_doc_path,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        result_summary, token_used, duration_sec, started_at,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        finished_at, retry_count, verify_cmd, metadata\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        record.stage_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        record.task_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        record.stage_type,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n AND status = ?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                ORDER BY stage_order ASC\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                LIMIT 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n
