logging.getLogger(__name__)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef hide_code_blocks(text: str) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Replaces markdown code blocks and diffs with a hidden placeholder.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not text:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    # Regex to match ```language \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n code... \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n ```\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    pattern = re.compile(r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"```[a-zA-Z0-9_-]*\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\S]*?\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n```\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", re.MULTILINE)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return pattern.sub(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n```\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n[CODE DIFF/BLOCK HIDDEN]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n```\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", text)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass CLIExecutor(PipelineExecutor):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Custom executor that streams updates to the CLI interface and routes to ACP services.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, pipeline_def: PipelineDefinition, config_path: str):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        super().__init__(pipeline_def)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.session_id = uuid.uuid4().hex[:12]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.clients: dict[str, ACPClient] = {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        with open(config_path, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") as handle:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            data = yaml.safe_load(handle) or {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for name, info in data.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"agents\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", {}).items():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                self.clients[name] = ACPClient(info[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"base_url\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"])\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def cleanup(self):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        import asyncio\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        await asyncio.gather(*(client.close() for client in self.clients.values()), return_exceptions=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def _invoke_model(self, stage_def: StageDefinition, prompt: str) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        agent_name = stage_def.metadata.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"agent\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not agent_name:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return await super()._invoke_model(stage_def, prompt)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        client = self.clients.get(agent_name)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not client:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raise ValueError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Unknown agent '{agent_name}' configured in metadata for stage {stage_def.stage_id}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        message = Message(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            role=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"user\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            parts=[MessagePart(content=prompt)]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        run = await client.create_run(agent_name, [message], session_id=self.session_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if run.status != RunStatus.COMPLETED:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raise RuntimeError(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Agent {agent_name} failed: {run.error}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not run.output_messages:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return run.output_messages[0].text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    async def _execute_stage(self, stage_def: StageDefinition) -> StageResult:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Override to provide CLI feedback before and after the stage.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n========================================================\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udd04 CURRENT STEP: {stage_def.name} ({stage_def.stage_id})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\ud83e\\\\\\\\udd16 Agent Model:  {stage_def.model}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"========================================================\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Prepare prompt to show user what is being asked\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        prompt = self._prepare_prompt(stage_def)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n[Input] -> Sending to Agent:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # We don't hide code blocks in prompt for context, but we can limit size\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        short_prompt = prompt if len(prompt) < 1000 else prompt[:500] + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n...[TRUNCATED FOR DISPLAY]...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + prompt[-500:]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(short_prompt)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\u23f3 Waiting for agent response...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        start_time = time.time()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            output = await self._invoke_model(stage_def, prompt)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            execution_time = time.time() - start_time\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u2705 Agent responded in {execution_time:.1f}s\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n[Output] <- Received from Agent:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            # Hide code blocks for clean UI\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            clean_output = hide_code_blocks(output)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(clean_output)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"-\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" * 40)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return StageResult(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                stage_id=stage_def.stage_id,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                status=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                output=output,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                raw_output=output,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                execution_time=execution_time,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                model_used=stage_def.model,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except Exception as exc:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            execution_time = time.time() - start_time\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u274c Stage failed after {execution_time:.1f}s: {exc}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            raise  # Let the base class intercept it and handle fail_fast\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nasync def ensure_servers_running(config_path: str, timeout: float = 3.0) -> bool:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Check if required servers are healthy. Return True if all ok.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udd0d Checking ACP Server Status...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    report = await check_all_servers(config_path, timeout)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if report.unhealthy_count == 0:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u2705 All {report.total_servers} servers are healthy!\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return True\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\u274c SOME SERVERS ARE UNREACHABLE!\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    for server in report.servers:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not server.healthy:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            err = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" ({server.error})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if server.error else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"  - {server.base_url} is DOWN{err}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nPlease start the required servers (e.g. using scripts/run_*_server.py).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return False\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef get_available_workflows() -> list[Path]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Return a list of workflow YAML files.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    workflows_dir = Path(__file__).parent.parent / \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"workflows\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not workflows_dir.exists():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return sorted(workflows_dir.glob(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"*.yaml\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nasync def main_async(args: argparse.Namespace) -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    # 1. Check Servers\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    servers_ok = await ensure_servers_running(args.config, args.timeout)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not servers_ok:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"*60)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"               ORCHESTRA MULTI-AGENT CLI\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"*60 + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    # 2. Select Workflow\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    workflows = get_available_workflows()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not workflows:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u274c No workflows found in the 'workflows/' directory.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    workflow_path = None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.workflow:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        workflow_path = Path(args.workflow)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not workflow_path.exists():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u274c Workflow {workflow_path} not found.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    else:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Available Workflows:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for idx, wf in enumerate(workflows):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"  [{idx + 1}] {wf.name}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        while True:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                choice = input(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nSelect a workflow (1-%d): \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" % len(workflows))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                idx = int(choice.strip()) - 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                if 0 <= idx < len(workflows):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    workflow_path = workflows[idx]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    break\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                else:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Invalid choice.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            except ValueError:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Please enter a number.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            except KeyboardInterrupt:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCanceled by user.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                sys.exit(0)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\u2705 Selected workflow: {workflow_path.name}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    # Load pipeline\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        pipeline_def = PipelineDefinition(workflow_path)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except PipelineError as e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u274c Failed to load pipeline: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    # 3. Get Task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    task_description = args.task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not task_description:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nEnter task description (press Enter twice to finish):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        lines = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        while True:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                line = input()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                if not line and (not lines or not lines[-1]):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    break\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                lines.append(line)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            except KeyboardInterrupt:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCanceled by user.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                sys.exit(0)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task_description = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(lines).strip()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not task_description:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u274c Task description cannot be empty.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    # 4. Execute Pipeline\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\ude80 Starting Pipeline Execution...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    executor = CLIExecutor(pipeline_def, args.config)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Also map user_task so it's available for workflows explicitly requesting it\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        initial_state = {\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"user_task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": task_description}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        results = await executor.execute(task_description, initial_state=initial_state)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"*60)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\ud83c\\\\\\\\udf89 PIPELINE EXECUTION COMPLETED\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"*60)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for stage_id, result in results.items():\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            icon = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u2705\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if result.status == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"success\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u274c\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{icon} Stage '{stage_id}': {result.status.upper()} ({result.execution_time:.1f}s)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        # Check for absolute failure\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if any(r.status == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"failed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" for r in results.values()):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\u274c Pipeline completed with ERRORS.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except Exception as e:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\u274c Pipeline execution failed due to an error: {e}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        import traceback\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        traceback.print_exc()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(1)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    finally:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        await executor.cleanup()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef main() -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Interactive Multi-Agent Orchestrator CLI\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--config\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", default=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"config/agents.yaml\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Path to agents.yaml\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--timeout\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", type=float, default=3.0, help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Per-server health check timeout in seconds\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--workflow\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Path to a specific workflow YAML, bypasses selection\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Initial task description, bypasses input dialog\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    args = parser.parse_args()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        asyncio.run(main_async(args))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except KeyboardInterrupt:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nExiting CLI...\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        sys.exit(0)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nif __name__ == \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"__main__\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    main()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_24\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,220p' harness/handoff.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_24\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,220p' harness/handoff.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Handoff document generation and artifact storage.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom typing import Iterable\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom harness.models import StageExecutionResult, StageRecord, TaskRecord\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nclass HandoffProtocol:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Persist stage inputs and outputs as markdown artifacts.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def __init__(self, artifact_root: str | Path = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"artifacts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") -> None:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.artifact_root = Path(artifact_root)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self.artifact_root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def task_dir(self, task_id: str) -> Path:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        path = self.artifact_root / task_id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return path\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def handoff_path(self, task: TaskRecord, stage: StageRecord) -> Path:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self.task_dir(task.task_id) / f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{stage.stage_order:02d}_{stage.stage_type}_handoff.md\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def output_path(self, task: TaskRecord, stage: StageRecord) -> Path:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return self.task_dir(task.task_id) / f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{stage.stage_order:02d}_{stage.stage_type}_output.md\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def generate(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        previous_stages: Iterable[StageRecord],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        previous = list(previous_stages)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        previous_stage_name = previous[-1].stage_type if previous else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"bootstrap\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        lines = [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"# Handoff: {previous_stage_name} -> {stage.stage_type}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"## Task\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            task.title,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"## Description\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            task.description,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        ]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if task.goal:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            lines.extend([\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"## Goal\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", task.goal, \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"])\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        lines.extend(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"## Context\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"- Complexity: {task.complexity}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"- Current Stage: {stage.stage_type} ({stage.model_role})\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"- Working Directory: {task.working_dir or '.'}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            ]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if previous:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            lines.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"## Previous Stage Output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            for previous_stage in previous:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                summary = previous_stage.result_summary or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No summary recorded.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                lines.extend(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"### {previous_stage.stage_type}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        summary.strip(),\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                        \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                    ]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        lines.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"## Current Stage Instructions\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        instruction = stage.metadata.get(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"instructions\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\") if stage.metadata else None\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if instruction:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            lines.append(str(instruction).strip())\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        else:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            lines.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Complete the `{stage.stage_type}` stage for this task in `{task.working_dir or '.'}`.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        lines.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        verify_cmd = stage.verify_cmd or task.verify_cmd\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if verify_cmd:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            lines.extend([\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"## Verification\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Run: `{verify_cmd}`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"])\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\".join(lines).rstrip() + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    def write_handoff(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        self,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        previous_stages: Iterable[StageRecord],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ) -> Path:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        content = self.generate(task, stage, previous_stages)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        path = self.handoff_path(task, stage)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        path.write_text(content, -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' models/codex/cli.py\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"from __future__ import annotations\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport argparse\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport subprocess\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport sys\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nimport time\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom . import account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nfrom . import quota\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _format_bar(remaining_percent: int, width: int = 10) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Progress bar showing remaining quota (filled = remaining).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    remaining_percent = max(0, min(100, int(remaining_percent)))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    filled = int(round(remaining_percent / 100 * width))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    filled = max(0, min(width, filled))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"[\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" + (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u2588\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" * filled) + (\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u2591\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" * (width - filled)) + \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _format_reset(reset_at: int) -> str:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not reset_at:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"n/a\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    diff = max(0, int(reset_at) - int(time.time()))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    days = diff // 86400\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    hours = (diff % 86400) // 3600\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{days}d {hours}h\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _fetch_quota_for_account(acc: account.CodexAccount) -> quota.CodexQuota:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    acc = account.refresh_account_tokens(acc)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return quota.fetch_quota(acc.access_token, acc.account_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except quota.QuotaError as exc:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if exc.status_code == 403:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            acc = account.refresh_account_tokens(acc, force=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            return quota.fetch_quota(acc.access_token, acc.account_id)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        raise\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _fetch_quotas_parallel(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    accounts: list[account.CodexAccount],\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n) -> tuple[list[tuple[account.CodexAccount, quota.CodexQuota]], list[tuple[account.CodexAccount, Exception]]]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    results: list[tuple[account.CodexAccount, quota.CodexQuota]] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    errors: list[tuple[account.CodexAccount, Exception]] = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=min(8, len(accounts))) as executor:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        futures = {executor.submit(_fetch_quota_for_account, acc): acc for acc in accounts}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for future in as_completed(futures):\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            acc = futures[future]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                results.append((acc, future.result()))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            except Exception as exc:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                errors.append((acc, exc))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return results, errors\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef _load_accounts_in_order() -> list[account.CodexAccount]:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    emails = account.list_accounts()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    accounts = []\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    for email in emails:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            accounts.append(account.load_account(email))\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        except FileNotFoundError:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            continue\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef cmd_status(_: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    accounts = _load_accounts_in_order()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not accounts:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No accounts found. Use `python -m models.codex.cli import` after logging in.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    active_email = account.get_active_email()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    results, errors = _fetch_quotas_parallel(accounts)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    quota_by_email: dict[str, quota.CodexQuota] = {}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    for acc, quo in results:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        quota_by_email[acc.email] = quo\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if quo.plan_type:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            acc.plan_type = quo.plan_type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if quo.raw:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            acc.quota_snapshot = quo.raw\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        account.save_account(acc)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    errors_by_email = {acc.email: exc for acc, exc in errors}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    max_email = max(len(acc.email) for acc in accounts)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    header = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Codex Account Status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(header)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{'Account'.ljust(max_email)}  Plan   Remaining           Resets\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{'-' * max_email}  ----   -----------------  ------\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    for acc in accounts:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        marker = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\">\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if acc.email == active_email else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if acc.email in quota_by_email:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            quo = quota_by_email[acc.email]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            remaining = 100 - quo.weekly_used_percent\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            bar = _format_bar(remaining)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            pct = f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{remaining:>3}%\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            reset = _format_reset(quo.weekly_reset_at)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            icon = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udfe2\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if remaining > 40 else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udfe1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if remaining > 5 else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\ud83d\\\\\\\\udd34\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            warn = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\u26a0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if (quo.weekly_limit_reached or remaining <= 5) else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            plan = (quo.plan_type or acc.plan_type or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").capitalize()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{marker} {icon} {acc.email.ljust(max_email)}  {plan.ljust(5)}  {bar} {pct}  {reset}{warn}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        else:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            err = errors_by_email.get(acc.email)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            plan = (acc.plan_type or \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\").capitalize()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            err_msg = str(err) if err else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"unknown error\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n                f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{marker} {acc.email.ljust(max_email)}  {plan.ljust(5)}  error: {err_msg}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef cmd_list(_: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    accounts = _load_accounts_in_order()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    active_email = account.get_active_email()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    for acc in accounts:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        marker = \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\">\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" if acc.email == active_email else \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"{marker} {acc.email}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef cmd_switch(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    target = account.set_active_account(args.email)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Active account set to {target.email}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef {acc.email}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef cmd_login(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    cmd = [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"login\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.device_auth:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        cmd.append(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--device-auth\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    try:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        subprocess.run(cmd, check=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except FileNotFoundError as exc:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex CLI not found on PATH\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", file=sys.stderr)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    except subprocess.CalledProcessError as exc:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"codex login failed: {exc}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", file=sys.stderr)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return exc.returncode or 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef cmd_remove(args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    account.remove_account(args.email)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Removed account {args.email}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef cmd_rotate(_: argparse.Namespace) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    accounts = _load_accounts_in_order()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not accounts:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"No accounts found.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    results, errors = _fetch_quotas_parallel(accounts)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if errors:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for acc, err in errors:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n            print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Warning: failed to fetch quota for {acc.email}: {err}\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", file=sys.stderr)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    candidates = [\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        (acc, quo)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        for acc, quo in results\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        if not quo.weekly_limit_reached and not acc.disabled\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    ]\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if not candidates:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"All accounts are exhausted or disabled.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 1\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    best_acc, best_quota = min(candidates, key=lambda item: item[1].weekly_used_percent)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    active_email = account.get_active_email()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    best_remaining = 100 - best_quota.weekly_used_percent\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if best_acc.email == active_email:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        print(f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Already on best account {best_acc.email} ({best_remaining}% remaining).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    account.set_active_account(best_acc.email)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    print(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n        f\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Switched to {best_acc.email} ({best_remaining}% remaining).\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    )\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return 0\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Codex multi-account manager\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    sub = parser.add_subparsers(dest=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", required=True)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    sub.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Show quota status for all accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    sub.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"list\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"List accounts\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    switch_parser = sub.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"switch\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Switch active account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n ~/.codex/auth.json\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    login_parser = sub.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"login\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", login_parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"--device-auth\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", action=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"store_true\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    remove_parser = sub.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"remove\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Remove an account\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    remove_parser.add_argument(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    sub.add_parser(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"rotate\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\", help=\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Switch to account with most quota remaining\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    return parser\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\ndef main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    parser = build_parser()\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    args = parser.parse_args(argv)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n    if args.command == Context\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Complexity: complex\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Current Stage: code (coder)\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Working Directory: /home/ubuntu/scripts/code-orchestra\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n## Previous Stage Output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n### plan\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nImplement in three slices.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nSlice 1: keep routing pure, but add an explicit Codex account activation step before Codex execution so feasibility checks do not mutate global auth state.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nSlice 2: add a nohup-style daemon manager with PID metadata, stale PID detection, hidden worker entrypoint, and SIGTERM-driven graceful shutdown around `run_forever`.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nSlice 3: add centralized logging plus JSONL stage events, then build `dashboard` aggregates from DB state and event history instead of mixing metrics into ad hoc CLI output.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nBaseline before changes: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -q` => `21 passed`.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n## Current Stage Instructions\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nImplement all three features end-to-end. Keep the Codex account switch separate from pure model selection, prefer a portable nohup-style daemon path for tests, and add focused tests as each slice lands so the final `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -v` run is stable.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n## Verification\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nRun: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -v`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.started\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_48\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,220p' artifacts/563b7352a8d94c82bf26787efb827fc0/01_plan_output.md\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":null,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"in_progress\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_48\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command_execution\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"command\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"/bin/bash -lc \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"sed -n '1,220p' artifacts/563b7352a8d94c82bf26787efb827fc0/01_plan_output.md\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"aggregated_output\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"# Output: plan\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n## Summary\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nImplement the robustness work in three slices with tests after each slice:\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n1. Codex account rotation\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Keep `QuotaRouter.select_model()` side-effect free so `can_run_stage()` remains safe.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Extend routing to choose the best Codex account among all Codex quota snapshots using the existing use-it-or-lose-it scoring, and preserve the chosen `account_email` in `ModelChoice`.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add a separate activation step before Codex execution that calls `models.codex.account.set_active_account()` only when the chosen Codex account differs from the current active account.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Log/surface the selected account in the routing reason and stage telemetry.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n2. Daemon lifecycle\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add a small daemon manager module instead of embedding process control directly in CLI branches.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Use a detached `subprocess.Popen(..., start_new_session=True)` worker for a portable nohup-style background process.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add `daemon start`, `daemon stop`, and `daemon status` CLI subcommands plus a hidden worker command that runs `Harness.run_forever()`.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Persist daemon metadata in a PID file, detect stale PID files, and install a `SIGTERM` handler that lets the current iteration finish and exits cleanly.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n3. Logging, monitoring, and dashboard\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add one centralized logging setup for the harness CLI/daemon path.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Emit structured JSONL events for stage start, completion, retry, quota pause, permission pause, and failure.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Compute dashboard aggregates from the DB plus the JSONL event stream: task counts by status, stage counts by status, total/average duration, total token usage, and execution error rate.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Include daemon state, recent failures, and quota/permission pause counts in the dashboard output.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n## File Targets\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- `harness/quota_router.py`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- `harness/main.py`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- `harness/stage_executor.py`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- `harness/task_queue.py`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- `config/settings.py`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- New modules are likely justified for daemon/process management and telemetry aggregation.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n## Test Plan\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add router tests for multi-account Codex selection and no-side-effect feasibility checks.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add harness/main tests for Codex account activation before execution.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add daemon tests for PID lifecycle, stale PID detection, and stop/status behavior.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Add telemetry/dashboard tests for JSONL event emission and aggregate summaries.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n- Final verification: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -v`\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n## Baseline\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\nCurrent baseline is green: `python3 -m pytest tests/harness/ -q` passed with `21 passed`.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"exit_code\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":0,\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"status\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"}}\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item.completed\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":{\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"id\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"item_49\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"type\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"agent_message\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"text\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\":\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\u89c4\\\\\\\\u5212\\\\\\\\u7ed3\\\\\\\\u679c\\\\\\\\u5df2\\\\\\\\u843d\\\\\\\\u5230 -lc \\\\\\\"sed -n '1,260p' harness/quota_router.py\\\\\\\"\\\",\\\"aggregated_output\\\":\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Quota-aware model routing.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\nfrom __future__ import annotations\\\\n\\\\nimport json\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Optional\\\\n\\\\nimport yaml\\\\n\\\\nfrom config import settings\\\\nfrom harness.chat2api_client import Chat2APIClient\\\\nfrom harness.models import ModelChoice, StageRecord, TaskRecord\\\\nfrom models.quota_manager import QuotaManager, QuotaSnapshot\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass AllQuotaExhaustedError(RuntimeError):\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Raised when no configured candidate model is currently usable.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\nclass QuotaRouter:\\\\n    \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Select a model using role preferences, availability, and quota heuristics.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n    def __init__(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        catalog_path: str | Path = settings.HARNESS_ROLE_MODELS_PATH,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        quota_manager: Optional[QuotaManager] = None,\\\\n        chat_client: Optional[Chat2APIClient] = None,\\\\n        min_remaining_pct: int = settings.HARNESS_MIN_QUOTA_PCT,\\\\n        enable_llm_selector: bool = True,\\\\n    ) -> None:\\\\n        self.catalog_path = Path(catalog_path)\\\\n        self.quota_manager = quota_manager or QuotaManager()\\\\n        self.chat_client = chat_client or Chat2APIClient()\\\\n        self.min_remaining_pct = min_remaining_pct\\\\n        self.enable_llm_selector = enable_llm_selector\\\\n        self.catalog = self._load_catalog()\\\\n\\\\n    def _load_catalog(self) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\n        with open(self.catalog_path, \\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\") as handle:\\\\n            return yaml.safe_load(handle) or {}\\\\n\\\\n    def models_for_role(self, role: str) -> list[str]:\\\\n        roles = self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"roles\\\\\\\", {})\\\\n        configured = roles.get(role)\\\\n        if configured:\\\\n            return list(configured)\\\\n        return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\n\\\\n    def get_model_info(self, model: str) -> dict[str, Any]:\\\\n        return dict(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {}).get(model, {}))\\\\n\\\\n    def chat2api_id(self, model: str) -> str:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Return the chat2api model ID for a catalog model name.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        info = self.get_model_info(model)\\\\n        return info.get(\\\\\\\"chat2api_id\\\\\\\", model)\\\\n\\\\n    def list_available_models(self) -> list[str]:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Return catalog model names whose chat2api_id is live.\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        try:\\\\n            live_ids = set(self.chat_client.list_models())\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\n            return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\n        if not live_ids:\\\\n            return list(self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {}).keys())\\\\n        return [\\\\n            name\\\\n            for name in self.catalog.get(\\\\\\\"models\\\\\\\", {})\\\\n            if self.chat2api_id(name) in live_ids\\\\n        ]\\\\n\\\\n    def can_run_stage(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\\\\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\\\\n    ) -> bool:\\\\n        try:\\\\n            self.select_model(task, stage, quota_snapshot=quota_snapshot, available_models=available_models)\\\\n        except AllQuotaExhaustedError:\\\\n            return False\\\\n        return True\\\\n\\\\n    def select_model(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        *,\\\\n        quota_snapshot: Optional[list[QuotaSnapshot]] = None,\\\\n        available_models: Optional[list[str]] = None,\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\\\\n        quotas = quota_snapshot if quota_snapshot is not None else self.quota_manager.fetch_all_quotas()\\\\n        available = set(available_models or self.list_available_models())\\\\n        eligible = self._eligible_candidates(self.models_for_role(stage.model_role), quotas, available)\\\\n\\\\n        if not eligible:\\\\n            raise AllQuotaExhaustedError(\\\\n                f\\\\\\\"No eligible model for role={stage.model_role} with min_remaining={self.min_remaining_pct}%\\\\\\\"\\\\n            )\\\\n\\\\n        if self.enable_llm_selector:\\\\n            llm_choice = self._select_with_llm(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\\\\n            if llm_choice is not None:\\\\n                return llm_choice\\\\n\\\\n        return self._fallback_select(task, stage, eligible)\\\\n\\\\n    def _eligible_candidates(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        candidates: list[str],\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\n        available: set[str],\\\\n    ) -> list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]]:\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]] = []\\\\n        for model in candidates:\\\\n            if model not in available:\\\\n                continue\\\\n            provider = self.get_model_info(model).get(\\\\\\\"provider\\\\\\\")\\\\n            if not provider:\\\\n                continue\\\\n\\\\n            provider_snapshots = [\\\\n                snapshot\\\\n                for snapshot in quotas\\\\n                if snapshot.provider.value == provider and snapshot.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\\\\n            ]\\\\n            if provider_snapshots:\\\\n                eligible.append((model, provider, max(provider_snapshots, key=self._score_snapshot)))\\\\n            elif provider == \\\\\\\"github\\\\\\\":\\\\n                eligible.append((model, provider, None))\\\\n        return eligible\\\\n\\\\n    def _select_with_llm(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice | None:\\\\n        selector_model = self._pick_selector_model()\\\\n        if selector_model is None:\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n        prompt = self._build_selection_prompt(task, stage, quotas, eligible)\\\\n        try:\\\\n            raw = self.chat_client.chat(\\\\n                model=selector_model,\\\\n                prompt=prompt,\\\\n                system=(\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"You are code-orchestra's model router. \\\\\\\"\\\\n                    \\\\\\\"Return compact JSON with fields model, provider, account, reason.\\\\\\\"\\\\n                ),\\\\n            )\\\\n            parsed = json.loads(raw)\\\\n        except Exception:\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n        chosen_model = parsed.get(\\\\\\\"model\\\\\\\")\\\\n        if not isinstance(chosen_model, str):\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n        eligible_models = {model: (provider, snapshot) for model, provider, snapshot in eligible}\\\\n        selected = eligible_models.get(chosen_model)\\\\n        if selected is None:\\\\n            return None\\\\n\\\\n        provider, snapshot = selected\\\\n        if snapshot is not None:\\\\n            requested_account = parsed.get(\\\\\\\"account\\\\\\\")\\\\n            if isinstance(requested_account, str) and requested_account and requested_account != snapshot.email:\\\\n                alternative = next(\\\\n                    (\\\\n                        quota\\\\n                        for quota in quotas\\\\n                        if quota.provider.value == provider\\\\n                        and quota.email == requested_account\\\\n                        and quota.remaining_percent >= self.min_remaining_pct\\\\n                    ),\\\\n                    None,\\\\n                )\\\\n                if alternative is not None:\\\\n                    snapshot = alternative\\\\n\\\\n        return ModelChoice(\\\\n            model=chosen_model,\\\\n            provider=provider,\\\\n            account_email=snapshot.email if snapshot is not None else None,\\\\n            reason=str(parsed.get(\\\\\\\"reason\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\"llm_selector\\\\\\\"),\\\\n        )\\\\n\\\\n    def _fallback_select(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\n    ) -> ModelChoice:\\\\n        best_choice: ModelChoice | None = None\\\\n        best_score: float | None = None\\\\n\\\\n        for role_index, (model, provider, snapshot) in enumerate(eligible):\\\\n            role_bonus = max(0, 40 - role_index * 10)\\\\n            if snapshot is not None:\\\\n                total_score = role_bonus + self._score_snapshot(snapshot)\\\\n                choice = ModelChoice(\\\\n                    model=model,\\\\n                    provider=provider,\\\\n                    account_email=snapshot.email,\\\\n                    reason=(\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\"fallback: role={stage.model_role}, complexity={task.complexity}, \\\\\\\"\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\"remaining={snapshot.remaining_percent}%, \\\\\\\"\\\\n                        f\\\\\\\"reset_in={snapshot.time_until_reset_hours:.1f}h\\\\\\\"\\\\n                    ),\\\\n                )\\\\n            else:\\\\n                total_score = role_bonus + self._score_provider_without_snapshot(provider)\\\\n                choice = ModelChoice(\\\\n                    model=model,\\\\n                    provider=provider,\\\\n                    account_email=None,\\\\n                    reason=f\\\\\\\"fallback: role={stage.model_role}, complexity={task.complexity}, provider={provider}\\\\\\\",\\\\n                )\\\\n\\\\n            if best_score is None or total_score > best_score:\\\\n                best_score = total_score\\\\n                best_choice = choice\\\\n\\\\n        if best_choice is None:\\\\n            raise AllQuotaExhaustedError(\\\\n                f\\\\\\\"No eligible model for role={stage.model_role} with min_remaining={self.min_remaining_pct}%\\\\\\\"\\\\n            )\\\\n        return best_choice\\\\n\\\\n    def _pick_selector_model(self) -> str | None:\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"Pick the cheapest available model to use as the LLM selector.\\\\n\\\\n        Returns the *chat2api_id* since the selector call goes directly to chat2api.\\\\n        \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        preferred = (\\\\\\\"gpt-4o\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"claude-haiku-4-5\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"gemini-3.1-pro\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"gpt-5.4-codex\\\\\\\")\\\\n        available = set(self.list_available_models())\\\\n        for model in preferred:\\\\n            if model in available:\\\\n                return self.chat2api_id(model)\\\\n        return None\\\\n\\\\n    def _build_selection_prompt(\\\\n        self,\\\\n        task: TaskRecord,\\\\n        stage: StageRecord,\\\\n        quotas: list[QuotaSnapshot],\\\\n        eligible: list[tuple[str, str, Optional[QuotaSnapshot]]],\\\\n    ) -> str:\\\\n        lines = [\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"Task: {task.title}\\\\\\\",\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"Description: {task.description}\\\\\\\",\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"Complexity: {task.complexity}\\\\\\\",\\\\n            f\\\\\\\"Stage: {stage.stage_type} ({stage.model_role})\\\\\\\",\\\\n            \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n            \\\\\\\"Eligible models:\\\\\\\",\\\\n\\\",\\\"exit_code\\\":0,\\\"status\\\":\\\"completed\\\"}}\\n{\\\"type\\\":\\\"item.started\\\",\\\"item\\\":{\\\"id\\\":\\\"item_5\\\",\\\"type\\\":\\\"command_execution\\\",\\\"command\\\":\\\"/bin/bash time\\\\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\\\\nfrom pathlib import Path\\\\nfrom typing import Any, Dict, List, Optional\\\\n\\\\nfrom . import auth\\\\n\\\\nCODEX_DIR = Path.home() / \\\\\\\".codex\\\\\\\"\\\\nACCOUNTS_DIR = CODEX_DIR / \\\\\\\"accounts\\\\\\\"\\\\nACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH = ACCOUNTS_DIR / \\\\\\\"accounts.json\\\\\\\"\\\\nCODEX_AUTH_PATH = CODEX_DIR / \\\\\\\"auth.json\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\n@dataclass\\\\nclass CodexAccount:\\\\n    email: str\\\\n    access_token: str\\\\n    refresh_token: str\\\\n    id_token: str\\\\n    account_id: str\\\\n    plan_type: str\\\\n    quota_snapshot: Dict[str, Any]\\\\n    disabled: bool\\\\n    created_at: int\\\\n    last_used: int\\\\n\\\\n    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\\\n        return {\\\\n            \\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\": self.email,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\": self.access_token,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\": self.refresh_token,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\": self.id_token,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"account_id\\\\\\\": self.account_id,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"plan_type\\\\\\\": self.plan_type,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"quota_snapshot\\\\\\\": self.quota_snapshot,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"disabled\\\\\\\": self.disabled,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"created_at\\\\\\\": self.created_at,\\\\n            \\\\\\\"last_used\\\\\\\": self.last_used,\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n    @classmethod\\\\n    def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> \\\\\\\"CodexAccount\\\\\\\":\\\\n        return cls(\\\\n            email=data.get(\\\\\\\"email\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            access_token=data.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            refresh_token=data.get(\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            id_token=data.get(\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            account_id=data.get(\\\\\\\"account_id\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            plan_type=data.get(\\\\\\\"plan_type\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\"),\\\\n            quota_snapshot=data.get(\\\\\\\"quota_snapshot\\\\\\\") or {},\\\\n            disabled=bool(data.get(\\\\\\\"disabled\\\\\\\", False)),\\\\n            created_at=int(data.get(\\\\\\\"created_at\\\\\\\") or int(time.time())),\\\\n            last_used=int(data.get(\\\\\\\"last_used\\\\\\\") or int(time.time())),\\\\n        )\\\\n\\\\n\\\\n@dataclass\\\\nclass AccountIndex:\\\\n    accounts: List[str]\\\\n    active_account: str\\\\n\\\\n    def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\\\n        return {\\\\n            \\\\\\\"accounts\\\\\\\": list(self.accounts),\\\\n            \\\\\\\"active_account\\\\\\\": self.active_account,\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n    @classmethod\\\\n    def from_dict(cls, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> \\\\\\\"AccountIndex\\\\\\\":\\\\n        accounts = data.get(\\\\\\\"accounts\\\\\\\") or []\\\\n        active = data.get(\\\\\\\"active_account\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n        return cls(accounts=list(accounts), active_account=active)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _ensure_accounts_dir() -> None:\\\\n    ACCOUNTS_DIR.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _account_path(email: str) -> Path:\\\\n    return ACCOUNTS_DIR / f\\\\\\\"{email}.json\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _read_json(path: Path) -> Dict[str, Any]:\\\\n    with path.open(\\\\\\\"r\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\n        return json.load(f)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _atomic_write_json(path: Path, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:\\\\n    _ensure_accounts_dir()\\\\n    tmp_path = path.with_suffix(\\\\\\\".tmp\\\\\\\")\\\\n    with tmp_path.open(\\\\\\\"w\\\\\\\", encoding=\\\\\\\"utf-8\\\\\\\") as f:\\\\n        json.dump(data, f, indent=2, sort_keys=True)\\\\n        f.flush()\\\\n        os.fsync(f.fileno())\\\\n    os.replace(tmp_path, path)\\\\n    os.chmod(path, 0o600)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _load_index() -> AccountIndex:\\\\n    if not ACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH.exists():\\\\n        return AccountIndex(accounts=[], active_account=\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\")\\\\n    return AccountIndex.from_dict(_read_json(ACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH))\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _save_index(index: AccountIndex) -> None:\\\\n    _atomic_write_json(ACCOUNTS_INDEX_PATH, index.to_dict())\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef get_account_index() -> AccountIndex:\\\\n    return _load_index()\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef get_active_email() -> str:\\\\n    return _load_index().active_account\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef list_accounts() -> List[str]:\\\\n    return _load_index().accounts\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef load_account(email: str) -> CodexAccount:\\\\n    path = _account_path(email)\\\\n    if not path.exists():\\\\n        raise FileNotFoundError(f\\\\\\\"Account not found: {email}\\\\\\\")\\\\n    return CodexAccount.from_dict(_read_json(path))\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef load_all_accounts() -> List[CodexAccount]:\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\n    accounts: List[CodexAccount] = []\\\\n    for email in index.accounts:\\\\n        try:\\\\n            accounts.append(load_account(email))\\\\n        except FileNotFoundError:\\\\n            continue\\\\n    return accounts\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef save_account(account: CodexAccount) -> None:\\\\n    _atomic_write_json(_account_path(account.email), account.to_dict())\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef add_account(\\\\n    email: str,\\\\n    tokens: Dict[str, Any],\\\\n    account_id: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n    plan_type: Optional[str] = None,\\\\n    quota_snapshot: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None,\\\\n    disabled: Optional[bool] = None,\\\\n    set_active: bool = False,\\\\n    update_last_used: bool = True,\\\\n) -> CodexAccount:\\\\n    if not tokens.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\") or not tokens.get(\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\"):\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(\\\\\\\"Missing access_token or refresh_token for account\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n    email=email,\\\\n        access_token=tokens.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n        refresh_token=tokens.get(\\\\\\\"refresh_token\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n        id_token=tokens.get(\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\") or \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\",\\\\n        account_id=account_id or (existing.account_id if existing else \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"),\\\\n        plan_type=plan_type or (existing.plan_type if existing else \\\\\\\"unknown\\\\\\\"),\\\\n        quota_snapshot=quota_snapshot if quota_snapshot is not None else (existing.quota_snapshot if existing else {}),\\\\n        disabled=existing.disabled if (existing and disabled is None) else bool(disabled),\\\\n        created_at=existing.created_at if existing else now,\\\\n        last_used=now if update_last_used else (existing.last_used if existing else now),\\\\n    )\\\\n\\\\n    save_account(account)\\\\n\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\n    if email not in index.accounts:\\\\n        index.accounts.append(email)\\\\n    if set_active:\\\\n        index.active_account = email\\\\n    _save_index(index)\\\\n\\\\n    return account\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef get_active_account() -> CodexAccount:\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\n    if not index.active_account:\\\\n        raise RuntimeError(\\\\\\\"No active account set\\\\\\\")\\\\n    return load_account(index.active_account)\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef remove_account(email: str) -> None:\\\\n    index = _load_index()\\\\n    if email in index.accounts:\\\\n        index.accounts.remove(email)\\\\n    if index.active_account == email:\\\\n        index.active_account = \\\\\\\"\\\\\\\"\\\\n    _save_index(index)\\\\n\\\\n    path = _account_path(email)\\\\n    if path.exists():\\\\n        path.unlink()\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef import_current_account() -> CodexAccount:\\\\n    auth_data = auth.read_codex_auth()\\\\n    tokens = auth_data.get(\\\\\\\"tokens\\\\\\\", {})\\\\n    if not refresh_token\\\\\\\")\\\\n    info = auth.extract_account_info(tokens.get(\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\"), tokens.get(\\\\\\\"access_token\\\\\\\"))\\\\n\\\\n    email = info.email\\\\n    if not tokens.get(\\\\\\\"id_token\\\\\\\"),\\\\n        },\\\\n        account_id=account_id,\\\\n        plan_type=plan_type,\\\\n        set_active=True,\\\\n        update_last_used=True,\\\\n    )\\\\n\\\\n    return account\\\\n\\\\n\\\\ndef _is_codex_running() -> bool:\\\\n    try:\\\\n        result = subprocess.run(\\\\n            [\\\\\\\"pgrep\\\\\\\", \\\\\\\"-f\\\\\\\",
